agudo.overview:
# Agudo（阿古朵） — Support / Tank Jungler

## Overview

- **Role:** Support / Tank Jungler (Summoner)
- **Lane:** Roaming / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 山林之子 (Child of the Mountain)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 阿古朵)

> Agudo is a uniquely designed summoner-style Tank Jungler. She doesn't auto-attack jungle camps — instead, she uses **Tame** to instantly clear them. Her strength scales with the number of monsters tamed (max 4 per type), and in combat she summons an army of jungle creatures alongside her mount **Qiuqiu (球球)** for coordinated assaults.

---

## Passive & Core Mechanics

### Tame (Damage-Free Instant Clear)

Approach a jungle monster and use the Summoner Spell button (becomes **Tame**). After a channel, the monster is instantly cleared for full rewards. **Any damage taken from Heroes, Minions, or Monsters interrupts the channel.**

### Monster Stacking

Each monster type can be tamed up to **4 times (4 upgrades)**. Agudo's summoned creatures' damage and tankiness scale directly with tame counts.

### Human-Bear Separation (Ultimate)

Agudo's ultimate sends Qiuqiu crashing down with all tamed monsters. Agudo herself becomes a **ranged Marksman** in this state — but loses Qiuqiu's Health bonus, making her **extremely fragile**. Use defensively or when safe.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
agudo.tips:
# Agudo Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Master Tame (Passive)

Approach jungle monsters and use the Summoner Spell button (becomes **Tame**) to instantly clear them without fighting. **Any damage interrupts the channel** — from Heroes, Minions, or Monsters. Clear safely.

### 2. Double-Camp Taming (Advanced)

Agudo can basic-attack two adjacent camps (e.g., Blue Buff + Lizard, or Red Buff + Three Pigs) to pull their aggro together. Position at the boundary between both camps and cast Tame — **both camps clear simultaneously**. Fastest jungle clear in the game.

### 3. Ultimate Timing (Critical Survival)

When casting Ultimate (S3), Qiuqiu crashes down with all tamed monsters while Agudo becomes a ranged Marksman. **Agudo is extremely fragile without Qiuqiu's Health bonus.** If enemy Assassins (Lanling Wang, Li Bai) are nearby, **do not blindly throw ultimate**. Use it:
- As counter-engage when dived
- For pushing towers when safe
- To burst down an isolated target

### 4. Recall Qiuqiu (Lifesaving)

If you're dived after throwing ultimate, **press S3 again immediately**. Qiuqiu teleports back to you, restoring a large amount of Health. This is your best survival tool.

### 5. Skill Priority

**Max S1 first, then S2. Take ultimate whenever available.** S1 provides massive AoE healing + Movement Speed — core for team control and tower pushes. S2 is mainly for unstoppable mobility and escape.

---

## Signature Combos

### Seamless Lockdown: **S2 → S1 → S3 → AA**

1. S2 charge (roll as a ball) into the enemy — knocks up on contact
2. Immediately cast S1 at their feet (summons vines that root + speed boost allies)
3. Predict enemy movement and cast S3 — Qiuqiu crashes down with knockup
4. Stay at safe range and auto-attack as Marksman form

### Emergency Recall: **S3 → (if dived) S3**

1. Throw ultimate for damage/engage
2. If an enemy Assassin jumps on you, **press S3 again immediately**
3. Qiuqiu teleports back, restoring massive Health

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Stack all monster types to 4:** Pigs, Lizards, Wolves, and Birds. Max-stacked ultimate is devastating.
- **Tower pushing:** Agudo + Qiuqiu + tamed army can demolish towers with minimal minion support.
- **Vision control:** Use tamed monsters' aggro to check bushes safely.
- **Matchup:** Agudo dominates immobile compositions. She struggles against hyper-mobile Assassins who can dive her in Marksman form.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
agudo.build:
# Agudo Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Agudo's summoned creatures (jungle army + Qiuqiu) inherit **her Max Health**. CN server consensus: **full-tank support build**. She's also a "tower-pushing machine" for the team.

---

## Recommended Full-Tank Jungle Build

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Giant's Grip (巨人之握)** | Agudo's core item. Stacking Max Health per monster kill + burn aura synergizes perfectly with melee brawling. |
| 2 | **Shadow Boots (影忍之足)** or **Resistance Boots (抵抗之靴)** | Shadow Boots for physical-heavy teams (stacks with S1 healing for absurd durability). Resistance Boots vs heavy CC. |
| 3 | **Frost Grip (冰痕之握)** | CDR + Health + Physical Defense. Agudo's auto-attacks (both mounted and separated) frequently proc the AoE slow, making her extremely sticky. |
| 4 | **Blood Rage (血魔之怒)** | Exceptional cost-efficiency. High Max Health = massive shield from active. The bonus on-hit damage also applies to Qiuqiu. Lets Agudo survive and counter-kill during Human-Bear separation. |
| 5 | **Ominous Premonition (不祥征兆)** | Ultimate defense vs high-attack-speed Marksmen (Hou Yi, Marco). Massively reduces their damage output. |
| 6 | **Eternal Night (永夜守护)** or **Magic Cloak (魔女斗篷)** | Magic defense slot. Eternal Night vs burst mages (Gan & Mo, Mai Shiranui); Magic Cloak vs sustained magic poke. |

### Late-Game Swaps

- Sell boots for **Sage's Sanctuary (贤者的庇护)** or **Overlord's Platemail (霸者重装)**
- If enemies lack magic burst, swap magic defense for more Health items

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

Agudo does **not need Physical Penetration** — her damage comes from summoned creatures and magic/true-damage passives. Core stats: **Max Health (1000+ HP), CDR, Movement Speed**.

### Setup 1: Universal "Thousand-HP Speed Tank"

Grants over **+1,100 base Health** at level 1. Combined with Giant's Grip, Agudo + Qiuqiu become unkillable before level 4.

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |
|------|------|-----|----------------|
| 🔴 Red | Destiny (宿命) | ×10 | Max Health +33.7, Physical Defense +2.3, Attack Speed +1% |
| 🟢 Green | Void (虚空) | ×10 | Max Health +37.5, Cooldown Reduction +0.6% |
| 🔵 Blue | Harmony (调和) | ×10 | Max Health +45, Move Speed +0.4%, HP/5s +5.2 |

**Total:** **+1,162 Max Health**, +23 Physical Defense, +4% Movement Speed, +6% CDR, +10% Attack Speed.

### Setup 2: CN High-Rank "Greed Kiting"

Mixes in Magic Lifesteal for sustain when auto-attacking in separated Marksman form.

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |
|------|------|-----|----------------|
| 🔴 Red | Destiny (宿命) | ×10 | Max Health +33.7, Physical Defense +2.3, Attack Speed +1% |
| 🟢 Green | Void (虚空) | ×10 | Max Health +37.5, Cooldown Reduction +0.6% |
| 🔵 Blue | Harmony (调和) | ×7 | Max Health +45, Move Speed +0.4%, HP/5s +5.2 |
| 🔵 Blue | Greed (贪婪) | ×3 | Magic Lifesteal +1.6% |

**Total:** Sacrifices ~100 Max Health for **+4.8% Magic Lifesteal** — sustains Agudo's Marksman-form auto-attacks when kiting at range.

---

## Quick In-Game Setup

Agudo relies heavily on monster stacking. After entering a match:

1. Open **Preparation (备战)** → copy the **CN #1** or highest-winrate pro setup
2. Prioritize stacking **Pigs, Lizards, Wolves, and Birds** to 4 layers each
3. A max-stacked ultimate crushes towers and teamfights

---

> 💡 **Player-discovered builds.** [Contribute your setup!](#)

alessio.overview:
# Alessio（萊西奧） — Marksman

## Overview

- **Role:** Marksman (Aerial Bombardier)
- **Lane:** Farm Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 火鷹船長 (Firehawk Captain)
- **Region:** CN server exclusive (莱西奥)

> Alessio ("Firehawk Captain") is a uniquely designed burst-bombardment Marksman. His AAs deal AoE splash damage. His S2 launches him into the air — **he ignores terrain while airborne** and AAs/S3 extend his airtime. His S3 is a targeted missile barrage with **%missing HP execute damage.** Standing still reduces his AA interval by 25%.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Stand Still = Faster AAs

When Alessio stands still, his AA interval is **reduced by 25%.** In safe positions (behind frontline, free-farming), stand still and turret. When kiting, use the standard "AA → step → AA" rhythm.

### S2: Smoke Jump (Aerial + Stealth)

S2 launches Alessio into the air. While airborne: **ignores terrain, AAs and S3 extend airtime.** The smoke cloud on landing grants **Stealth to Alessio AND allies inside it** — enemies can't target you.

### S1: Empowered Shots

S1 empowers the next 3 AAs with larger AoE + bonus damage. **Pre-cast S1** and wait for CD to nearly reset before engaging — you can fire 4-5 empowered shots in one trade.

### S3: %Missing HP Execute + Unstoppable

S3 locks onto an enemy and fires homing missiles dealing **%missing HP damage (execute).** If cast from the ground: grants **Unstoppable** — use to tank CC.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
alessio.tips:
# Alessio Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Stand Still When Safe (25% Faster AAs)

Passive reduces AA interval by 25% when standing still. When your frontline is protecting you or you're free-farming: **don't move — just fire.** Maximum DPS. When kiting: standard "AA → step → AA."

### 2. S2: Aerial God Mode

S2 launches you airborne — you ignore terrain. AA and S3 **extend your airtime.** When Assassins dive: S2 up → AA + S3 from the sky → they can't touch you. Land in smoke → Stealth → escape.

### 3. Pre-Stack S1 for Burst

S1 empowers 3 AAs. Cast S1 early → wait for CD to nearly reset → engage. You'll get 3 empowered AAs, then S1 off CD again = 5-6 empowered shots in one trade.

### 4. S3: Ground Cast = Unstoppable

S3 from the ground grants Unstoppable during the cast. When Musashi S3, Lu Bu knockup, or any CC is incoming: **S3 their face** — you'll tank the CC and return fire.

### 5. S3: %Missing HP = Cleanup Tool

S3 deals %missing HP damage. Save it for **after** your initial burst, not before. The lower they are, the harder S3 hits.

---

## Signature Combos

### Aerial Bombardment: **S1 → S2 → AA (air) → S3 (air) → AA (air)**

1. S1 (empower)
2. S2 launch (airborne)
3. AA from the sky (extend airtime)
4. S3 from the sky (extend airtime further)
5. AA until landing → smoke stealth

### Anti-Dive: **S3 (ground) → S2 → AA (air)**

1. Assassin dives → S3 their face (Unstoppable + damage)
2. S2 launch → you're airborne
3. AA from the sky → they can't reach you
4. Land → smoke stealth → walk away

---

## Advanced Tips

- **AoE splash lifesteal stacks per target hit.** One empowered AA into a minion wave = massive HP restore.
- **S2 can cross any wall.** Use for creative gank paths and escapes over the thickest terrain.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs melee divers (S2 counters them). Struggles vs long-range poke that hits you in the air.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
alessio.build:

allain.overview:
# Allain（亞連） — Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter (Pursuit Duelist / Mixed Damage)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 追月之影 (Shadow of the Chasing Moon)
- **Region:** CN server exclusive (亚连)

> Allain is a dominant pursuit Fighter. His AAs are **4-stage combos (9 total hits)** with Unstoppable frames, dashes, and **triple mixed damage (Physical + Magic + True).** He shreds both squishies and tanks. His S3 is a targeted leap with full untargetability — used offensively to chase or defensively to dodge.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Rage Stacking (Max 16 Stacks)

AAs and abilities on enemy Heroes build Rage. Each stack: +2% DR + 3% Hybrid Penetration. **At max stacks: restores %missing HP.** Always pre-stack on minions/air before engaging.

### S1: Rage-Empowered Finisher

S1 evolves through 4 stages based on Rage. **At max Rage/full charge:** the final hit deals **20% missing HP True Damage** AND grants **Unstoppable/Invulnerability.**

### S2: Defense Shred + Stored Charges

S2 dashes forward, reducing enemy dual defenses by **10-50%** (scales with skill level). **Stores up to 2 charges.** Always keep one charge for chase or escape.

### S3: Untargetable Lock-On

S3 leaps into the air (**fully untargetable**), locks onto an enemy OR ally. Landing: AoE mixed damage + knockup (enemy) or shield (ally). Use to: dodge burst (Zhuge Liang S3, Daji combo), chase fleeing enemies, or shield allies.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
allain.tips:
# Allain Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Pre-Stack Rage Before Every Fight

Rage stacks on enemies. Before engaging: AA minions, jungle camps, or even air to build Rage. Enter fights with Rage ready — not at 0 stacks.

### 2. Air-AA to Build S1 Charge

S1's power scales with AA charge count. From bushes: AA air 2-3 times to pre-charge S1. When the enemy walks in: unleash full-charge S1 with 20% missing HP True Damage finisher.

### 3. S2: Always Keep One Charge

S2 stores 2 charges. Never burn both. Use one to engage → keep the second for chase, escape, or dodging skillshots.

### 4. S3: Offensive AND Defensive

S3 is fully untargetable during the leap. Use to: dodge Zhuge Liang S3, Daji combo, Guitarist S3. Also: lock onto a fleeing enemy for the kill, or lock onto a dying ally for the shield save.

### 5. S3 Refreshes S2 Charges

After S3 lands, S2 charges are fully refreshed. Engage cycle: S2 (charge 1) → S1 → S3 → S2 (charge 2) to chase or S2 to escape.

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard Trade: **S2 → AA → S1 → S3 → S2**

1. S2 dash + defense shred
2. AA to max Rage + S1 charge
3. S1 full combo (Unstoppable + True Damage finisher)
4. S3 if needed (chase or dodge)
5. S2 (refreshed from S3) to secure kill or escape

### Long-Range Backline Dive: **S2 → S2 → S3 → AA → S1**

1. S2 two dashes to close distance
2. S3 lock onto enemy backline carry
3. AA + S1 to finish

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S1's final hit at max Rage is the most important damage.** Don't cancel it early by moving.
- **S3 can target allies.** Use to shield your ADC in emergencies.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs immobile squishies. Struggles vs CC that cancels S1 charge.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
allain.build:

> **Build philosophy:** Built-in hybrid Penetration from Rage. High AS for fast Rage stacking + on-hit synergy. Two paths: **On-Hit Semi-Tank** (meta, highest winrate) and **Crit Burst** (snowball).

---

## Build A: On-Hit Semi-Tank (Recommended)

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Resistance Boots (抵抗之靴)** | Tenacity. Allain must melee — CC stops S1 charge. |
| 2 | **Lightning Dagger (闪电匕首)** | **Core!** High AS + chain lightning. Allain's multi-hit AAs trigger it constantly. |
| 3 | **Blood Rage (血魔之怒)** or **Blazing Cape (红莲斗篷)** | **Blood Rage:** massive shield at low HP + bonus on-hit. **Blazing Cape:** HP + burn aura. |
| 4 | **Berserker's Armor (暴烈之甲)** | Stacking MS + damage while taking hits. Perfect for Allain's brawl style. |
| 5 | **Eternal Night (永夜守护)** or **Magic Cloak (魔女斗篷)** | Magic defense. |
| 6 | **Overlord's Platemail (霸者重装)** or **Raging Soul (怒魂)** | Massive HP — amplifies Blood Rage shield and on-hit damage. |

---

## Build B: Crit Burst (Snowball)

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | Resistance Boots | Tenacity. |
| 2 | Shadow Blade (影刃) | On-crit AS + MS. |
| 3 | Shadow Axe (暗影战斧) | CDR + Penetration. |

| 5 | Pure Sky (纯净苍穹) | Active DR. |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

Core: **Attack Speed, Max HP, Movement Speed.**

angela.overview:
# Angela（安琪拉） — Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Mage (Burst / Bush Ambusher)
- **Lane:** Mid Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 暗夜蘿莉 (Dark Lolita)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 安琪拉)

> Angela is a classic burst Mage with terrifying ambush potential. Her S1 fires 5 fireballs — if all 5 hit the same target, it instantly stacks half her passive. Her S3 grants a massive shield + **Unstoppable** during the channel, letting her face-tank Assassin dives and retaliate. She's the queen of bush camping: S2 → S1 → S3 deletes anyone who walks past the wrong bush.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Stack Stacks = Exponential Damage

Abilities stack burns (max 10). Each stack amplifies subsequent damage. **The more stacks, the more exponential the damage.** A fully-stacked S3 deals 2-3x the base damage.

### S1: 5 Fireballs — Make Them All Hit

S1 fires 5 fireballs. **If all 5 hit one target, instant 5 passive stacks.** Close-range S1 on a stunned enemy = maximum damage.

### S2: Slow Projectile — Predict Movement

S2's fireball travels slowly. Don't aim where they are — **aim half a step ahead of their movement path.** From bush, it's nearly undodgeable.

### S3: Unstoppable + Shield (Anti-Dive)

S3 grants a massive shield + **Unstoppable (CC-immune)** during the entire channel. When an Assassin dives (Lanling Wang, Wukong, Li Bai): **don't run — S3 their face.** The shield + CC immunity means you out-trade them. Press S3 again after 0.5s to cancel early.

### S3 + Flash: Reposition the Laser

During S3, you can **Flash to reposition the laser.** If the enemy Flashes out of range: Flash to extend the beam onto them.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
angela.tips:
# Angela Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Bush Camping Is Your Identity

Angela is the queen of bush ambushes. Hide in any bush near enemy rotation paths. Enemy walks past: **S2 (point-blank, undodgeable) → S1 (all 5 hit) → S3.** Even full tanks die to this. Rotate between bushes after each kill — the enemy will fear every bush on the map.

### 2. S2: Predict, Don't React

S2 travels slowly. Against aware enemies, aim **half a step ahead** of their movement. From bush or fog of war, it's undodgeable.

### 3. S3: Anti-Dive, Not Just Damage

When an Assassin dives you: **S3 immediately.** The massive shield + Unstoppable means you tank their entire burst + CC, then melt them during the channel. Never panic and run — Angela wins stand-and-fight trades.

### 4. S3 + Flash: Beam Extension

During S3, Flash to reposition the laser. If the enemy Flashes or dashes out of range, Flash-chase them with the beam. Also: S3 from bush → Flash into the open = surprise death ray.

### 5. S1 Close-Range = Maximum Stacks

S1's 5 fireballs spread out. At range: 1-2 hit. **At close range: all 5 hit one target.** After S2 stun, walk forward and point-blank S1 for instant 5 passive stacks → S3 for the amplified finish.

---

## Signature Combos

### Bush Delete: **S2 → S1 → S3**

1. Enemy walks past your bush
2. S2 at point-blank (guaranteed stun)
3. S1 close-range (all 5 fireballs hit)
4. S3 channel — dead before they recover from stun

### Anti-Dive Reversal: **S3 → S2 → S1**

1. Assassin dives you
2. S3 immediately (shield + Unstoppable — tank their burst)
3. S2 at your feet (stun them in the laser)
4. S1 to finish

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3 grants Unstoppable for the ENTIRE channel.** Daji charm, Mozi cannon — irrelevant.
- **Cancel S3 early (press again after 0.5s).** Don't commit to the full channel if it'll miss.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs immobile squishies. Struggles vs tanky dive comps that survive her combo.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
angela.build:
# Angela Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Pure burst. Instant deletion. **Magic Penetration + high AP + Movement Speed** for rotations and bush camping.

---

## Recommended Burst Build

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Arcane Boots (秘法之靴)** | Flat Magic Penetration + Mana regen. Early kill pressure. *Late: swap to Resistance Boots vs heavy CC.* |
| 2 | **Echo Staff (回响之杖)** | Core burst. S1/S3 triggers AoE explosion. +MS compensates for no mobility. |
| 3 | **Savant's Wrath (博学者之怒)** | Percentage AP boost. After this, one combo deletes any squishy. |
| 4 | **Void Staff (虚无法杖)** | 45% Penetration vs late-game Magic Cloak. |
| 5 | **Devourer's Tome (噬神之书)** or **Sage's Tome (贤者之书)** | **Devourer's Tome:** massive spell vamp — S3 healing is absurd. **Sage's Tome:** max AP + damage amp for one-shot potential. |
| 6 | **Splendor (辉月)** | Stasis for survival when S3 is on cooldown. |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

Core: **Magic Penetration, Movement Speed, mild Attack Speed.**

arli.overview:
# Arli（公孫離） — Marksman

## Overview

- **Role:** Marksman (Agile Outplay ADC)
- **Lane:** Farm Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★★★
- **Title:** 幻舞玲瓏 (Illusory Dance)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 公孙离; nickname: "A Li")

> Arli is widely considered the **highest skill-ceiling Marksman** in the game. Her core mechanic is her **Paper Umbrella** — when the umbrella is deployed, she gains bonus Movement Speed and reduced attack interval. Every ability cast and umbrella recall triggers a **double-arrow** enhanced auto-attack. Mastering umbrella management is the difference between a godlike Arli and a feeding one.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Maple Seal Explosions (Core Damage)

Attacks and abilities stack **Maple Seals**. At 4 stacks: explosion dealing AoE Magic Damage + **reduces all cooldowns by 1 second**. Stack seals as fast as possible.

### No-Umbrella State = Strongest Form

When the umbrella is deployed (not in hand): **+50 Movement Speed, -20% attack interval**. The umbrella-deployed state is her maximum DPS window.

### S2: Projectile Destruction

S2 destroys incoming projectiles (Zhuge Liang S3, Hou Yi bird, Marco S1, **tower shots**). The umbrella's rotation path is random — check its position before recasting.

### Always Keep One Escape

Never use all three S2 recasts at once. Always hold one umbrella recall to escape when an Assassin dives you.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
arli.tips:
# Arli Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. No-Umbrella State = Maximum DPS

When the umbrella is deployed: **+50 MS, -20% attack interval**. This is your strongest form. Throw umbrella → auto-attack relentlessly → recall only when you need to escape or chase.

### 2. Stack Maple Seals to 4

Every 4 stacks = AoE explosion + **-1s all cooldowns**. Always target the same enemy until the seal pops. The explosion is Magic Damage — it chunks even tanky targets.

### 3. S2 Destroys Projectiles (and Tower Shots!)

S2 destroys ALL incoming projectiles, including **tower shots**. When tower-diving or getting tower-aggro: S2 to delete the tower bullet.

### 4. Always Hold One Escape

Never expend S1, S2, AND S3 umbrella recalls. Always keep one available to escape when an Assassin jumps on you.

### 5. S3: Wall Slam

S3 pushes enemies back. In jungle corridors or near towers, angle S3 to **push enemies into walls** (stun) or into tower range.

### 6. Skill Priority

**Max S2 first, then S1. Take ultimate whenever available.** S2 upgrade reduces cooldown + increases base damage — it's both offense and defense.

---

## Signature Combos

### Safe Lane Poke: **S1 → AA → S2 → AA → S1 (recall)**

1. S1 forward → AA (double-arrow + seal stack)
2. S2 to block counter-attack + AA
3. S1 recall to original position
4. Zero risk, half enemy HP gone in 1 second

### Long-Range Chase: **S3 → S3 (recall) → S1 → AA → S2 → AA**

1. S3 throw umbrella forward + knockback
2. S3 recall to teleport to umbrella position (half-screen gap-close)
3. S1 forward for further chase
4. AA → S2 → AA to finish

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S2's umbrella position is random.** Always glance at where it's spinning before recasting.
- **Arli is pure glass.** One CC and you're dead. Your only defense is umbrella mobility.
- **Tower diving with S2:** S2 deletes tower shots. Dive → kill → S2 the tower bullet → walk out.
- **Matchup:** Destroys immobile Marksmen. Struggles vs point-and-click CC (Daji, Zhang Liang).

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
arli.build:
# Arli Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Arli desperately needs **Attack Speed** (hit AS thresholds to stack 4 seals quickly) and **on-hit effects** (double-arrows trigger on-hit twice). She's pure glass — mid-late game needs one defensive item.

---

## Recommended On-Hit Build

|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Berserker's Boots (急速战靴)** | Mandatory early AS. *Mid-late: sell for Resistance Boots (抵抗之靴) vs heavy CC.* |
| 2 | **Doomsday (末世)** | **Arli's #1 core item!** Every double-arrow perfectly triggers 8% Current HP on-hit. Damage doubles. Built-in Lifesteal for sustain. |
| 3 | **Shadow Blade (影刃)** | Critical Rate + Movement Speed. On-crit AS boost pushes Arli to maximum attack speed in no-umbrella state. |
| 4 | **Infinity Edge (无尽战刃)** | Critical Damage spike. Three arrows delete squishies. |
| 5 | **Dawn (破晓)** | Marksman core. 40% Physical Penetration + AA damage amp. Tank-shredding comes online. |
| 6 | **Sun Bow (逐日之弓)** or **Ominous Premonition (不祥征兆)** / **Magic Cloak (魔女斗篷)** | **Sun Bow:** super-range + MS for confident players — hit enemies from outside their screen. **Defensive item:** vs heavy dive/assassin teams. Arli's tiny HP pool needs the safety net. |

arthur.overview:
# Arthur（亞瑟） — Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter (Silence Skirmisher / Anti-Carry)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★☆☆☆☆
- **Title:** 聖騎之力 (Holy Knight's Might)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 亚瑟)

> Arthur is the game's iconic all-rounder Fighter. He has free passive HP regen, and his S1 is one of the most oppressive abilities in the game — a **Silence** on a 3-second cooldown (at 40% CDR). He's the ultimate "anti-fancy" Hero: Jing, Diaochan, and Luna all fear the Silence lock.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Infinite Silence at 40% CDR

At max CDR (40%): S1 cooldown = **3 seconds.** S1's speed boost + enhanced AA last **3 seconds.** This means **permanent S1 uptime.** You can double-Silence enemies in a single engage, preventing them from casting anything.

### Passive: Free HP Regen

Passive restores %Max HP every 2 seconds. After trading, don't recall — just walk around in a bush and heal to full for free.

### S1: Wall-Hop via AA

S1's enhanced AA has a small **dash-lunge.** If a jungle monster or minion is on the other side of a thin wall: S1 → AA the target → you lunge through the wall. Free escape or engage.

### S3: %Max HP Execute + AoE

S3 deals **%Max HP damage** (lower HP = harder it hits visually) + knockup. Leaves a burning circle on the ground. Combo with S1 Silence to keep enemies standing in the fire.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
arthur.tips:
# Arthur Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. 40% CDR = Infinite Silence

At 40% CDR: S1 = 3s cooldown. S1 buff = 3s duration. You can perma-run with S1 active and **Silence enemies twice in one engage.** This is Arthur's entire identity — enemies literally can't cast abilities.

### 2. Hit-and-Run, Not All-In

Arthur is NOT a "dive and die" Hero. His playstyle: **S1 in → Silence → S2 spin → S3 → S1 OUT.** Let passive heal you, then repeat. Three cycles of this and the enemy team is frustrated to death.

### 3. S1 Wall-Hop Escape

S1's enhanced AA has a dash-lunge. If a jungle camp is on the other side of a wall: S1 → AA the camp → you lunge through the wall. Free escape over any thin wall.

### 4. Passive: Never Recall

After any trade: walk to a bush, stand still for a few seconds. Passive + any HP regen item = full HP. Arthur almost never needs to recall.

### 5. Pre-Cast S1 Before Engaging

S1's buff lasts 3 seconds. Pre-cast S1 before entering a fight → AA (first Silence) → S1 is already close to off cooldown → S1 again → AA (second Silence). Double Silence in <3 seconds.

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard Engage: **S1 → AA (Silence) → S2 → S3 → AA → S1 (retreat)**

1. S1 in → AA Silence
2. S2 spin (damage while they can't cast)
3. S3 knockup + %HP damage
4. AA
5. S1 out (retreat)
6. Heal with passive → repeat

### Bush Ambush: **S1 (pre-cast) → AA → S2 → S3 → S1 → AA**

1. Pre-cast S1, wait in bush
2. AA (Silence)
3. S2 + S3 while they're Silenced
4. S1 (off cooldown) → AA (second Silence)

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S1 Silence is Arthur's entire kit.** Without 40% CDR, you can't chain-Silence. Prioritize CDR items.
- **Don't stand and AA trade.** Arthur's AA DPS is low. Hit abilities, then retreat. Hit-and-run only.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs ability-reliant Heroes (Jing, Diaochan, Luna). Struggles vs auto-attack bruisers who don't care about Silence.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
arthur.build:

ata.overview:
# Ata（豬八戒） — Tank

## Overview

- **Role:** Tank (Sustain Brawler)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Roaming
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 無憂猛士 (Fearless Warrior)
- **Region:** Global (Ata = CN server 猪八戒; redesigned as pirate/sailor with iron hook; mechanics identical)

> Ata (Zhu Bajie in CN server) has a terrifying **Grey HP recovery mechanism**: damage taken becomes a grey HP bar; dealing damage converts grey HP back to real HP. The more enemies around him, the tankier he becomes — he's a self-sustaining brawler who thrives in the middle of enemy teams.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Grey HP (Sustain Core)

When Ata takes damage, his HP bar turns **grey** instead of disappearing. As long as grey HP remains, **any damage dealt to enemies (including Minions and Monsters) converts grey HP back to green**. Never flee at low HP — S1 into a minion wave and watch your HP refill instantly.

### Ability Highlights

- **S1 (Bouncing Slam):** Leap — **Unstoppable during the jump**. Main damage, heal, and CC-ignore tool.
- **S2 (Hook Slam):** Hook that pulls. If it hits a wall, Ata charges to the wall and **stuns enemies against it**.
- **S3 (Terrain Wall):** Creates an impassable wall. **Pairs with S2** — even without natural terrain, S3→S2 creates a wall→stun combo anywhere.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
ata.tips:
# Ata Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Grey HP = Never Retreat

Damage taken becomes grey HP. Dealing damage converts grey → green. At low HP, don't run — **S1 into a minion wave or enemy cluster** and watch your HP refill instantly. The more enemies, the more healing.

### 2. S1 Unstoppable Timing

S1's jump grants **Unstoppable**. Time it against Daji's charm, Zhang Fei's roar, or any hard CC. If you're airborne, you're immune.

### 3. S3 → S2 Wall Combo

S3 creates a wall. S2 hooks enemies and slams them into walls for a stun. **Even with zero natural terrain**, cast S3 → S2 to create a wall and immediately stun enemies against it.

### 4. Smite Laning (Aggressive Start)

If playing Clash Lane with Smite (tank-jungle build):
- Level 1: immediately clear the back two minions
- S1 hits both enemy laner + minion wave simultaneously
- Almost nobody out-trades you at level 1

### 5. S3: Cage AND Escape

- **Cage:** Cut off enemy backline from frontline in teamfights
- **Escape:** Drop S3 behind you to block chokepoints
- **Cancel:** Press S3 again to remove the wall (prevents trapping allies)

---

## Signature Combos

### Wall-less Stun: **S3 → S2 → AA → S1**

1. S3 create wall in open ground
2. S2 hook → slam enemy into S3's wall (stun)
3. AA pull enemy back
4. S1 Unstoppable slam for damage + massive grey HP conversion

### Bush Ambush: **S2 → Flash → S1 → S3**

1. S2 charge from bush (gap-close)
2. Flash to extend range/extend stun
3. S1 Unstoppable bounce for damage
4. S3 wall to trap fleeing enemies

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Double burn aura:** Giant's Grip + Blazing Cape = two overlapping burn auras. This continuously triggers grey HP conversion even when just standing near enemies.
- **Don't cancel S3 too late:** Allies can be trapped by your wall. Cancel early.
- **Matchup:** Destroys melee-heavy comps (more targets = more healing). Struggles against kite-heavy ranged teams.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
ata.build:
# Ata Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Ata's damage and healing both scale with **Max Health**. Pure tank = high damage + high sustain. CN server consensus: **Smite Tank build** (Jungle/Clash flex).

---

## Recommended Smite Tank Build

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Giant's Grip (巨人之握)** | Core mandatory item. Massive Max Health. Double burn aura (jungle item + Blazing Cape) **continuously triggers grey HP conversion** — Ata heals just by standing near enemies. |
| 2 | **Boots of Fortitude (影忍之足)** or **Resistance Boots (抵抗之靴)** | Fortitude: 15% basic attack DR for lane duels. Resistance: Tenacity vs heavy CC. |

| 4 | **Phoenix Eye (不死鸟之眼)** or **Succubus Cloak** | **Ata's signature item!** Passive: "Every 10% HP lost increases all healing received by 6%." Perfectly synergizes with grey HP conversion — at low HP, one S1 bounce refills most of your HP bar. |
| 5 | **Ominous Premonition (不祥征兆)** | Counters enemy Marksmen and Physical Assassins. Reduces attacker's Attack Speed and Movement Speed on-hit. |

athena.overview:
# Athena（雅典娜） — Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter (Burst Assassin / Jungler)
- **Lane:** Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★★☆
- **Title:** 聖域餘暉 (Sacred Domain Twilight)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 雅典娜)

> Athena is extremely high-ceiling, hyper-aggressive burst Assassin-Fighter. She has the game's unique **True God Resurrection** mechanic — upon death she becomes a mobile ward that provides vision and can revive on the spot. Her damage revolves around **S2 enhanced spear thrusts**: land 3 consecutive thrusts on the same target to trigger **Penetrate** — dealing 25% of the target's missing HP as massive Physical Damage.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Death: Become a Moving Ward

Athena doesn't return to base when killed. She becomes a **True God spirit** that can freely roam the map, providing vision and scouting. On resurrection, she revives where she stands. Don't revive in the middle of enemies — position safely.

### S2: Spear Thrust (Core)

S2 empowers the next AA into a **dash-thrust**. Land 3 thrusts on the same target = **Penetrate** (25% target's missing HP as bonus damage). This is her execute mechanic.

### Shield + CC Immunity

S1 and S3 grant a shield. **While the shield holds, Athena is immune to ALL CC** (Unstoppable). S1 or S3 hitting an enemy **reduces S2's cooldown by 4 seconds** — this is how she chains thrusts.

### Pre-Stack S2 ("Hold the Spear")

Before ganking, press S2 early. The enhanced AA buff lasts a long time. Walk into the fight with one thrust ready (1st hit), S2 is off cooldown for the 2nd hit, S1/S3 reset S2 for the 3rd hit.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
athena.tips:
# Athena Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Pre-Stack S2 ("Hold the Spear")

Before ganking or ambushing: press S2 early. The enhanced AA buff lasts a long time. Walk in → 1st thrust → S2 is already off cooldown → 2nd thrust immediately → S1/S3 → resets S2 → 3rd thrust. Three thrusts in seconds.

### 2. S1/S3 Reset S2 Cooldown

S1 or S3 hitting an enemy **reduces S2 cooldown by 4 seconds**. This is the engine of her thrust chain. Always weave: S2 → thrust → S1 (reset) → S2 → thrust → S3 (reset) → S2 → thrust.

### 3. Shield = CC Immunity

S1 and S3 grant shields. **While the shield holds, Athena is immune to ALL CC.** Time S1/S3 to absorb Daji's charm, Mozi's cannon, or Lu Bu's knockup.

### 4. S3 + Smite = Guaranteed Hit

S3 roots Athena while charging. Enemies can walk out. At the last instant before S3 detonates: **Smite the enemy to slow them** — this ensures S3 hits and resets S2.

### 5. Death = Free Ward

When you die, you become a True God spirit. **Don't go AFK.** Use this time to:
- Scout the enemy jungle
- Position for a safe revive
- Provide vision for your team
- Follow low-HP enemies so your team can track them

### 6. Skill Priority

**Max S2 first, then S1. Take S3 whenever available.** S2 is core damage and mobility.

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard Triple-Thrust: **Pre-S2 → AA → S2 → AA → S1 → S2 → AA**

1. Pre-stack S2 (hold enhanced AA)
2. Thrust in (1st hit)
3. S2 → Thrust (2nd hit)
4. S1 (shield + reset S2)
5. S2 → Thrust (3rd hit — Penetrate triggers)

### Tower Dive Burst: **Pre-S2 → AA → S2 → AA → S3 → Smite → S2 → AA**

1. Pre-S2 thrusts 1+2
2. Enemy retreats under tower → **S3** (tank tower shot with shield + CC immunity)
3. **Smite** just before S3 detonates (guarantees hit)
4. S3 resets S2 → 3rd thrust — Penetrate execute

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Blue Buff is mandatory.** Athena is extremely Mana-hungry and needs the CDR. Protect your Blue at all costs.
- **Don't revive in enemy crowds.** When dead, float to safety before respawning.
- **Matchup:** Destroys squishy comps. Struggles vs tanky CC-heavy teams that break her shield.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
athena.build:
# Athena Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Pure burst jungle carry. Needs **CDR** (constant S2 resets) and **Critical Rate** (S2 thrusts CAN crit). CN server consensus: **full damage crit-burst**.

---

## Recommended Jungle Burst Build

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Greedy Bite (贪婪之噬)** | Standard Assassin jungle item: Attack, Penetration, CDR. |

bai-qi.overview:
# Bai Qi（白起） — Tank

## Overview

- **Role:** Tank (Engage / Drain Tank)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Roaming
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 最終兵器 (Ultimate Weapon)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 白起)

> Bai Qi is a quintessential Clash Lane tank (or powerful Support). His core mechanics: taking damage builds **Shadow Energy** — more Energy = more MS + up to **+80% healing received.** His S3 is one of the strongest hard-CC engages in the game: an AoE **Taunt** whose duration scales with **Max HP** (up to 2.5 seconds). He's the team's primary engager, damage sponge, and counter-initiator.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Shadow Energy: More Damage Taken = More Healing

Taking damage or casting abilities builds Shadow Energy. At max Energy: **+MS** and **+80% healing received.** This means S1 healing, Blood Rage shield, and even Heal summoner spell are nearly doubled.

### S1: Hold to Charge (3× Heal at Max)

S1 can be **held to charge.** Full-charge S1 deals **3× damage and 3× healing** compared to tap-cast. Always charge S1 in crowds.

### S1 Passive: 20% Auto-Cast on Damage Taken

When Bai Qi takes damage, there's a **20% chance to auto-cast a free S1.** The more enemies hitting him, the more free S1s he gets. He loves being in the middle of enemy teams and minion waves.

### S3: Taunt Duration = Max HP

S3's Taunt duration scales with **Bonus Max HP** (every 1000 HP = +0.2s, max 2.5s). This is why Bai Qi stacks HP items — more HP = longer Taunt = more teamfight control.

### S2: Delayed Pull (Don't Open With It)

S2 has a long delay. Don't use it raw — enemies walk out. Correct: **S3 Taunt first → S2 at their feet during Taunt → S2 pulls them back as Taunt expires.** Perfect CC chain.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
bai-qi.tips:
# Bai Qi Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. S1: Always Hold to Charge

Tap S1 = base damage + healing. **Hold S1 to full charge = 3× damage + 3× healing.** Always charge S1 in teamfights and lane trades. The difference is enormous.

### 2. Fight Inside Crowds (More Hits = More Free S1s)

S1 passive: 20% chance to auto-cast on taking damage. The more enemies/minions hitting you, the more free S1s you get. **Always fight near minion waves or in the middle of enemy teams.**

### 3. S3 → S2: The Perfect CC Chain

S3 Taunts enemies. While they're Taunted: **place S2 at their feet.** When Taunt ends, S2's delay finishes and **pulls them right back.** They never escape.

### 4. Max Energy = +80% Healing

At full Shadow Energy, Bai Qi receives **+80% healing.** S1 charged heals, Eternal Night burst-heal, Blood Rage shield, and even Heal summoner spell are massively amplified. Build Energy before expecting big heals.

### 5. Stack HP — Taunt Duration Scales With It

S3's Taunt duration: every 1000 Bonus HP = +0.2s (max 2.5s). Every HP item is a CC item. Rush high-HP items to maximize your teamfight control.

---

## Signature Combos

### Perfect Engage: **S3 → S2 → S1 (hold) → AA**

1. S3 jump + Taunt the enemy carry (AoE)
2. S2 at their feet during Taunt
3. S1 charge to max → release right as S2 pulls them back
4. AA → they're dead before they regain control

### Lane Trade: **S2 → S1 (charge) → AA**

1. S2 predicts their retreat path (or just zone)
2. S1 full charge through minion wave + enemy
3. Minions hitting you = more free S1 procs = more healing

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Blood Rage shield scales with HP.** At max Energy (+80% healing), Blood Rage's shield is massive — effectively a second health bar.
- **S3 + Flash extends range.** Flash during S3 to surprise-taunt the backline.
- **Matchup:** God-tier as engage tank. Struggles vs True Damage (Lu Bu) that ignores your HP stacking.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

biron.overview:
# Biron（狂鐵） — Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter (Lane Bully / Shield Brawler)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 戰車意志 (Chariot's Will)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 狂铁)

> Biron (Kuang Tie in CN) is a dominant lane bully with insane burst and terrifying sustain. His core mechanic is **Energy** — at 30+ Energy, all abilities become Enhanced (double damage, double heal, knockup, massive shield). Enhanced abilities **don't consume Energy.** With Energy, he's the "Lightning King." Without it, he's mediocre.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Energy Charging

Hitting anything (Minions, Monsters, Heroes) builds Energy. At **30+ Energy (1 bar)**: all abilities gain Enhanced effects. Enhanced abilities are stronger but **don't consume Energy.** Energy decays when out of combat — pre-stack to 60+ before rotating.

### S1: Lifesteal God

Enhanced S1 restores **massive HP**, scaling with **number of targets hit.** Minion wave + enemy Hero = full HP restore. Never retreat at low HP — Enhanced S1 into a wave refills instantly.

### S2: Hold the Knockup

Enhanced S2's next AA becomes a **knockup** that can be **held for several seconds.** Pre-cast S2 → hold enhanced AA → Flash → surprise knockup from off-screen.

### S3: Massive Shield + Steal MS

Enhanced S3 grants a massive shield, AoE damage, and **steals enemy Movement Speed.** Extremely short cooldown late game — don't hold it, spam it.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
biron.tips:
# Biron Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Energy Is Everything

30+ Energy = Enhanced skills. Below 30 = weak. Energy decays out of combat. Before rotating: farm minions/jungle camps to **60+ Energy (2 bars).** Enter every fight with Energy ready.

### 2. S2 + Flash: Signature Long-Range Engage

Enhanced S2's knockup AA can be **held for several seconds.** Pre-cast S2 → hold enhanced AA → walk → **Flash** onto the enemy backline → AA knockup. Undodgeable off-screen initiation.

### 3. S1: More Targets = More Healing

Enhanced S1 heals per target hit. When low HP: position so S1 hits the **entire minion wave + enemy Hero.** Go from 10% to 100% HP in one cast. Never retreat with S1 available.

### 4. Level 1-2 Absolute Dominance

Start S1. AA the first wave to build Energy. At level 2 with Energy active: S2 knockup → Enhanced S1 → enemy is dead or forced to recall. 80% of CN server First Bloods happen exactly this way.

### 5. S3: Don't Hold It

S3's cooldown is extremely short (a few seconds late game). Use it to: tank initial burst, steal enemy MS, shield right before CC lands.

---

## Signature Combos

### Lane Trade: **S2 → AA (knockup) → S1 → S3**

1. Energy ≥ 30. S2 → Enhanced AA knockup
2. S1 point-blank (max damage + heal)
3. S3 shield + damage → enemy dead or forced out

### Bush Ambush One-Shot: **S3 → S1 → S2 → AA**

1. Wait in bush with Energy
2. S3 → S1 (burst + max Energy)
3. S2 chase + Enhanced AA knockup
4. Dead before they can Flash

### Long-Range Backline Delete: **S2 → Flash → AA → S3 → S1**

1. S2 dash → **Flash** mid-dash onto enemy ADC/Mage
2. Enhanced AA knockup
3. S3 shield + damage
4. S1 execute

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Level 1-2 is your absolute peak.** Buy Iron Sword, rush wave, build Energy, get First Blood.
- **Energy decays when out of combat.** Don't AFK between fights — keep hitting things.
- **Matchup:** Destroys melee Fighters in lane. Struggles vs long-range kiters (Mi Yue, Marco).

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

butterfly.overview:
# Butterfly（阿軻） — Assassin

## Overview

- **Role:** Assassin (Reset / Cleanup)
- **Lane:** Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 暗夜貓妖 (Shadow Cat Demon)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 阿轲; also known as Ake)

> Butterfly is the purest cleanup Assassin. **Backstab attacks ALWAYS crit.** Kill or assist = **ALL cooldowns instantly reset.** She doesn't initiate — she waits at the edge of fights, then chain-kills the entire enemy team with repeated S3→S2→S1 resets.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Backstab = Guaranteed Crit

All damage from behind (AAs, abilities) ALWAYS crits. Front attacks NEVER crit. Always position behind enemies — use S2 to dash through them, or attack when they're fleeing.

### Crit Rate → Crit Damage Conversion

Butterfly's base Crit Damage is 125% (others: 200%). But **every 1% Crit Rate = +0.5% Crit Damage.** Stacking Crit Rate items/runes directly boosts her backstab damage.

### Kill/Assist = Full Reset

Scoring a kill or assist **resets ALL cooldowns.** Chain: S3 → kill → S3 → kill → S3. This is how Butterfly wipes teams.

### S2: Dash Through → Auto-Backstab

S2 dashes through enemies. Land behind them = guaranteed backstab on your next AA/ability. Always S2 through, never S2 short.

### S3: Stealth Engage + Warning

S3 grants 3s stealth + MS. But **enemies see a red flash indicator** when you're near. Approach from unexpected angles or when they're distracted.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
butterfly.tips:
# Butterfly Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Always Attack from Behind

Backstab = **guaranteed crit.** Front attack = **zero crit.** Always S2 through enemies, or wait for them to flee before attacking. Position is everything.

### 2. Cleanup Only — Never Initiate

Butterfly is pure glass. If you engage first, you die instantly. Wait at the edge of fights. When the first enemy drops low: **S3 → S2 through → AA → S1 → kill → S3 → next target.** Patience is your best weapon.

### 3. S2 = Auto-Backstab

S2 dashes through enemies. Land behind them = instant backstab position. Never dash short — always go THROUGH.

### 4. Kill/Assist = Full Reset

One kill = all cooldowns back. Immediately **S3 (stealth) → find next low-HP target → S2 → kill → repeat.** Chain-reset is how Butterfly pentakills.

### 5. S3 Approach: Angle, Not Straight

Enemies see the red flash indicator when you're near in stealth. Don't approach from the front — come from side lanes, jungle paths, or when they're busy fighting your team.

---

## Signature Combos

### Single Target Delete: **S3 → S2 → AA → S1 → AA**

1. S3 stealth → approach from behind/side
2. S2 dash through enemy (auto-backstab position)
3. AA (guaranteed crit)
4. S1 (can hit twice on backstab)
5. AA finish

### Teamfight Chain Reset: **S3 → kill → S3 → kill → S3 → kill**

1. Wait at edge — enemy drops low
2. S3 → S2 → kill → **all cooldowns reset**
3. Immediately S3 again → find next low target → repeat
4. Clean up the entire enemy team

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Crit Rate runes/items = more Crit Damage for Butterfly.** 1% Crit Rate = 0.5% Crit Damage. Stack Peerless + Infinity Edge.
- **Don't waste S3 on full-HP enemies.** You need the reset from a kill. Target the lowest HP enemy first.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs squishy teams with poor peel. Struggles vs tanky CC-heavy comps.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

cai-yan.overview:
# Cai Yan（蔡文姬） — Support

## Overview

- **Role:** Support (Pure Healer)
- **Lane:** Roaming
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 天籟絃音 (Heavenly Strings)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 蔡文姬; nickname: "Nanny")

> Cai Yan is a strategically vital pure-healing Support. Her entire kit scales with **Magic Attack** — more AP = bigger heals. Her signature S2 "Bounce Music" stuns enemies by ricocheting between them, and her S3 provides massive single-target healing + dual-defense buffs. She's the ultimate babysitter for hyper-carries.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Damage = Speed + Heal

When Cai Yan takes damage, she gains **+70% Movement Speed and HP regen for 1 second** (10s cooldown). Intentionally let jungle monsters or minions hit you to trigger this for faster rotations.

### S2: Bounce Music (Signature CC)

Fires a sound wave that bounces between enemies (Minions, Monsters, Heroes), **stunning on each bounce** (max 2 bounces per target). Never aim directly at mobile Heroes — **aim at tanks or minion waves** instead. The ricochet will auto-target the backline.

### S3: Don't Wait for Low HP

S3 provides massive single-target healing AND **huge Physical + Magic Defense buffs**. When an Assassin dives your carry, cast S3 immediately — **even if they're at full HP.** The defense buff negates the enemy's burst window.

### S1: Group Heal + Speed

AoE healing + **+20% Movement Speed** to nearby allies. Use constantly in teamfights.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

**Countered by:** Sanction Blade (制裁之刃) and Nightmare Fang (梦魇之牙) — Grievous Wounds cuts healing by 50%. When you see the purple broken-heart icon on allies, kite and heal after the debuff expires.
*Waiting for community input…*
cai-yan.tips:
# Cai Yan Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. S2: Never Aim Directly at Mobile Heroes

S2 bounces between enemies. Direct shots at mobile targets miss. Instead: **aim at the enemy tank or an approaching minion wave.** The bounce auto-targets squishies behind them. This is the #1 Cai Yan skill gap.

### 2. S3: Cast When Carry Is Full HP (Not When Low)

S3 grants massive **Physical + Magic Defense buffs** on top of healing. When an Assassin (Jing, Lanling Wang, Nakoruru) dives your ADC, **cast S3 immediately even if they're at 100% HP.** The defense buff absorbs all the burst. Waiting until they're low means they might die before the heal ticks.

### 3. Passive: Trigger It Intentionally

Taking damage grants **+70% MS + HP regen for 1s** (10s CD). When rotating or escaping, let a jungle monster or minion hit you once — the speed boost is huge.

### 4. AP Scaling = Bigger Heals

Cai Yan's heals scale massively with Magic Attack. A Savant's Wrath makes your S1+S3 nearly double in healing power. Don't build pure tank — you need AP.

### 5. Anti-Heal Awareness (Crucial)

When enemies buy **Sanction Blade (制裁之刃)** or **Nightmare Fang (梦魇之牙)**, your healing is **cut by 50%**. Look for the purple broken-heart icon on allies. When you see it:
- **Kite and stall** — don't burn S1/S3 during Grievous Wounds
- Wait the ~3 seconds for the debuff to expire
- **Then burst-heal** your team back to full

---

## Signature Combo

### Teamfight Cycle: **S2 → S1 → S3**

1. **S2** at enemy tank/minion wave → ricochet stun the backline
2. **S1** AoE heal + speed boost your team
3. **S3** on your carry when the enemy Assassin engages (defense buff + massive heal)

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S1 grants 20% MS.** Use it to help your team chase or disengage, not just for healing.
- **S2 max bounces = 2 per target.** Position so the wave passes through as many enemies as possible.
- **Matchup:** God-tier with hyper-carries. Struggles vs anti-heal itemization.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

cang.overview:
# Cang（蒼） — Marksman

## Overview

- **Role:** Marksman (Fighter / Jungler Hybrid)
- **Lane:** Farm Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 蒼狼末裔 (Descendant of the Wolf)
- **Region:** CN server exclusive (苍)

> Cang is a dominant hybrid Fighter-Marksman built around **Rage control, AoE execute, and armor-shred engages.** His S3 grants Unstoppable + massive %DR during activation, making him deceptively tanky during dives. He excels at cleanup and sustained brawling in teamfights.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Rage Mechanic

AAs and abilities build Rage. At full Rage: next AA becomes an **enhanced long-range strike** with bonus damage + dash + heal. Never break the AA rhythm — the enhanced AA is your biggest damage spike.

### S3: Unstoppable + %DR (Face-Tank Everything)

S3 activation grants **Unstoppable + high %DR for several seconds.** When the enemy Assassin dives you or CC flies at you: S3 their face. You'll eat the burst and counter-kill.

### Minion/Monster = Springboard

S1/S2 can use minions and monsters as "stepping stones" for second-phase dashes. Gap-close by dashing to a minion first, then enhanced AA onto the enemy behind it.

### S2: Kite Tool

S2 slows enemies and creates distance. Against melee stat-checkers (Fuzi, Dian Wei): S2 kite → wait for S1 cooldown → re-engage. Never stand and trade.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
cang.tips:
# Cang Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Don't Break the AA Rhythm (Rage Stacking)

Rage builds from AAs and abilities. At full Rage: enhanced AA with bonus damage + dash + heal. Always maintain AA rhythm between abilities — breaking the chain resets Rage buildup.

### 2. S3: Face-Tank, Not Flee

S3 grants Unstoppable + massive %DR for several seconds. When an Assassin dives you: **S3 immediately.** The DR makes you nearly unkillable. Combined with Pure Sky's active DR, you can reach 60%+ total DR.

### 3. Minion/Monster = Gap-Close Springboard

S1/S2 can use minions and monsters as dash targets. If the enemy is far: dash to a nearby minion first → enhanced AA lunges onto the enemy behind it. Two-phase gap-close.

### 4. S2: Kite Melee Stat-Checkers

Fuzi, Dian Wei, and other melee monsters out-stat you in melee range. Use S2 to slow them and create distance. Wait for S1 cooldown. Re-engage when you have abilities up. Never trade AAs with a stat-checker.

### 5. Pure Sky + S3 = Near-Immune

S3's %DR + Pure Sky active (35%) = up to **60%+ total DR.** Pop both when diving the backline. You'll tank everything and walk out.

---

## Signature Combos

### Long-Range Engage: **S2 → AA (enhanced) → S1 → S3 → AA**

1. S2 slow from range
2. Enhanced AA dash onto target
3. S1 CC + damage
4. S3 (Unstoppable + DR + AoE)
5. AA finish

### Counter-Engage: **S3 → S1 → AA → S2 → AA**

1. Enemy dives → S3 face-tank (DR + Unstoppable)
2. S1 knockup + damage
3. Enhanced AA
4. S2 kite away or chase
5. AA finish

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3 can be cast while CC'd** (if it has a cleanse mechanic). Check patch notes.
- **Enhanced AA has a dash component.** Use to cross thin walls by targeting jungle camps on the other side.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs burst-reliant Assassins (DR negates their combo). Struggles vs sustained True Damage.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

cao-cao.overview:
# Cao Cao（曹操） — Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter (Lifesteal Bruiser / Jungler)
- **Lane:** Jungle / Clash Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 鮮血梟雄 (Blood Warlord)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 曹操)

> Cao Cao's recent rework added a **Sword Aura (剑气) mechanic**: abilities charge his weapon, and enhanced AAs shoot ranged sword beams (up to 3 consecutive slashes). This transformed him from a short-range melee into a mid-range skirmisher. His S3 is one of the best turnaround skills in the game — **on activation, cleanses all CC, heals based on missing HP, and every subsequent hit drains massive life.**

---

## Core Mechanics

### Sword Aura (Post-Rework)

Every ability charges a sword aura. Enhanced AAs have **longer range + faster speed.** Always weave AAs between abilities — never dump all skills at once.

### S3: The Turnaround God

S3 **instantly cleanses all CC** and heals based on missing HP. For the duration, ALL damage dealt to enemies converts to HP recovery. **Never cast S3 at full HP** — save it for when you're CC'd and low. The enemy thinks you're dead → S3 → full HP in 2 seconds.

### S1: Triple Dash (Third = Knockup)

S1 has 3 dashes. First two: movement + damage. **Third dash: knockup.** Pre-cast the first two from a bush or while rotating, then use the third with Flash for surprise long-range initiation.

### S2: Slow + AA CD Reduction

S2 fires a ranged slowing wave. **Each AA reduces S2 cooldown by 1 second.** S2 → AA spam → S2 again in the same trade.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
cao-cao.tips:
# Cao Cao Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. S3: Never Cast at Full HP

S3 cleanses CC + heals based on **missing HP.** The lower you are, the bigger the heal. Save S3 for when you're CC'd and about to die. The enemy commits everything → S3 → you're at full HP and they have no cooldowns. This is Cao Cao's entire identity.

### 2. Weave AAs Between Abilities

Sword Aura enhanced AAs are fast and long-range. Never dump all skills at once: **S1 → AA → S1 → AA → S2 → AA → S1 → AA.** Missing the AAs means missing 40% of your damage.

### 3. S1 Pre-Cast for Surprise Knockup

S1 has 3 dashes. The third one knocks up. Pre-cast the first two from a bush or while rotating, then **the third dash + Flash** directly onto the enemy backline. Surprise knockup from a screen away.

### 4. S2 AA CD Reduction

S2's cooldown is reduced by **1 second per AA hit.** In extended fights: S2 → AA spam → S2 again. You can cast S2 twice in one trade if you keep auto-attacking.

### 5. Tenacity Stacking

Cao Cao's S3 grants bonus Tenacity. With Resistance Boots, he **approaches the Tenacity cap** — CC from Wang Zhaojun, Mozi, etc. lasts a fraction of a second. He walks through control like a terminator.

---

## Signature Combos

### Bush Ambush: **S1 (pre-cast 2) → S1 (knockup) → AA → S2 → AA → S1 → AA**

1. Pre-cast 2 S1 dashes from bush
2. Third S1 knocks up the enemy
3. AA → S2 slow → AA
4. S1 (cooldown reset from AAs) → AA
5. S3 saved for when they try to burst back

### Low-HP God Mode: **S3 → AA → S1 → AA → S2 → AA → S1 → AA**

1. Enemy dumps everything, you're at 10% HP and CC'd
2. **S3** (cleanse + big heal)
3. AA → S1 dash → AA → S2 → AA → S1 → AA
4. You're now at 80% HP, they're dead

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Phoenix Eye (不死鸟之眼) is Cao Cao's signature magic resist item.** Its passive amplifies healing at low HP — stacks with S3 for "medical miracle" levels of sustain.
- **S3's heal scales with damage dealt.** The more aggressive you play during S3, the more HP you recover.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs CC-heavy comps (S3 cleanse + Tenacity). Struggles vs burst that kills before S3 activates.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
cao-cao.build:

change.overview:
# Chang'E（嫦娥） — Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Mage (Mana Tank / Burst)
- **Lane:** Mid Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 寒月公主 (Moon Princess)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 嫦娥)

> Chang'E is a uniquely designed Mana-Tank Mage. Her core mechanic is **Mana-as-Health**: 60% of damage taken is absorbed by Mana instead of HP. More Mana = more damage + more tankiness. At full Mana she's nearly unkillable; at zero Mana she's the squishiest hero in the game.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Mana Shield (Blue = HP)

Chang'E converts **60% of incoming damage to Mana loss**. At full Mana, she has the strongest effective HP in the game. At zero Mana, she's paper. **Never fight with low Mana.**

### S2: Mana Drain + Recovery (Core)

S2 summons two Mana Vortices dealing continuous damage. **Hitting enemies (especially Minions and Jungle Monsters) drains their Mana and restores Chang'E's.** Against manaless heroes (Marco, Musashi), the drain is doubled!

### Recall → Fly Back (Return-to-Lane)

Chang'E's unique recall skill lets her **teleport back to her recall point** within a time window. Best lane sustain and tempo in the game.

### Jungle Chang'E

Currently preferred over Mid Lane in CN server. Insane clear speed (can solo two camps at level 1). Blue Buff = permanent full Mana = permanent invincibility. Aggressive early invader.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

**Hard counter: Garo (伽罗).** Garo's basic attacks deal double crit damage to shielded targets — instantly deletes Chang'E's Mana bar. If the enemy picks Garo, avoid picking Chang'E.

*Waiting for community input…*
change.tips:
# Chang'E Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Full Mana = Invincible, Empty Mana = Dead

Chang'E converts 60% of damage to Mana. At full Mana, she's absurdly tanky. At zero Mana, she dies to a sneeze. **Never engage below 50% Mana.**

### 2. S2 Mana Drain: Your Engine

S2's Mana Vortices drain Mana from enemies and restore Chang'E's. Prioritize Minion waves and Jungle Monsters as "Mana batteries." Against manaless heroes, the drain is **doubled** — Chang'E hard-counters energy-based champions.

### 3. Recall → Fly Back

Chang'E's unique recall ability lets her teleport back to lane within a time window. Use it to base for Mana mid-fight and return instantly. Best tempo hero in the game.

### 4. Jungle Chang'E (Preferred Role)

CN server now prefers Chang'E as a **Jungler**:
- Level 1: solo two camps simultaneously
- Blue Buff = permanent full Mana = permanent max damage + tankiness
- Aggressive early invader — few junglers can duel a full-Mana Chang'E

### 5. Skill Priority

**Max S2 first, then S1. Take ultimate whenever available.** S2 is core damage and Mana sustain. S1 is a long-range snare — use from bushes for guaranteed hits.

---

## Signature Combos

### Bush Ambush One-Shot: **S1 → S2 → S3**

1. S1 snare from bush (point-blank = undodgeable)
2. S2 Mana Vortex at enemy's feet for drain + damage
3. S3 ultimate — unload full Mana barrage → instant deletion of squishies

### Melee Brawl: **S2 → AA → S1 → S3**

1. Drop S2 at your feet vs diving Fighter
2. Enhanced AA slow
3. Point-blank S1 (guaranteed snare)
4. S3 ultimate at close range for maximum damage
5. **Caution:** S3 drains Mana rapidly. Stop firing if you can't secure the kill.

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S1 from bushes only:** S1 has a slow projectile — skilled players dodge it easily. Cast from fog of war for guaranteed hits.
- **Blue Buff is mandatory:** Never give Blue Buff to your Mid Laner as Jungle Chang'E. You need it more than anyone.
- **Garo is your hard counter:** Garo's passive deals double crit damage to shielded targets. Chang'E's Mana bar gets deleted instantly. If enemy picks Garo, swap heroes.
- **Matchup:** Destroys energy-based and manaless champions. Struggles vs long-range poke that chips Mana from safety (Gan & Mo).

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
change.build:
# Chang'E Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Mana = damage + tankiness. Stack **Max Mana and Magic Penetration**. No traditional tank items needed — your Mana bar IS your tank item. CN server consensus: **Mana-stacking burst Mage**.

---

## Recommended Mid / Jungle Build

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Rune Greatsword (符文大剑)** or **Evolution Crystal (进化水晶)** | Jungle: Blue jungle knife for Mana sustain. Mid: Evolution Crystal for early laning — sell later. |
| 2 | **Arcane Boots (秘法之靴)** | Magic Penetration + Mana regen. Mana regen = HP regen for Chang'E. Core boots. |
| 3 | **Prophet's Hour (时之预言)** | **Chang'E's #1 core item!** Massive HP + Mana. Passive converts Magic Attack to Physical & Magic Defense 1:1 — transforms Chang'E into a genuine Mana Tank. |
| 4 | **Spellblade Staff (巫术法杖)** | Chang'E casts abilities constantly. Spellblade's enhanced AA after casting massively boosts burst and tower-pushing speed. |
| 5 | **Savant's Wrath (博学者之怒)** | Percentage Magic Attack steroid. Indirectly amplifies both damage AND tankiness (via Prophet's Hour conversion). |
| 6 | **Void Staff (虚无法杖)** or **Sunset Flow (日暮之流)** | Penetration vs Magic Cloak. **Flex alternative: Ardent Dominator (炽热支配者)** — Mana + auto-cleanse shield at low HP, perfect synergy with Chang'E's kit. |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

Zero CDR needed. Core stats: **Magic Penetration, Movement Speed (Chang'E has the slowest base MS at 350), initial Magic Attack.**

### Setup 1: CN Server "88-Pen Hunt Speed" (Standard)

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |
|------|------|-----|----------------|
| 🔴 Red | Nightmare (梦魇) | ×10 | Magic Attack +4.2, Magic Pen +2.4 |
| 🟢 Green | Mind's Eye (心眼) | ×10 | Attack Speed +0.6%, Magic Penetration +6.4 |
| 🔵 Blue | Hunt (狩猎) | ×10 | Attack Speed +1%, Move Speed +1% |

**Total:** +42 Magic Attack, **+88 Magic Penetration**, +16% Attack Speed, **+10% Movement Speed**. Mandatory 10× Hunt to compensate for Chang'E's 350 base MS (slowest in the game).

### Setup 2: "Sustain Lane" (Mid Lane vs Poke)

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |
|------|------|-----|----------------|

## Critical Warning: Garo

Garo's passive deals **double crit damage to shielded targets**. Chang'E's entire Mana bar counts as a shield — Garo deletes it instantly. If the enemy picks Garo, **do not pick Chang'E**. If already locked in, focus Garo first in every teamfight.

charlotte.overview:
# Charlotte（夏洛特） — Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter (Skirmisher / Lane Bully)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 玫瑰劍士 (Rose Swordsman)
- **Region:** Global (SNK crossover; CN server name: 夏洛特)

> Charlotte is an SNK-crossover lane-dominant Fighter. She relies on chaining abilities to empower her basic attacks, culminating in her signature burst: **Seven-Star Radiant Sword (七星光芒剑)**. Her "Follow-Up Skill" mechanic turns consecutive casts into enhanced green variants, building stacks toward a locked-on execute strike. With built-in Attack Speed reduction, damage immunity frames, and relentless gap-close, she bullies auto-attackers and duels with impunity.

---

## Passive & Core Mechanics

### Follow-Up Skills & Seven-Star Radiant Sword
After any ability hits an enemy, other abilities transform into **green "Follow-Up" variants** with bonus effects. Landing three abilities or follow-ups stacks 3 marks, granting a **Seven-Star Radiant Sword** — an empowered basic attack with locked-on execute damage, 35% Damage Reduction, and Unstoppable.

### Attack Speed Cripple
Follow-Up Skills and Seven-Star Radiant Sword apply **Cripple** stacks on hit, each reducing enemy Attack Speed by **7%~15%** (max 7 stacks).

### Damage Immunity Windows
- Seven-Star Radiant Sword: **35% DR + Unstoppable**
- Ultimate (S3): **35% DR + Unstoppable**
- Stack with Pure Sky active for up to **70% DR**

### Abilities
- **Ability 1 (S1):** Ranged thrust. Must hit a target to enable Follow-Up chains.
- **Ability 2 (S2):** Dash + damage + healing. Max this first.
- **Ultimate (S3):** AoE knockup + 35% DR + Unstoppable.

---

## Recommended Build
See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

charlotte.tips:
# Charlotte Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Follow-Up Skill System
After any ability hits an enemy, other abilities become **green "Follow-Up" variants**. Hitting three abilities/follow-ups grants 3 marks, unlocking **Seven-Star Radiant Sword** with execute damage, 35% DR, and Unstoppable.

### 2. Attack Speed Cripple
Follow-Up Skills and Seven-Star Radiant Sword apply **Cripple** stacks: 7%~15% Attack Speed reduction per stack (max 7). Late-game, completely disables auto-attack carries.

### 3. Damage Immunity Stacking
Combine Seven-Star (35% DR) + Ultimate (35% DR) + Pure Sky active (35% DR) for up to **~70% Damage Reduction**.

### 4. Pre-Stack Before Fighting
Whiff S1 or S2 into empty air to pre-stack 1-2 green marks. When the fight starts, you're only 1 ability away from Seven-Star Radiant Sword.

### 5. S1 Is Your Combo Engine
S1 must hit a target to grant movement speed and unlock Follow-Up chains. Always ensure S1 connects.

### 6. Skill Priority
**Max S2 first, then S1.** S2 is core mobility, damage, healing, and passive-stacking.

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard Double Seven-Star: S1→S2→S3→AA→S1→S2→AA
Pre-stack marks. S1 to open. S2 dash in. S3 knockup + DR. Seven-Star proc. S1→S2 again. Second Seven-Star.

### Long-Range Initiation: S1→Flash→S2→S3→AA
S1 hits distant target. Flash to close gap. S2 into backline. S3 knockup. Seven-Star execute.

---

## Advanced Tips
- **CDR is everything:** Must reach 40% CDR to chain abilities seamlessly.
- **Turret diving:** Seven-Star's 35% DR lets you tank 1-2 turret shots.
- **Teamfight role:** Wait for tank engage, then dive backline during chaos.
- **Matchup:** Destroys auto-attack duelists. Struggles vs burst mages with CC.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

cheng-yaojin.overview:
# Cheng Yaojin（程咬金） — Tank / Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Tank / Fighter (Immortal Split-Pusher)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 熱血神將 (Fervent General)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 程咬金)

> Cheng Yaojin is the classic "unkillable" split-push Tank. His passive grants massive Physical Attack at low HP (up to a free Siege Breaker's worth). His S3 restores huge chunks of HP. His entire game plan: push side lanes, invade enemy jungle, proxy minion waves, and force 2-3 enemies to chase him — creating 4v3 advantages for his team.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Low HP = High Damage

Gains Physical Attack per 1% HP lost. At ~20-30% HP, he has the equivalent of a free Siege Breaker. **Never fight at full HP.** Keep HP at 30-40% for maximum damage output.

### S3: Don't Panic-Cast

Ideal S3 timing: **HP at 20-30% AND enemy burst abilities are on cooldown.** If you have Grievous Wounds (Sanction Blade / Nightmare Fang icon), wait for it to expire or create distance, then S3.

### S1: Save for Escape

S1 is his only mobility. **AA reduces S1 cooldown by 1 second per hit.** When being chased: AA minions/enemies while walking → S1 cooldown refreshes → jump over a wall to escape.

### Split-Push Is Your Entire Identity

Don't play 5v5 teamfights. Your job: push the farthest lane, proxy waves behind towers, invade enemy jungle. Force 2-3 enemies to deal with you. When they come: S1 away or S3 tank through it. Your team gets free objectives.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

Countered by: Grievous Wounds (Sanction Blade, Nightmare Fang). Wait for the debuff to expire before S3.
*Waiting for community input…*
cheng-yaojin.tips:
# Cheng Yaojin Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Keep HP at 30-40% — Never Full

Passive grants massive Physical Attack at low HP. At 30% HP, you effectively have a free Siege Breaker. **Never trade at full HP** — you're half as strong. Intentionally take some damage before engaging.

### 2. S3 Timing: Wait for the Right Moment

Ideal S3: HP at 20-30%, enemy burst is on cooldown, and you DON'T have the Grievous Wounds icon. If you see the purple broken-heart (anti-heal), wait for it to expire or create distance, THEN S3.

### 3. Proxy Waves Behind Enemy Towers

Mid-late game: S1 into the space between enemy T2 and T3 towers. Kill the incoming minion wave BEFORE it reaches your team's push. The enemy team can't siege without minions. This single tactic wins games.

### 4. AA to Refresh S1

S1 cooldown is reduced by 1 second per AA hit. When escaping: **AA minions/jungle camps while running.** S1 refreshes mid-chase → jump over a wall → safe. Never just run — always AA something while fleeing.

### 5. Draw 2-3 Enemies, Then Your Team Wins

Your entire macro purpose: push the farthest lane from the current objective. When 2-3 enemies come to stop you: **you've already won.** Your team now has a 4v2 or 4v3 advantage. Don't feel pressured to escape — sometimes dying slowly is a win if your team takes Baron.

---

## Core Trading Pattern

### **S2 → AA → S1 → AA**

1. S2 spin (two hits) + AA
2. Enemy tries to disengage → S1 jump + slow
3. Continue AA (each hit reduces S1 CD)
4. S3 saved for when you're low

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Grievous Wounds is your #1 counter.** Sanction Blade and Nightmare Fang cut healing by 50%. If enemies build these, wait for the debuff to expire before S3.
- **You scale harder than most Fighters late-game.** The longer the game goes, the harder you are to kill.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs teams without anti-heal. Struggles when enemies rush Sanction Blade + Nightmare Fang early.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

chicha.overview:
# Chicha（蚩奼） — Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter (Magic Assassin / Skirmisher)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Jungle / Mid Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 五兵之主 (Master of Five Weapons)
- **Region:** CN server (蚩奼)

> Chicha is a mysterious Miaojiang-inspired Magic Assassin/Fighter. Her kit revolves around stacking **Gu Poison marks** on enemies via S1 and AAs, then detonating them with S2 or S3 for devastating burst. Her S3 is a dive tool with untargetability/DR, letting her bypass enemy frontlines and delete squishies.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Gu Poison Marks: Stack Then Detonate

S1 and AAs apply Gu marks (stackable). The more marks, the higher the detonation damage from S2/S3 — scaling to **%Max HP Magic Damage** at high stacks.

### S3: Untargetable/DR Dive

S3 grants brief untargetability or high DR, then Chicha slams down in a target area for massive AoE Magic burst. Use to: dodge enemy CC/ultimates, bypass frontline to reach backline, or escape collapse situations.

### S2: Mobility + Disengage

S2 typically includes a dash, cleanse, or shield. **Don't burn S2 purely for damage.** It's your only escape tool. Save it for: retreating after a failed assassination, cleansing CC mid-fight, or gap-closing for the kill.

### Minion/Jungle Bouncing

S1 can pierce or bounce through minions and monsters. Use waves as springboards — mark the front minion, the effect travels to the enemy behind them.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
chicha.tips:
# Chicha Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Stack Marks Before Detonating

S1 and AAs apply Gu marks. **Never detonate at 1-2 marks.** Stack to max (usually 4-5) with S1 → AA weave, then S2/S3 for maximum %HP Magic Damage.

### 2. S3: Offensive Dive AND Defensive Dodge

S3 grants brief untargetability/DR. Use it:
- **Offensive:** S3 onto the enemy backline to bypass tanks
- **Defensive:** S3 to dodge Musashi S3, Zhuge Liang S3, or tower shots
- **Escape:** S3 away when collapsed on

### 3. S2: Save for Disengage

S2 is mobility/cleanse/shield. Don't burn it for poke damage. Save it for: retreating after S3 dive, cleansing CC, or chasing the last hit.

### 4. Minion Wave = Free Marks

S1 pierces/bounces through minions. Mark the front minion → the effect reaches the enemy behind. Free, safe mark stacking.

### 5. S3 + Splendor (Stasis) Cycle

S3 in → full combo → Splendor (Stasis) → S2 cooldown refreshes → S2 out. The classic Assassin in-and-out cycle.

---

## Signature Combos

### Long-Range Solo Kill: **S1 → AA → S1 → AA → S3 → S2**

1. S1 mark + AA (2-3 marks)
2. S1 again + AA (4-5 marks)
3. S3 dive (detonate all marks + AoE burst)
4. S2 to finish or escape

### Teamfight Backline Delete: **S2 → S1 → AA → S3 → S1**

1. S2 dash to flank angle
2. S1 mark the backline carry + AA
3. S3 dive (untargetability through enemy CC)
4. S1 again (marks refreshed)

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Mark duration is generous.** You can stack on one target, then switch to another before detonating.
- **S3 landing zone can be aimed during the channel.** Track enemy movement.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs immobile squishies. Struggles vs instant point-and-click CC (Donghuang, Liang).

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
