ma-chao.overview:
# Ma Chao（馬超） — Assassin / Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Assassin / Fighter (Carry Skirmisher)
- **Lane:** Jungle / Clash Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★★☆
- **Title:** 冷暉之槍 (Spear of Cold Dawn)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 马超)

> Ma Chao is an extremely high-ceiling carry Fighter/Assassin. His core mechanics revolve around **Spear Throwing & Retrieving** — his empowered dash-attack damage scales directly with **Movement Speed**. Every point of Movement Speed is a damage amplifier.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Movement Speed = Damage

Each ability cast increases Movement Speed (stacks up to 3 times). Ma Chao's empowered basic attack damage scales with his **total Movement Speed**. Any item, buff, or summoner spell that grants MS is a direct damage boost.

### Empowered Dash-Attack

Picking up a thrown Coldlight Spear grants an empowered basic attack — a **dash toward the joystick direction**. Hitting enemies with the dash **restores HP and reduces all ability cooldowns by 1 second**.

### Ultimate: Ten Thousand Spears (S3)

S3 recalls all thrown spears from the ground. Flying spears damage enemies in their path and deal **bonus damage based on target's missing Health (execute)**.

### "Hold a Spear" Principle

Never be spear-less. Before ganking, teamfighting, or trading, throw a spear at your feet (S1 or S2), pick it up, and hold the empowered attack. One in hand + one ready on the ground = continuous dashing.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
ma-chao.tips:
# Ma Chao Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Movement Speed = Damage

Every ability cast grants stacking Movement Speed (max 3 stacks). Ma Chao's empowered dash-attack damage scales directly with his total MS. **Anything that gives movement speed is a damage item for Ma Chao.**

### 2. Empowered Dash Mechanics

Pick up a thrown spear → empowered basic attack → **dash in the joystick direction**. This is NOT auto-targeted — you must aim with the left joystick. Dash hits **restore HP and reduce all cooldowns by 1 second.**

### 3. Always Hold a Spear ("存枪")

Never engage without a spear in hand:
- Throw S1 or S2 at your feet
- Pick it up
- Start the fight with one empowered dash ready

### 4. Release the Attack Button, Use Left Joystick Only

The empowered dash goes toward your **left joystick direction**, not toward a locked target. For precise dashes, release the right attack button and aim purely with the left joystick.

### 5. Skill Priority

**Max S2 first, then S1. Take ultimate whenever available.** S2 can be precisely placed at your feet — it's the core tool for instant pickup and fluid kiting.

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard Double Dash: **Hold Spear → AA → S2 → AA**

1. Pre-hold a spear (empowered AA)
2. Dash (AA) toward enemy
3. Mid-dash, throw S2 at your feet or enemy's feet
4. Step forward to pick up → second dash (AA) immediately

### Ultimate Infinite Combo: **Hold Spear → AA → S3 → AA → S3 → AA**

1. Hold spear → dash (AA)
2. Throw spear behind enemy + press S3 (recall)
3. Spear flies back through enemy (execute damage on path)
4. Catch returning spear → dash (AA) again
5. Repeat S3 → AA cycle. As long as your rhythm is clean, infinite dashing.

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Sprint summoner spell is core:** Sprint massively boosts your MS → directly converts to damage. Always take Sprint on lane Ma Chao.
- **Practice the rhythm:** Ma Chao's ceiling is entirely in your dash timing. One missed pickup = combo over.
- **River combat advantage:** Ma Chao's MS scaling makes him extra dangerous near river speed shrines.
- **Matchup:** Destroys immobile backline carries. Struggles vs heavy point-and-click CC (Daji, Zhang Liang).

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
ma-chao.build:
# Ma Chao Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Needs high **CDR** for frequent spear throws, **Movement Speed** (which directly increases damage), and **semi-tank durability**. Full damage builds get deleted. CN server consensus: **MS semi-tank bruiser**.

---

## Recommended Semi-Tank Build

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Greedy Bite (贪婪之噬)** or **Giant's Grip (巨人之握)** | Jungle Ma Chao: Red for burst, Purple for tankiness. Lane Ma Chao: skip jungle item, take Sprint. |
| 2 | **Calm Boots (冷静之靴)** | Early 15% CDR. Ma Chao desperately needs CDR for frequent spear throws. *Late game: swap to Resistance Boots when CDR overflows.* |
| 3 | **Shadow Axe (暗影战斧)** | Core Fighter item: Attack, Penetration, Health, CDR. |
| 4 | **Frost Grip (冰痕之握)** | **Ma Chao's mobility core.** Empowered dashes perfectly trigger Frost Grip's AoE slow, making him impossibly sticky. Also provides CDR and Physical Defense. |
| 5 | **Berserker's Armor (暴烈之甲)** | Taking damage grants up to **+10% Movement Speed and +10% damage**. For Ma Chao, MS = damage. This is an offense+defense hybrid item. |
| 6 | **Doomsday (末世)** or **Star Breaker (碎星锤)** or **Pure Sky (纯净苍穹)** | **Doomsday:** on-hit HP damage vs tanky comps. **Star Breaker:** percentage Penetration. **Pure Sky:** active DR for survival. |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

Core needs: **Physical Penetration, Movement Speed (damage), Attack Speed (smoother dash animations).**

**Total:** +29 Physical Attack, +100 Physical Penetration, +7% Movement Speed, +7% Attack Speed, **+4.8% Physical Lifesteal**. Dash heals + rune lifesteal = near-infinite sustain.

mai-shiranui.overview:
# Mai Shiranui（不知火舞） — Assassin / Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Assassin / Mage (Magic Burst Diver)
- **Lane:** Mid Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★★☆
- **Title:** 明媚烈焰 (Bright Flame)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 不知火舞)

> Mai Shiranui is an extremely high-ceiling, high-burst Magic Assassin. She has some of the best mobility and one-shot potential in the game. After every ability, she can **roll-dash** by pushing the left joystick — giving her unparalleled repositioning. Her S2 fans shred Magic Defense, enabling devastating all-in combos.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Post-Ability Roll-Dash

After every ability cast, push the left joystick to perform a **free roll-dash** with bonus Movement Speed. This is her core mobility — chain abilities + rolls to dance around enemies.

### Passive: Enhanced AA (Ninja Bee)

Every 5 seconds, Mai's next AA becomes a **charging dash that knocks enemies back**. Use to reposition, push enemies into towers, or as an extra gap-closer.

### S2: Fan (Defense Shred)

S2 fan deals high damage at long range AND **reduces the target's Magic Defense + slows them**. **Always land S2 before committing to a full combo** — the defense shred makes all follow-up damage significantly stronger.

### Energy Management

Mai has no Mana — she uses Energy. Abilities cost Energy; hits restore it. Missing two fans in a row or whiffing S3 leaves you **Energy-starved and useless**. When Energy is low, play safe and poke with S2 until you land one.

### S1/S3 + Flash (Blind-Spot Engage)

Both S1 (flying kick) and S3 (forward charge) can be combined with **Flash** to extend range dramatically. S1-Flash or S3-Flash lets you engage from off-screen — the ultimate surprise deletion tool.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
mai-shiranui.tips:
# Mai Shiranui Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Always Land S2 Before Committing

S2 shreds Magic Defense + slows. If S2 misses: **don't go in.** Wait for the cooldown (~2s) and try again. An S2-less engage does 30-40% less damage and the enemy isn't slowed for your follow-up.

### 2. Post-Ability Roll-Dash (Never Stand Still)

After every ability: push the left joystick to roll. This costs zero Energy and grants bonus MS. Constant rolling makes Mai nearly impossible to catch or skillshot.

### 3. S1-Flash / S3-Flash (Off-Screen Engage)

Both S1 and S3 can be **Flash-extended**. Cast the ability, then Flash during the animation — the hitbox extends to your Flash destination. This lets you engage from outside enemy vision range. The #1 high-ELO Mai mechanic.

### 4. Energy Management

Don't spam fans blindly. Two missed S2s = empty Energy = you're a minion. When Energy is below half:
- Play safe
- Poke with S2 until one lands (restores Energy)
- Only then commit to S1/S3

### 5. Passive AA: Free Engage/Disengage

The 5-second enhanced AA is a **charging knockback**. Use to:
- Push enemies into your tower
- Knock Assassins away when they dive you
- Extra gap-close when S1/S3 are on cooldown

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard Delete Combo: **S2 → Roll → S1 → AA → S3 → S2**

1. S2 fan (defense shred + slow)
2. Roll forward
3. S1 flying kick (knockup)
4. Enhanced AA (Ninja Bee — push back)
5. S3 charge (massive AoE burst + knockback)
6. S2 fan again (cooldown refreshed) — finish

### Off-Screen S3-Flash Engage: **S3 + Flash → AA → S1 → S2**

1. S3 from fog of war → **Flash mid-animation**
2. Enemy backline gets AoE knocked back
3. Enhanced AA push
4. S1 knockup chain-CC
5. S2 finish

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3's knockback can push multiple enemies.** Aim to hit 2-3 squishies when they're grouped.
- **Roll-dash through enemies.** The roll can pass through units — use to juke skillshots or reposition behind enemies.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs immobile squishies. Struggles vs point-and-click CC that stops her roll chain.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
mai-shiranui.build:

marco-polo.overview:
# Marco Polo（馬可波羅） — Marksman

## Overview

- **Role:** Marksman (True Damage / Mobile ADC)
- **Lane:** Farm Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★★☆
- **Title:** 遠遊之槍 (Wandering Gun)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 马可波罗)

> Marco Polo is a uniquely designed Marksman. He's one of the only ADCs with **two mobility skills and zero hard CC**. His damage output depends entirely on **Attack Speed thresholds** and his passive **True Damage**. He's the tank-shredder supreme and one of the hardest carries to catch.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: True Damage (Tank Killer)

Hits stack marks. At **10 stacks** (enemy shield icon breaks), subsequent Physical Damage becomes **True Damage** that CAN crit. This is why Marco melts tanks that other ADCs can't touch.

### Attack Speed Thresholds

S1 and S3 **bullet count scales with Attack Speed**. Key thresholds: **0% / 80% / 130% / 180%**. Higher AS = more bullets = exponential damage. Reaching 180% AS is priority #1.

### S2: Built-In Radar (Anti-Gank)

S2's passive: when an enemy Hero is nearby, a **glowing gear circle** appears at Marco's feet, granting bonus damage + MS. This is the best anti-bush-ambush tool in the game. If the circle lights up near a bush, someone's there — S1 the bush or retreat.

### S3: Never Initiate With It

New Marcos die by S2 → S3 into 5 enemies. S3's correct usage:
1. **Stack 10 marks first** (S1 or AAs), THEN S3 in for True Damage carnage
2. **Cleanup:** S3 to finish low-HP survivors
3. **During S3, DON'T touch the left joystick** — it cancels the ultimate. But you CAN Flash, use Pure Sky, or Stun during it.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
marco-polo.tips:
# Marco Polo Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Stack 10 Marks BEFORE S3

Marco's #1 mistake: S2+S3 into enemies at 0 stacks. Correct: **S1 (stack marks) → wait for shield-break icon → S2+S3 in for True Damage.** The difference is 5× the damage.

### 2. S2 Radar = Never Get Ganked

S2's passive: glowing gear circle at your feet = enemy nearby. When approaching any bush:
- Circle lights up? **S1 the bush.** Someone's there.
- Circle stays dark? Safe to pass.
This single mechanic makes Marco nearly ungankable.

### 3. S3: Never Touch Left Joystick

During S3, **moving the left joystick cancels the ultimate instantly.** Keep your left thumb OFF the joystick. You CAN: Flash, activate Pure Sky, or cast Stun during S3.

### 4. Attack Speed Thresholds Are Everything

S1/S3 bullet count scales with AS. Every % matters:
- **80%:** Baseline
- **130%:** Mid-game spike
- **180%:** Maximum bullets — full damage potential
Missing a threshold by even 1% costs multiple bullets.

### 5. Semi-Tank, Not Full Damage

Marco has True Damage. He doesn't need Dawn (破晓). Stack AS to 180%, then build defense. The longer he survives, the more True Damage he outputs.

---

## Signature Combos

### Lane Poke: **S1 → S2 → AA**

1. S1 at max range — stack marks
2. S2 reposition (lateral or forward based on enemy response)
3. AA to finish stacking or maintain pressure

### Perfect Teamfight: **S1 (stack 10) → S2+S3 → Pure Sky → Cleanup**

1. S1 from safe range — stack to 10 marks on priority target
2. Shield-break icon appears (True Damage unlocked)
3. S2 dash in → S3 immediately
4. **Pure Sky during S3** (DR + unstoppable)
5. Enemy team evaporates to True Damage

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S1 reveals stealth.** Sweep bushes or track Lanling Wang/Ake with S1.
- **S2's circle also grants bonus damage + MS.** When it lights up, you're stronger.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs tanky comps (True Damage ignores armor). Struggles vs hyper-mobile divers who CC-cancel S3.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
marco-polo.build:

mayene.overview:
# Mayene（姬小滿） — Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter (Combo Brawler / Four Stances)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★★☆
- **Title:** 武道奇才 (Martial Prodigy)
- **Region:** CN server exclusive (姬小满)

> Mayene is a dominant all-round Fighter with a unique **"combo input" system.** S1 and S2 each have **2 charges.** Pressing two skills in sequence triggers a different combo move — she has **four distinct combo variations** covering burst, %HP damage, displacement, and invulnerability.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Four Combo Variations (Press Two Skills in Order)

- **1+1 (Pull + Kick Knockup):** S1 pull → S1 flying kick (AoE knockup). Burst + CC. **Best for: teamfight engage, squishy deletion.**
- **1+2 (Pull + Slam %HP):** S1 pull → S2 slam with **%Max HP damage + self-heal.** **Best for: tank dueling, jungle objectives.**
- **2+1 (Roll + Roundhouse Kick):** S2 roll → S1 instant teleport behind enemy + kick them backward. **Best for: long-range pursuit, tower ganks, repositioning enemies.**
- **2+2 (Roll + Invulnerable Heal):** S2 roll → S2 leap upward. **Fully untargetable + massive HP restore.** **Best for: tower dive de-aggro, dodging burst, escape.**

### S3: Charge Limit Break

S3 grants: +MS, Slow Resist, **+1 charge to S1 and S2, and raises charge cap to 3.** Pop S3 before teamfights for three consecutive combos.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
mayene.tips:
# Mayene Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Know Your Four Combos

S1 and S2 have 2 charges. The SEQUENCE matters:
- **1+1:** AoE knockup burst. Squishy killer.
- **1+2:** %Max HP slam + heal. Tank buster.
- **2+1:** Roll → behind-enemy roundhouse kick. Reposition tool.
- **2+2:** Roll → invulnerable leap + heal. Escape/Dodge.

### 2. S3 Before Combos (Charge Limit Break)

S3 adds +1 charge and raises cap to 3. **Always S3 before engaging** — you can chain 3 combos instead of 2. S3 → 2+1 (engage) → 1+1 (burst) → 2+2 (escape).

### 3. 2+2: The Ultimate Dodge Tool

2+2 makes you fully untargetable + heals massively. Use to: dodge Zhuge Liang S3, tower shots, Guitarist S3, or any burst. Also: dive tower → kill → 2+2 to de-aggro.

### 4. 2+1: Tower Dive Kidnap

2+1 teleports behind the enemy and kicks them backward. From the side of a tower: 2+1 → kick the defender OUT of tower range → your team deletes them.

### 5. Track Your Charges

No charges = useless. Never chase with 0 charges. In lane: use combos, then back off and wait for charges to refill. S3 resets them.

---

## Signature Combos

### Full Teamfight Cycle: **S3 → 2+1 → 1+1 → 2+2**

1. S3 (charge limit break)
2. 2+1 (roll into backline, kick carry toward your team)
3. 1+1 (AoE knockup burst on the displaced carry)
4. 2+2 (invulnerable escape)

### Lane Trade: **1+2 → 2+2**

1. 1+2 (%HP damage + heal)
2. 2+2 (untargetable → safe retreat)
3. Repeat until enemy is low → finish with 1+1

---

## Advanced Tips

- **1+2's %HP damage makes Mayene a Jungler too.** She shreds Dragon and Baron.
- **2+1 can be aimed.** The kick direction depends on your joystick angle.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs immobile tanks and squishies. Struggles when charges are wasted.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
mayene.build:

meng-tian.overview:
# Meng Tian（蒙恬） — Tank / Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Tank / Fighter (Fortress-Style Defender)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 秩序統將 (General of Order)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 蒙恬)

> Meng Tian is a dominant fortress-style Clash Laner / Jungler. His core mechanics revolve around **Defensive Stance** (charged counter-attacks) and his ultimate's **Xuan Yong Army** (summoned soldiers). Whether playing the CN server's "one-shot squishy" full-damage build or the Global/high-rank "tank fortress" style, Meng Tian is the team's unbreakable shield.

---

## Passive & Core Mechanics

### Defensive Stance (Ability 2)

Entering Defensive Stance grants Meng Tian **20% Damage Reduction** from the front and **Unstoppable** during charged thrusts. Use this to face-tank burst abilities, CC, and tower shots head-on.

### Soldier's Momentum (Passive)

Charging or taking damage builds **Momentum**. A full-Momentum charged thrust deals **bonus Physical Damage + healing**.

### Ultimate: Xuan Yong Army (Ability 3)

Summons soldiers. Press S3 again to toggle formations:
- **Square Formation:** Soldiers surround Meng Tian — maximum frontal defense. Use for tower dives and tanking burst.
- **Wedge Formation:** Soldiers line up — maximum damage coverage. Use in narrow terrain (Dragon pit, jungle corridors).

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
meng-tian.tips:
# Meng Tian Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Defensive Stance Mastery (S2)

Entering Defensive Stance grants **20% front-facing Damage Reduction**. During charged thrusts, Meng Tian is **Unstoppable**. Face-tank Li Yuanfang's ultimate, Daji's CC, or any burst damage head-on.

- While in Defensive Stance, tap S1 to **adjust thrust direction** and micro-dash forward — critical for kiting and chasing.

### 2. Charge-Flash (Charged Thrust + Flash)

While charging a thrust in Defensive Stance, **release the auto-attack and immediately Flash**. This extends the thrust range massively — an unexpected "turn-back spear" that deletes backline squishies.

### 3. Ultimate Formation Toggle (S3)

After summoning soldiers, press S3 again to toggle:

- **Square Formation:** Soldiers surround you — maximum frontal defense. Best for tower dives and absorbing burst.
- **Wedge Formation:** Soldiers line up — maximum damage coverage. Best in narrow terrain (Dragon pit, jungle fights).

### 4. Reverse S1 Knockback

After summoning soldiers, S1's knockup area expands. Use S2 → Flash behind enemy → S1 to knock them backward into your tower or team — similar to Dharma or Su Lie plays.

### 5. Skill Priority

**Max S1 first, then S2. Take ultimate whenever available.** S1 is your primary engage, poke, and micro-adjustment tool in Defensive Stance.

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard Engage / One-Shot: **S3 → S1 → S2 → AA**

1. S3 summon soldiers
2. S1 dash forward + knockup
3. S2 cancel S1 animation + enter Defensive Stance
4. AA — full-Momentum charged thrust for massive burst

### Infinite Push / Kite: **S2 → AA → S1 → AA → S1 → AA**

In Defensive Stance, each charged AA massively reduces S1 cooldown. Cycle AA + S1 (micro-adjust) + AA for continuous Unstoppable thrusts in teamfights.

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Front-facing is everything:** Meng Tian's DR only applies from the front. Never show your back in a fight.
- **Tower diving:** Square Formation + Defensive Stance DR makes you nearly immune to tower shots.
- **Flash engages:** Charge-Flash is your most unexpected kill tool — practice the timing.
- **Matchup:** Dominates immobile mages and marksmen. Struggles against hyper-mobile assassins who can flank behind him.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
meng-tian.build:
# Meng Tian Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Two distinct paths — **Semi-Tank Fortress** (high-rank/competitive, highest winrate) and **Full Damage One-Shot** (squishy nightmare, timing-dependent).

---

## Build 1: Semi-Tank Fortress (Recommended)

Balances defense and damage. With ultimate's DR stacking, Meng Tian becomes nearly unkillable while still threatening backline.

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Shadow Boots (影忍之足)** or **Giant's Grip (巨人之握)** | Clash Lane: Shadow Boots for physical lane dominance. Jungle: Giant's Grip for Health stacking. |
| 2 | **Shadow Axe (暗影战斧)** | Core damage item: Physical Penetration, Health, and essential CDR. |
| 3 | **Frost Grip (冰痕之握)** | Charged thrusts perfectly proc AoE slow + bonus damage. Maximum stickiness. |
| 4 | **Berserker's Armor (暴烈之甲)** | Taking hits while charging stacks damage and Movement Speed — perfect synergy with Meng Tian's playstyle. |
| 5 | **Eternal Night (永夜守护)** or **Magic Cloak (魔女斗篷)** | Magic defense. Eternal Night vs burst; Magic Cloak vs sustained poke. |
| 6 | **Pure Sky (纯净苍穹)** | Active DR stacks with S2 frontal DR + Square Formation for near-immunity to all frontal damage. |

---

## Build 2: Full Damage Crit "One-Shot" (Fun / Smurf)

| Order | Item | Why |

| 5 | **Siege Breaker (破军)** | Execute damage below 50% HP. |
| 6 | **Fate's Edge (名刀·司命)** or **Sage's Sanctuary (贤者的庇护)** | Survival for aggressive dives. |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

meng-ya.overview:
# Meng Ya（蒙犽） — Marksman

## Overview

- **Role:** Marksman (Ability-Based Artillery)
- **Lane:** Farm Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 烈炮小子 (Fierce Cannon Youth)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 蒙犽)

> Meng Ya is a uniquely designed artillery Marksman. He doesn't rely on Attack Speed — instead, he uses abilities and his **Fury Gauge (炽怒值)** to dominate. At full Fury, his S1 and S2 gain enhanced properties and excess Fury converts to HP recovery. He also has a global-range ultimate for cross-map support. Unlike most Marksmen, he scales extremely well with semi-tank builds.

---

## Passive & Core Mechanics

### Fury Gauge (Energy Bar)

At **full Fury**, Meng Ya enters **Frenzy State**:
- S1 bullets split and penetrate
- S2 gains enhanced effects
- **Excess Fury converts to HP recovery**

Without Fury, Meng Ya's damage is low. **Always pre-stack Fury on Minions or Jungle Monsters before fighting.**

### Attack Speed → CDR Conversion

Every **5% Attack Speed = 1% Cooldown Reduction**. Meng Ya naturally caps CDR through Attack Speed items — no need for dedicated CDR purchases.

### Ultimate: Global Bombardment (S3)

Channel S3 to expand radar range. Whenever allies fight within radar, Meng Ya auto-fires missiles across the map. +50% Fury generation during ultimate.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
meng-ya.tips:
# Meng Ya Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Master the Fury Gauge

Meng Ya's energy bar (Fury) is everything:
- **Full Fury = Frenzy State:** S1 bullets split + penetrate, S2 enhanced, **excess Fury converts to HP recovery**
- **Low Fury = low damage.** Always pre-stack Fury on Minions or Jungle Monsters before trading
- **Attack Speed → CDR:** Every 5% Attack Speed = 1% CDR. This is how Meng Ya naturally caps cooldowns

### 2. S1: Free Movement While Firing

S1 (Heavy Cannon Barrage) slows Meng Ya by 10%, but he can **freely move and adjust aim direction**. Press S1 again to **cancel the barrage at any time** — essential for flexible retreats or switching to auto-attacks.

### 3. S2: Ricochet Off Walls

S2 fires a shell that **splits into ricochet projectiles upon hitting a wall**. When an enemy is low HP hiding behind a tower or in a bush corner, don't aim at them — **aim at the wall behind them** to blanket the area with ricochet damage.

### 4. Ultimate: Global Cross-Map Support

S3's radar range expands the longer you channel. Once allies engage enemies within radar, Meng Ya **auto-fires missiles across the map**. Also grants +50% Fury generation during ultimate.

### 5. Skill Priority

**Max S1 first, then S2. Take ultimate whenever available.** S1 is Meng Ya's primary damage, wave-clear, and Fury-stacking tool.

---

## Signature Combos

### Teamfight Barrage: **S3 (channel) → S2 → S1 → AA**

1. Channel S3 from long range before the fight starts
2. S2 into the enemy cluster to slow + stack Fury to max
3. S1 — walk and spray while weaving enhanced auto-attacks
4. Let S3 auto-missiles rain down throughout

### Tower Dive Execute: **S2 (wall ricochet) → S1 → S3**

1. S2 ricochet off the tower wall to chip the defending enemy
2. Enter tower with full Fury
3. S1 spray with high HP recovery + burst
4. S3 for the finishing missiles
5. Walk out healthy

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Pre-fight Fury stacking:** Before any fight, auto Minions or Jungle Monsters to build Fury to at least 50%. Never engage from 0 Fury.
- **S1 cancel micro:** Get used to tapping S1 again to cancel — holding it too long makes you an easy target.
- **Wall geometry matters:** Learn wall angles for S2 ricochets. The difference between a direct hit and a wall-bounce kill is massive.
- **Build semi-tank:** Berserker's Armor + Pure Sky makes Meng Ya surprisingly durable while spraying.
- **Matchup:** Meng Ya bullies short-range laners. He struggles against long-range poke mages and hyper-mobile assassins who can flank his S1 spray angle.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
meng-ya.build:
# Meng Ya Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Meng Ya's ability damage scales purely with Physical Attack and Critical Rate (crits double Fury generation). He needs to stand and spray, so **semi-tank crit build** with one high-value defensive item is optimal.

---

## Recommended Burst-Crit Build

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Berserker's Boots (急速战靴)** | Early Attack Speed converts to CDR. *Late game: swap to Resistance Boots (抵抗之靴) — Meng Ya is vulnerable to CC during S1 spray.* |
| 2 | **Shadow Axe (暗影战斧)** | Core bruiser-style item. Attack, Health, CDR, and the Cripple slow procs perfectly with S1 spray for stickiness. |
| 3 | **Infinity Edge (无尽战刃)** | **Meng Ya's #1 power-spike item!** Every S1 bullet can crit. Infinity Edge makes the spray devastating. |
| 4 | **Shadow Blade (影刃)** | Critical Rate + Movement Speed. The on-crit Attack Speed boost converts directly to CDR — S1 and S2 come back almost instantly. |
| 5 | **Berserker's Armor (暴烈之甲)** | **Meng Ya's soul defensive item.** He tanks hits while spraying; Berserker's Armor provides up to +10% Movement Speed and +10% total damage output when stacked. Perfect synergy with his HP recovery mechanic. |
| 6 | **Dawn (破晓)** or **Pure Sky (纯净苍穹)** | **Dawn:** max penetration vs tanky teams. **Pure Sky:** active DR for survival vs fed Assassins — lets Meng Ya survive dives and keep spraying. |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

Meng Ya needs **Physical Penetration, Critical Rate (fast Fury stacking + S1 crit heal), and Movement Speed**. He does NOT need Lifesteal runes — full Fury already provides high HP recovery.

### Setup 1: CN Server "Calamity 100-Pen Speed" (Top Player Standard)

| 🔴 Red | Calamity (祸源) | ×10 | Critical Rate +1.6% |

### Setup 2: "Crit Damage + AS Threshold" (Smoother Early Game)

| 🟢 Green | Eagle Eye (鹰眼) | ×10 | Physical Attack +0.9, Physical Pen +6.4 |

Meng Ya does NOT use standard Marksman Lifesteal runes — they waste stats. The safest method:

menki.overview:
# Menki（夢奇） — Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter (Dual-Scaling Brawler)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 入夢之靈 (Dream Spirit)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 梦奇)

> Menki received a rework and became an extremely flexible Hero with a unique **Mass mechanic**. As Mass increases, Menki grows larger and gains massive Dual Defense + Physical Attack. At full Mass he's a walking fortress; at zero Mass he's one of the fastest Heroes in the game. Two viable playstyles: **AD Physical Bruiser** (mainstream) and **AP Magic Poke** (situational).

---

## Core Mechanics

### Mass (Energy) Management

- **High Mass = Large body + high Dual Defense + high Physical Attack.** Use S1 to gain shield + Mass. Stay at high Mass for fights.
- **Zero Mass = Small body + extremely fast Movement Speed.** Never cast S1 when rotating — stay small until you reach the fight.

### S2: Bubble Boomerang

S2 throws a bubble that returns. If Menki catches the returning bubble, it **upgrades into an execute bomb** — recast for massive burst damage.

### S3: 360-Degree Ring Dash

S3 makes Menki dash in a circular arc. During the dash: **Slow-immune**, gains Mass, damages enemies in path. Recast to stop early and **knockup**. Use for: backline dives, escapes, flanking.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
menki.tips:
# Menki Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Mass Management: Small to Travel, Big to Fight

- **Rotating between lanes:** Stay at **zero Mass** — you're one of the fastest Heroes in the game. Never cast S1 while traveling.
- **About to fight:** Spam S1 to build Mass → large body + high dual defense + high Physical Attack. You effectively start fights with two extra items of stats.

### 2. S2 Boomerang Upgrade

S2 throws a bubble that returns. **Walk into the returning bubble** to catch it — it upgrades into an **execute bomb**. Recast S2 to throw the bomb for massive burst damage. This is your highest-damage ability.

### 3. S3: Engage AND Escape

S3's circular dash is **Slow-immune**. Two uses:
- **Engage:** Dash behind enemy backline → recast to knockup → S1 → AA → S2 execute
- **Escape:** When collapsed on, S3 toward your tower — the arc lets you bypass terrain and enemies

### 4. S1 Shield Spam = Immortality

S1 grants a shield + Mass on a very short cooldown. In extended fights: S1 → AA → S1 → AA. The constant shield refreshing makes you deceptively tanky.

### 5. Skill Priority

**Max S1 first, then S2. Take ultimate whenever available.** S1's short-CD shield is Menki's brawling core.

---

## Signature Combos

### Backline Dive: **S2 → S3 → S3 (recast) → S1 → AA → S2 (execute)**

1. S2 slow + stack Mass
2. S3 circular dash into enemy backline
3. S3 recast to knockup
4. S1 shield + AA
5. S2 execute bomb to finish

### Extended Brawl: **S1 → AA → S2 → AA → S1 → AA**

1. S1 shield → AA
2. S2 bubble → AA while it travels
3. Catch returning bubble (upgrade)
4. S1 shield again → AA
5. S2 execute bomb

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Full Mass at level 1 is absurdly strong.** You can 1v1 almost any laner if you start with S1 and keep Mass high.
- **S3 can bypass walls.** The circular arc lets you dash through terrain for creative ganks and escapes.
- **AP build is viable but situational.** Use vs kite-heavy teams where AD can't reach.
- **Matchup:** Destroys melee brawlers. Struggles vs long-range kiters who never let you close distance.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
menki.build:

mi-yue.overview:
# Mi Yue（羋月） — Fighter / Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter / Mage (Sustained Duelist / Split-Pusher)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 永恆之月 (Eternal Moon)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 芈月)

> Mi Yue is a sustained-damage Magic Fighter who combines continuous poke, dominant laning, high DR, and invulnerability. She's an unmatched split-pusher in Clash Lane and a "health-sustaining" Jungler who never recalls. Her S2 chain steals Attack/Magic Attack/Movement Speed from enemies — the longer she's connected, the stronger she gets and the weaker they become.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Raven Servants (Damage + Healing)

Hitting enemies with abilities summons ravens (max 6). Ravens auto-attack nearby enemies and **restore Mi Yue's HP.** Always maintain 6 ravens before fighting.

### S2: Chain (Win Condition)

S2 chains to an enemy, **stealing their Physical Attack, Magic Attack, and Movement Speed** per tick while empowering Mi Yue's AAs. A connected Mi Yue wins any 1v1. A disconnected Mi Yue loses. **Land S2 or don't fight.**

### S3: Invulnerability (2 Seconds)

S3 makes Mi Yue **completely immune to damage and CC for 2 seconds.** Use to: tower dive, bait enemy ultimates (Donghuang, Zhang Fei, Daji), dodge fatal burst.

### S1: Crow Teleport + Bait

S1 sends a crow forward. Recast to teleport to its position. Use direction fake: send crow LEFT, walk RIGHT. When enemies chase, teleport away. Or: send crow TOWARD enemy backline, teleport in for flank engage.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
mi-yue.tips:
# Mi Yue Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Never Fight Without 6 Ravens

Ravens = damage + healing. Before any fight: use abilities on nearby minions/jungle camps to reach 6 ravens. A Mi Yue with 0 ravens is half a Hero.

### 2. S2 Chain: Land It or Don't Fight

S2 steals Attack, Magic Attack, and MS from the enemy. A connected Mi Yue out-stats everyone. **If S2 misses: disengage immediately.** Wait for cooldown (~8s), then try again.

### 3. Pre-Buff Before Fighting

Before trading in lane: S2 a nearby jungle camp or minion to max out your stolen stats. Walk into the fight with full buffs + 6 ravens. The enemy laner can't contest you.

### 4. S1 Direction Fake (Signature Outplay)

S1 sends a crow in one direction. Recast to teleport. Mind game:
- Send crow LEFT, walk RIGHT
- Enemy chases you right → recast S1 → teleport left → safe
- Send crow toward enemy backline, walk away → recast to flank

### 5. S3: 2 Seconds of God Mode

S3 grants complete immunity. Use proactively:
- Tower dive → S3 to drop tower aggro
- Bait Donghuang/Zhang Fei/Daji ultimates
- Dodge fatal burst mid-fight
- Not just an escape — use it to stay in the fight longer

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard Duel: **S2 (chain) → AA → S1 → AA → S3 (if needed)**

1. Land S2 chain
2. AA while chain drains stats
3. S1 toward enemy's escape path → teleport
4. Continue AA with empowered stats
5. S3 if they try to burst you

### Long-Range Flank: **S1 (toward backline) → S1 (teleport) → S2 → AA → S3 (escape)**

1. S1 crow toward enemy ADC/Mage
2. Recast S1 → teleport directly onto them
3. S2 chain immediately
4. AA them down
5. S3 to walk out or tower-dive finish

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Jungle Mi Yue never recalls.** Ravens + Devourer's Tome = full HP after one jungle camp.
- **Split-push monster.** Mi Yue wins 1v1 against almost anyone with S2 connected. Force enemies to send 2+ to stop you.
- **Matchup:** God-tier in 1v1. Struggles vs hyper-mobile Heroes who break S2 chain (S1 teleport, S2 dash, etc.).

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
mi-yue.build:
# Mi Yue Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Magic Attack Speed. S2 chain empowers AAs — needs AS for maximum empowered-hit DPS. Semi-tank with sustain. CN server consensus: **Magic AS + Tank hybrid.**

---

## Recommended Clash Lane / Jungle Build

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Berserker's Boots (急速战靴)** or **Resistance Boots (抵抗之靴)** | **Berserker's:** AS for empowered AA DPS. **Resistance Boots:** vs CC-heavy laners (Mulan, Sun Ce). |
| 2 | **Golden Sword (金色圣剑)** | **Core #1!** AS + MS + on-hit Magic Damage. Perfect synergy with S2-empowered AAs. |
| 3 | **Devourer's Tome (噬神之书)** | Massive Magic Lifesteal + HP. Combined with ravens, full-HP after one jungle camp. Never recall. |
| 4 | **Lightning Dagger (闪电匕首)** or **Shadow Blade (影刃)** | **Lightning Dagger:** AS + MS + chain lightning for jungle clear. **Shadow Blade:** on-crit AS + MS for kiting. |
| 5 | **Cocoon Breaker (破茧之衣)** | **New-season AP Tank item.** AP + massive HP. Passive converts AP to DR + Magic Penetration. Mi Yue becomes a genuine drain-tank. |
| 6 | **Prophet's Hour (时之预言)** or **Ominous Premonition (不祥征兆)** / **Magic Cloak (魔女斗篷)** | Full defense flex based on enemy comp. Prophet's Hour: AP + dual defenses for balanced survival. |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

Core: **Attack Speed (AA DPS), Magic Penetration, Movement Speed.**

### Setup 1: "32% AS Speed" (CN Standard — Highest Winrate)

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |

| 🔵 Blue | Hunt (狩猎) | ×10 | Attack Speed +1%, Move Speed +1% |

**Total:** **+32% Attack Speed** (max possible from runes), +64 Magic Penetration, +10% MS, +5% Critical Rate. Level 1 lane dominance — nobody out-trades 32% AS Mi Yue.

### Setup 2: "Lifesteal Sustain" (Newcomer Friendly)

## Quick In-Game Setup

milady.overview:
# Milady（米萊狄） — Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Mage (Siege / Summoner)
- **Lane:** Mid Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 築城者 (Fortress Builder)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 米莱狄)

> Milady is a uniquely designed "siege" Mage. Her signature mechanic is endlessly spawning **Mechanical Servants (小机器人)** that can **destroy turrets without a minion wave** and overwhelm teamfights with their sheer numbers. Her damage and push speed scale directly with how many robots are alive.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Robot Factory

Whenever Milady or her robots **last-hit any unit** (Minions, Monsters, Heroes, summons), a new robot spawns. **CS'ing (getting the last hit) is absolutely critical.**

### S1: Split at the Right Moment

S1's aircraft splits into two on recast. **Split it exactly when it's above the enemy** for maximum damage + slow. Splitting too early or too late cuts damage significantly.

### S3 Ultimate: Swarm Signal

S3 stuns and marks a target. ALL nearby robots go berserk — **+100% Movement Speed and Attack Speed**. The final explosion deals magnetic execute damage based on %HP the target lost during the mark. **S3 can target turrets!**

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
milady.tips:
# Milady Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Your Job = Destroy Towers

Milady is NOT a teamfight mage. When the enemy Mid Laner roams, don't follow — **ping retreat for your team and take their Mid T1 tower instead**. One lost tower = enemy jungle permanently exposed.

### 2. Turret Dive Without Minions

Pre-summon 4 robots (S2 ×2). Walk into tower range. **Cast S3 on the turret itself** (yes, it works on structures). Berserk robots + S3 explosion can 100→0 a full-HP tower with zero minion support.

### 3. S1 Split Timing

S1's aircraft splits on recast. **Split exactly above the enemy's head** for max damage + slow. Don't autopilot — wait for the right moment.

### 4. S3 Self-Defense vs Assassins

Milady has zero mobility. When an Assassin dives you (Lanling Wang, Li Bai, Lam):
- **S3 their face** — stun + mark
- **S2 at your feet** — spawn robots
- **S1 split above them**
- Berserk robots + your full combo often kills the Assassin before they kill you

### 5. Bush-Check with S2

Robots provide vision. When approaching suspicious bushes, drop S2 inside. If the robots start attacking, someone's there.

---

## Signature Combos

### Bush Ambush One-Shot: **S2 → S3 → S1 → S2 → AA**

1. Pre-summon robots with S2
2. S3 stun + mark
3. S1 split directly above target
4. S2 again for more robots
5. AA to help finish
6. Berserk robot swarm tears the target apart in ~2 seconds

### Ranged Poke: **S1 → S1 (split) → S2**

1. S1 at max range
2. Split above enemy for slow
3. S2 robots walk forward to harass while enemy is slowed

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Robot HP and damage scale with Magic Attack.** More AP = tankier, harder-hitting robots. This is why Savant's Wrath is her power spike.
- **Don't teamfight blindly.** Your strength is map pressure. Trade towers for dragons if needed.
- **Matchup:** Destroys roaming Mid Laners who leave lane. Struggles vs long-range artillery Mages who outrange her S1.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
milady.build:
# Milady Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Robot HP and damage scale entirely with **Magic Attack**. More AP = tankier, stronger robots. Needs **CDR** for frequent S2 robot summons. Pure AP + max CDR.

---

## Recommended Build

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Calm Boots (冷静之靴)** | MANDATORY first item. CDR for frequent S2 summons. More robots = more pressure. |
| 2 | **Mask of Agony (痛苦面具)** | AP + Health + 5% CDR. S1's multi-tick damage perfectly triggers Mask's percentage HP burn repeatedly. |
| 3 | **Sunset Flow (日暮之流)** or **Echo Staff (回响之杖)** | **Sunset Flow:** vs tanky teams — S1 and robots stack penetration instantly. **Echo Staff:** vs squishy teams — burst + Movement Speed. |
| 4 | **Savant's Wrath (博学者之怒)** | **Milady's power spike!** Robots' HP and damage scale with AP. Savant's Wrath percentage boost makes robots hit like Super Minions. |
| 5 | **Frost Breath (凝冰之息)** | S1 and robot auto-attacks constantly trigger the slow. Once enemies are stuck, robots get several extra hits — and S3 execute damage skyrockets. |
| 6 | **Void Staff (虚无法杖)** or **Sage's Tome (贤者之书)** | **Void Staff:** Penetration vs Magic Cloak. **Sage's Tome:** raw AP to max out robot stats vs teams without magic resist. |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

Zero Attack Speed or Physical stats needed. Core: **Magic Attack (stronger early robots), Magic Penetration, Movement Speed / CDR.**

### Setup 1: CN Server "Core AP Penetration" (Standard)

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |
|------|------|-----|----------------|
| 🔴 Red | Nightmare (梦魇) | ×10 | Magic Attack +4.2, Magic Pen +2.4 |
| 🟢 Green | Mind's Eye (心眼) | ×10 | Attack Speed +0.6%, Magic Penetration +6.4 |
| 🔵 Blue | Hunt (狩猎) | ×10 | Attack Speed +1%, Move Speed +1% |

**Total:** +42 Magic Attack, +88 Magic Penetration, +10% Movement Speed, +6% Attack Speed. Stronger level-1 robots dominate lane priority.

### Setup 2: "CDR Siege" (Max Pressure)

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |
|------|------|-----|----------------|
| 🔴 Red | Nightmare (梦魇) | ×10 | Magic Attack +4.2, Magic Pen +2.4 |
| 🟢 Green | Compassion (怜悯) | ×10 | Cooldown Reduction +1% |
| 🔵 Blue | Hunt (狩猎) | ×5 | Attack Speed +1%, Move Speed +1% |
| 🔵 Blue | Greed (贪婪) | ×5 | Magic Lifesteal +1.6% |

**Total:** +42 Magic Attack, +24 Magic Penetration, **+10% CDR**, +8% Magic Lifesteal, +5% Movement Speed. Near-constant robot summons from level 1.

---

## Core Mindset

Milady's win condition is **towers, not kills**. When the enemy Mid roams:
1. Ping retreat for your team
2. Push Mid T1 with robots + S3
3. Enemy jungle is now exposed
4. Repeat for Mid T2, then side lanes

ming.overview:
# Ming（明世隱） — Support

## Overview

- **Role:** Support (Tether Buffer / Healer)
- **Lane:** Roaming
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 靈魂劫卜 (Soul Diviner)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 明世隐; nickname: "Xiao Ming")

> Ming is a strategically dominant tether-based Support. He functions as a "mobile 7th item" — his Soul Chain connects to allies (granting massive Attack, Defense, Movement Speed) or enemies (dealing continuous damage + defense shred). His ultimate sacrifices his own HP to instantly restore a teammate's HP (or deal True Damage to enemies).

---

## Core Mechanics

### Soul Chain (S1)

Connect to an ally (buff them) or enemy (debuff them). The chain deals continuous damage to enemies it passes through.

### S2: Stance Toggle

- **Purple Chain (Attack/AP buff):** Default. Use 95% of the time — boosts ally damage and jungle clear speed.
- **Yellow Chain (Defense buff):** Switch when your carry is dived by Assassins (Lanling Wang, Wukong) or targeted by Zhuge Liang S3.

### S3: HP Transfer

Sacrifice Ming's HP to heal an ally (or deal True Damage to enemy). **Over the next 10 seconds, Ming recovers 60% of the sacrificed HP.** Combined with Overlord's Platemail, this becomes nearly cost-free.

### Chain Break Conditions

Chain breaks if: distance too far, target enters bush while Ming is outside, or target becomes untargetable. Stay close to your tethered ally.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

Best duo partners: Marco, Gongsun Li, Sun Shangxiang.
*Waiting for community input…*
ming.tips:
# Ming Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Purple Chain by Default, Yellow for Defense

- **Purple (Attack/AP):** Use 95% of the time — fighting, farming, pushing.
- **Yellow (Defense):** Switch ONLY when your carry is dived by burst Assassins (Lanling Wang, Wukong) or targeted by execute ultimates (Zhuge Liang S3).

### 2. S3 + Redemption Shield Combo

S3 has a ~0.75s cast delay before healing. If your carry is critically low, they might die during the delay. **Press S3 AND Redemption (support item shield) simultaneously** — the shield buys 1 second for the heal to land.

### 3. S3 HP Recovery (Nearly Free)

After S3, Ming recovers **60% of sacrificed HP over 10 seconds**. With Overlord's Platemail or Phoenix Eye, this becomes effectively cost-free. Don't be afraid to use S3 — you'll heal back.

### 4. Chain Touch Damage

The chain deals damage to enemies it passes through. When helping Mid clear wave or in early skirmishes, position so the chain drags through enemies and minions for bonus damage.

### 5. Level 1 Decision

- **Jungler strong early (Liu Bei, Han Xin):** Follow jungler for fast clear
- **Mid needs help:** Tether Mid for wave priority, then rotate together
- Never tether the ADC at level 1 — they don't need you yet

---

## Signature Combo

### Perfect Life-Saving: **S3 + Redemption Shield**

1. Carry drops to critical HP
2. Press S3 → **immediately press Redemption active**
3. Shield absorbs damage during S3's cast delay
4. Massive heal lands → carry lives

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Move faster than your tethered ally.** If you're slower, the chain breaks. Swift Boots are mandatory.
- **Don't stand in the same bush as your ally.** If they enter a bush and you're outside, the chain breaks. Stand next to the bush, not inside.
- **Matchup:** God-tier with hyper-carries. Struggles when team has no single clear carry to tether.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
ming.build:
# Ming Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Ming's chain buff strength and S3 healing have **massive AP scaling**. CN server meta: **semi-tank AP** — big heals, big buffs, not dying to random AoE.

---

## Recommended Semi-Tank AP Build

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Shadow Aegis · Redemption (极影·救赎)** | Team Attack Speed + CDR + Mana regen. Redemption active: group shield for anti-burst. |
| 2 | **Swift Boots (疾步之靴)** | **Mandatory.** Ming MUST move faster than his tethered ally — chain breaks if you fall behind. |
| 3 | **Prophet's Hour (时之预言)** | AP + massive HP. Passive converts AP to dual defenses — incredible cost-efficiency. |
| 4 | **Savant's Wrath (博学者之怒)** | **Ming's power spike!** Percentage AP boost: chain buff skyrockets, S3 heals from 10% → 100% HP. |
| 5 | **Overlord's Platemail (霸者重装)** | Massive HP pool for S3 sacrifice. Continuous HP regen negates S3's HP cost. |
| 6 | **Ominous Premonition (不祥征兆)** or **Magic Cloak (魔女斗篷)** | Flex defense vs Physical or Magic damage. |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

Core needs: **Max Health (S3 survival buffer), Magic Attack (buff + heal strength), Movement Speed (chain integrity).**

mozi.overview:
# Mozi（墨子） — Fighter / Support

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter / Support (Artillery CC / Flex Pick)
- **Lane:** Roaming / Clash Lane / Mid Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 和平守望 (Peacekeeper)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 墨子)

> Mozi is a versatile CC-heavy Mage-Tank who flexes between Mid, Support, and Clash Lane. His S2 is a devastating long-range cannon that stuns for 1 second, his S3 is an AoE continuous stun cage (up to 3.3s), and every 4th AA knocks enemies back. He's one of the most flexible Heroes in the game.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Shield + Knockup AA

Every ability grants a stackable 3s shield. Every **4th AA becomes a "cannon punch"** that knocks enemies back. Weave AAs between abilities.

### S2: Long-Range Stun (Signature)

Fires a cannon that stuns for **1 second** on hit and leaves a damage puddle. Use from bushes (enemies can't see the red laser line). Also fire at minimap enemy icons for cross-screen picks.

### S3: AoE Continuous Stun Cage

Creates a cage that stuns enemies touching it (up to 3.3s). **S3 + Flash** (Flash during S3) lets you reposition the cage onto the enemy backline.

### S1: Dash + Knockback

Short dash. Next AA becomes the knockback punch. Use S1 → AA to peel Assassins off your carries, then S2 for guaranteed point-blank stun.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
mozi.tips:
# Mozi Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. S2 from Bush = Undodgeable

S2's red laser line is visible to enemies. Cast from bushes and it's invisible. Always S2 from fog of war.

### 2. S2 Cross-Map: Watch the Minimap

S2 has extreme range. When you see enemy icons retreating on the minimap: pre-aim their path and fire. Cross-map stuns win games.

### 3. S3 + Flash: The Signature Engage

S3 cage can be repositioned with Flash. **Cast S3 → Flash into enemy backline.** The cage moves with you. Unavoidable multi-man stun.

### 4. Anti-Dive: S1 → AA → S2

When an Assassin dives: S1 dash → immediate AA (knockback punch) → S2 at point-blank (100% guaranteed stun). They're CC-locked for 2+ seconds. Easy kill for your team.

### 5. 4th AA Knockup: Always Track It

Every 4th AA knocks enemies back. Before teamfights, AA minions/monsters to 3 stacks. Hold the 4th knockup AA for the enemy diver or to peel for your ADC.

### 6. Skill Priority

**Max S2 first, then S1. Take S3 whenever available.** S2 is core poke and CC.

---

## Signature Combos

### Ranged CC Chain: **S2 → S1 → AA**

1. S2 long-range stun (1s)
2. S1 dash forward
3. AA (4th punch knockup — if stacked)
4. Enemy is CC'd for 2+ seconds

### Teamfight S3+Flash: **S1 → S3 → Flash**

1. S1 dash toward enemies
2. S3 cage
3. **Flash into their backline** — cage stuns everyone

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S2's damage puddle persists.** Enemies walking through it take continuous damage + proc item effects (Mask, Frost Breath, Sunset Flow).
- **Mozi's shield stacks.** Spam S1/S2 even when no enemies are nearby if you need extra durability.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs immobile comps. Struggles vs hyper-mobile Heroes who dash out of S3 cage.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
mozi.build:
# Mozi Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Two viable paths. **Mid Lane AP Poke** (Mask of Agony synergy) and **Support Tank CC** (max CDR). Both leverage S2's puddle for item effects.

---

## Build A: Mid Lane AP Poke (Recommended)

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Calm Boots (冷静之靴)** | CDR for constant S2 spam. Core early tempo. |
| 2 | **Mask of Agony (痛苦面具)** | S2's damage puddle endlessly triggers Mask's %HP burn. Poke king. |
| 3 | **Frost Breath (凝冰之息)** | S2 puddle + slow = enemies stuck in damage. Bonus damage on controlled targets. |
| 4 | **Sunset Flow (日暮之流)** | S2 puddle + S3 cage multi-tick = instant 10-stack penetration. |
| 5 | **Savant's Wrath (博学者之怒)** | AP spike. Mozi's shield scales with AP — damage AND tankiness. |
| 6 | **Void Staff (虚无法杖)** or **Splendor (辉月)** | Penetration vs magic resist. Splendor for Stasis survival. |

## Build B: Support Tank CC

| 2 | **Swift Boots (疾步之靴)** or **Resistance Boots (抵抗之靴)** | Swift Boots for roaming S2 support. Resistance vs heavy CC. |
| 3 | **Rising Sun (旭日初光)** | S2 spam procs Rising Sun's shield on Mozi + lowest-HP ally. |
| 4 | **Ominous Premonition (不祥征兆)** | Physical Defense + anti-ADC passive. |
| 5 | **Magic Cloak (魔女斗篷)** | Magic Defense + spell shield. |
| 6 | **Glacial Storm (极寒风暴)** | 20% CDR. Combined with support item aura = 35-40% CDR. "Mobile machine gun." |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

Core: **Magic Penetration, Movement Speed, Attack Speed (smoother 4th AA).**

### Setup 1: "Hunt 88-Pen" (Mid Lane / Standard)

**Total:** +42 Magic Attack, **+88 Magic Penetration**, +16% AS, **+10% MS**. Smoothest 4th AA punch timing.

### Setup 2: "Harmony Sustain" (Support)

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |

mulan.overview:
# Mulan（花木蘭） — Assassin / Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Assassin / Fighter (Dual-Form Skirmisher)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★★☆
- **Title:** 傳說之刃 (Legendary Blade)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 花木兰)

> Mulan is the most iconic dual-form Clash Lane Hero. Light Form: extreme mobility + 5-stack silence. Heavy Form: massive burst + **Unstoppable + 40-50% Damage Reduction.** She has zero sustain, so her survival depends entirely on Heavy Form's DR and perfect combo execution. Timing, bush camping, and DR management separate gods from minions.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Light Form (Assassin Mode)

+40 Movement Speed. AAs and abilities stack marks — **5 stacks = silence + slow + bonus Physical Damage.** This is how she locks enemies down.

### Heavy Form (Juggernaut Mode)

Slow AAs but massive damage. During Heavy S1 and S2, Mulan is **Unstoppable + 40-50% DR.** Use this to face-tank CC and burst.

### Heavy S1: Double Charge

Hitting ANY target (Minion, Monster, Hero) with Heavy S1's first charge **unlocks a second charge immediately.** Also resets ultimate cooldown.

### Heavy AA Cancel

Heavy AAs are slow. **Press S1 immediately after the AA damage number appears** to cancel the recovery animation. Reverse also works: S1 → AA instantly.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
mulan.tips:
# Mulan Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Fastest Bush Silence: Light S2 → S1 → AA → Heavy

From bush: S2 (gear slow) → S1 dash + AA (instant 5-stack silence). Enemy is silenced — they can't Flash or cast. Immediately S3 to Heavy → S2 push → S1 double-charge delete. Dead before they regain control.

### 2. Heavy Form DR = Face-Tank Everything

Heavy S1 and S2 grant **40-50% DR + Unstoppable.** When Zhang Fei roars, Daji charms, or Lu Bu ults: **S3 to Heavy → S1 charge.** You'll eat the CC and take almost no damage. Never panic — Mulan in Heavy form is the tankiest Hero in the game for those 2-3 seconds.

### 3. Pure Sky + Heavy DR = ~80% DR

Heavy DR (40-50%) + Pure Sky active (35%) = **~80% total Damage Reduction.** You can stand in the enemy fountain and survive. Use this to tower-dive, face-tank 5-man focus fire, or outplay guaranteed-death situations.

### 4. Heavy AA Cancel

Heavy AAs are sluggish. Cancel the recovery: **AA (damage number appears) → immediately S1.** Also works in reverse: **S1 slash → immediately AA.** This doubles your DPS in Heavy form.

### 5. Minion/Monster = Free Second S1 Charge

Heavy S1's second charge unlocks by hitting ANY target. In lane: charge S1 through the minion wave → second charge unlocked → aim it at the enemy laner.

### 6. Skill Priority

**Max S1 first, then S2. Take S3 whenever available.** S1 is primary engage and burst.

---

## Signature Combos

### Bush Ambush Silence Kill: **Light S2 → S1 → AA → S3 (Heavy) → S2 push → S1 ×2**

1. S2 gear from bush (slow)
2. S1 dash + AA (5-stack silence)
3. S3 to Heavy
4. S2 continuous push (they're silenced, can't escape)
5. S1 double-charge → dead

### Long-Range Chase: **Light S1 (off minion) → S2 → S1 → AA → Heavy burst**

1. S1 first dash off a minion (gap-close)
2. S2 gear throw (slow)
3. S1 second dash through enemy + AA (silence)
4. S3 Heavy → S2 → S1 ×2

---

## Advanced Tips

- **No boots but Resistance Boots? Wrong.** Mulan's Heavy form is Unstoppable — she doesn't need Tenacity. Build Shadow Boots (影忍之足) for Physical lane dominance.
- **1.6% "Dream Crit" rune:** Swap 1 Mutation for 1 Calamity. That one lucky crit during Light form combo = unexpected level-1 First Blood.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs squishies and skillshot-reliant Heroes. Struggles vs sustain tanks who outlast her burst.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

musashi.overview:
# Musashi（宮本武藏） — Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter (Anti-Heal Duelist)
- **Lane:** Jungle / Clash Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 劍聖 (Sword Saint)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 宫本武藏)

> Musashi was reworked into a tempo-based Fighter/Assassin centered on **"Momentum" stacks** (max 2) and his S3 **"Duel to the Death"** — a 5-second **100% Grievous Wounds** (all healing blocked). He's the ultimate counter to sustain/lifesteal Heroes (Cao Cao, Cai Yan, Cheng Yaojin, Mi Yue, Erin).

---

## Core Mechanics

### Momentum (Stacks)

Max 2 stacks. Each enhanced AA consumes 1 stack:
- **2 Stacks (Dash Slash):** Forward dash + damage. Use to gap-close, chase, or dodge.
- **1 Stack (Execute Slash):** >50% HP target = double slash (main damage). <50% HP target = vertical slash with **%missing HP execute damage.**

Every enhanced AA reduces S1 and S2 cooldowns by 1 second.

### S1: Destroys All Projectiles

S1's sword wave **destroys ALL incoming projectiles** — Zhuge Liang S3, Marco Polo bullets, Hou Yi bird, Daji charm. Save S1 for critical projectile negation in teamfights.

### S3: 100% Anti-Heal (5 Seconds)

S3 locks onto a target (Unstoppable during cast). The target enters **"Duel to the Death"** — **ALL healing is blocked for 5 seconds.** This hard-counters sustain Heroes. Time S3 on the enemy healer or lifesteal carry at the start of every fight.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

Hard-counters: Cao Cao, Cai Yan, Cheng Yaojin, Mi Yue, Erin.
*Waiting for community input…*
musashi.tips:
# Musashi Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Momentum Management: Know Your Stacks

- **2 Stacks:** Dash AA — mobility, gap-close, dodge
- **1 Stack:** Execute AA — 50%+ HP = double slash; <50% HP = %missing HP execute

Time your enhanced AAs based on enemy HP. Use 2-stack to engage, then 1-stack to execute.

### 2. Every Enhanced AA Reduces Cooldowns

Each Momentum AA reduces S1 + S2 by 1 second. Constant weaving: **S2 → AA → S1 → AA → S2 → AA.** This is how Musashi achieves near-infinite ability cycling.

### 3. S1: Save for Projectile Destruction

S1 destroys ALL projectiles. Don't waste it for damage. Save it for: Zhuge Liang S3, Hou Yi bird, Daji charm, Marco S1. A well-timed S1 negates an entire enemy ultimate.

### 4. S3: 100% Anti-Heal (Your Win Condition)

S3 blocks ALL healing for 5 seconds. Priority targets for S3:
- The enemy healer (Cai Yan)
- The lifesteal carry (Cao Cao, Mi Yue, Cheng Yaojin)
- The ADC with Blood Weeper

Don't S3 the tank — S3 the sustain core and watch them die without their healing crutch.

### 5. Pre-Stack Momentum Before Fighting

Hit jungle camps or minions to build 1-2 stacks before ganking. Walk in with Momentum ready — immediate enhanced AA on contact.

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard Gank: **S2 → AA (2-stack) → S1 → AA (1-stack) → S3 → AA → S2 → AA**

1. S2 + 2-stack AA (dash in)
2. S1 + 1-stack AA (execute if <50%)
3. S3 lock + AA
4. S2 + AA (S2 refreshed from AA CD reduction)

### S3 Initiation: **S3 → AA (2-stack) → S2 → AA → S1 → AA**

1. S3 from bush or close range
2. 2-stack AA (dash to stick)
3. S2 through enemy + AA
4. S1 + AA finish

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3 is Unstoppable during the cast.** Use to ignore CC when engaging.
- **1-stack execute scales with missing HP.** The lower they are, the harder it hits.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs sustain comps. Struggles vs burst that kills before enhanced AA cycles.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

nakoruru.overview:
# Nakoruru（娜可露露） — Assassin

## Overview

- **Role:** Assassin (Burst / Tank Shredder)
- **Lane:** Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 鷹之守護 (Eagle's Guardian)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 娜可露露)

> Nakoruru is a classic high-burst, stat-check pure Assassin. She has one of the highest **%Max HP Physical Damage** values in the game — making her both a "squishy nightmare" AND a "tank shredder." Her entire burst revolves around her S1 mark: land it, then trigger it with other damage for devastating %HP explosions.

---

## Core Mechanics

### S1: %Max HP Mark (Core Damage)

S1 marks an enemy. When Nakoruru's AA or other abilities hit a marked target, it triggers **%Max HP Physical Damage**. This is why she destroys tanks — the more HP they have, the harder she hits.

### S2: Lifesteal Dash

S2 dashes forward. **Hitting enemy Heroes restores massive HP** (Minions/Monsters also heal, but only 30% effectiveness). At low HP, S2 through an enemy or jungle camp for emergency sustain.

### S3: Eagle Flight (Two-Stage)

Stage 1: Massive Movement Speed (flying). **You can cast S1 while flying!** Stage 2: Slam down dealing AoE damage + **reduces enemy damage output by 30%**. This DR is why Nakoruru can dive teams and survive.

### Economy > Everything

Nakoruru is extremely item-dependent. Before core items (Shadow Axe + Siege Breaker): farm jungle, take Dragons, clear waves. Don't force ganks. After core items: one-shot anyone.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
nakoruru.tips:
# Nakoruru Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Cast S1 While Flying (Crucial Mechanic)

Nakoruru can cast S1 **during S3's flight**. The correct sequence: **S3 (fly) → S1 (mark while airborne) → S3 slam down (triggers mark).** This is vastly faster than landing first then S1. The mark detonates instantly on landing.

### 2. Economy Is Everything

Nakoruru is a stat-check Assassin. Without core items (Shadow Axe + Siege Breaker), you're half a Hero. Priority: farm jungle → clear waves → take Dragons → only gank when it's free. Never force ganks pre-core items.

### 3. S3 Damage Reduction = Survival

S3's slam reduces enemy damage output by **30%**. Combined with Pure Sky active, Nakoruru has ~70% effective DR during dives. You can land in the middle of 3 enemies and walk out.

### 4. S2 Lifesteal: Hit Multiple Targets

S2 heals per enemy Hero hit. In teamfights, angle S2 to pass through 2-3 enemies for massive burst healing. Even jungle camps provide emergency sustain.

### 5. Weave Enhanced AAs Between Abilities

After every ability, Nakoruru's next AA is enhanced. For maximum damage: **S1 → AA → S2 → AA → S3 → AA**. Don't just dump abilities — the AAs add significant damage.

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard Airborne Execute: **S3 (fly) → S1 (airborne) → S3 (slam) → AA → S2 → AA**

1. S3 takeoff
2. S1 mark while flying
3. S3 slam (triggers mark + 30% DR)
4. Enhanced AA
5. S2 through enemy
6. Enhanced AA — dead

### Melee Brawl: **S1 → AA → S2 → AA → S3 → S3**

1. S1 mark → AA
2. S2 dash through → AA
3. S3 takeoff + immediate slam
4. For when enemies are already on top of you

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3 slam also slows.** Use it to trap enemies for your team.
- **Farm > kills pre-core items.** Nakoruru with a gold lead is unstoppable. Without gold, she's nothing.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs tanks (%HP damage) and squishies (burst). Struggles vs CC-heavy comps that cancel S3 or lock her on landing.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

nezha.overview:
# Nezha（哪吒） — Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter (Global Engage / Anti-Heal)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 桀驁炎槍 (Unruly Flame Spear)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 哪吒)

> Nezha is a strategically intimidating global-engage Fighter. His S3 lets him lock onto any enemy across the map, reveal all enemies, and fly directly to his target. He also applies the game's rare **True Damage burn + built-in Grievous Wounds (15% healing reduction)** on all damage dealt. He's a split-push menace and a backline's worst nightmare.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: True Damage Burn + Anti-Heal

All damage applies **Fire Lotus Seal** — continuous True Damage + **15% Healing Reduction**. This hard-counters sustain/lifesteal Heroes (Cheng Yaojin, Cai Yan, lifesteal ADCs).

### S1: Movement Speed per Enemy Hit

S1 spins and hits nearby enemies. **Each enemy Hero hit grants a Movement Speed stack** (max 5). Fight near minion waves for max stacks.

### S2: Dash + 15-20% Damage Reduction

S2 rolls behind the enemy and grants **15-20% DR**. Has 2 charges. **Don't burn both instantly.** Use first charge → enjoy 3s of DR → use second charge right before DR expires or when enemy dashes away.

### S3: Global Lock-On + Engage

Reveals ALL enemies (cancels their recalls), then fly to a chosen target. **Landing grants massive Tenacity + Fire Lotus Seal.** The threat of S3 alone forces enemies to play differently — you don't always need to fly.

### Split-Push Strategy (4-1)

Nezha is the best split-pusher because his S3 lets him join any fight instantly. Push a side lane → when a teamfight breaks out → S3 the enemy backline. This creates an unstoppable numbers advantage.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

Hard-counters: Cheng Yaojin, Cai Yan, lifesteal-reliant carries.
*Waiting for community input…*
nezha.tips:
# Nezha Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. S3: Don't "Fly to Your Death"

New Nezhas see a low-HP enemy and immediately fly. Result: land into 5 enemies and die. The correct S3 usage:
- **Split-push 4-1:** Push side lane → teamfight breaks → S3 onto enemy backline (not the tank)
- **Vision denial:** S3 reveals all enemies + cancels their recalls. Use before Dragon/Baron fights even if you don't fly
- **Cleanup:** Only fly when your team is already engaged or you're cleaning up a won fight

### 2. S2: Never Double-Cast Instantly

S2 has 2 charges. Each grants **3 seconds of 15-20% DR**. The mistake: burning both charges instantly wastes 3+ seconds of free damage reduction. Correct: S2 → wait 3s → S2 again.

### 3. S1: Max Movement Speed Stacks

Each enemy Hero hit by S1 grants a MS stack (max 5). In lane, fight inside minion waves. In teamfights, aim S1 into the densest area.

### 4. Anti-Heal Passive = Counter-Pick Value

Nezha's passive applies **15% Healing Reduction**. This stacks with items for even more anti-heal. He's the natural counter to Cheng Yaojin, Cai Yan, and lifesteal-reliant ADCs.

### 5. Split-Push Is Your Identity

Nezha can ALWAYS join fights thanks to S3. Abuse this: push the farthest lane from objectives. When enemies respond, your team takes Dragon. When they ignore you, you take towers.

---

## Signature Combos

### Global Backline Delete: **S3 → AA → S1 → S2 → AA → S2**

1. S3 onto enemy squishy (Erin, Hou Yi)
2. AA on landing (trigger on-hit effects)
3. S1 — max MS stacks from nearby enemies
4. S2 first charge → DR + reposition
5. AA weave
6. S2 second charge → seal their escape

### Lane Trade: **S2 → S1 → AA → S2 (retreat)**

1. S2 first charge in → DR activates
2. S1 + AA for damage
3. S2 second charge back to safety before DR expires
4. True Damage burn continues ticking while you disengage

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3 grants Tenacity on landing.** Combined with Resistance Boots, you cap Tenacity and ignore most CC.
- **Don't always fly.** The THREAT of S3 changes enemy behavior. Sometimes just revealing them is enough.
- **Matchup:** Dominates sustain-based comps. Struggles vs burst-heavy teams that delete you before DR matters.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

niu-mo.overview:
# Niu Mo（牛魔） — Tank / Support

## Overview

- **Role:** Tank / Support (Hard Engage / Bodyguard)
- **Lane:** Roaming
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 精英酋長 (Elite Chieftain)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 牛魔)

> Niu Mo is a classic hard-engage Tank Support with massive AoE CC and a powerful defensive passive. He's a universal pick that pairs well with burst ADCs and Assassins. His signature "S3 + Flash" can single-handedly win teamfights by knocking up the entire enemy backline.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Dual Defense Aura

When an ally is within 500 range, Niu Mo AND the lowest-HP nearby ally gain **massive Physical + Magic Defense.** Always stay near your carry — the passive is the difference between them surviving a dive or getting one-shot.

### S1: Weaken Enemy Output

S1 sweeps, reducing the **Physical AND Magic damage output** of enemies hit for 3 seconds. Always tag the enemy Assassin or carry with S1 during teamfights.

### S2: Charge + Knockup

S2 charges forward with a brief wind-up, knocking up and slowing enemies. Cast from bushes to hide the animation, or chain after ally CC.

### S3: The "Big Flash" (Signature Play)

S3 channels then slams the ground, creating a fissure that knocks up and leaves a burning trail (slow + damage). The channel is highly telegraphed — enemies WILL dodge it. The solution: **S3 + Flash.** Press S3, then Flash during the slam animation toward enemies. The knockup and fissure reposition with you.

### Reverse S3 + Flash

If enemies expect the forward engage: **aim S3 backward**, then Flash into them at the last instant. They'll think you whiffed — then they're airborne.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
niu-mo.tips:
# Niu Mo Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. S3 + Flash: The Only Engage You Need

S3's channel is slow and telegraphed. Enemies will walk out. The fix: **Press S3 → Flash during the slam animation toward enemies.** The knockup and fissure reposition with your Flash. This is undodgeable.

### 2. Reverse S3 + Flash (Mind Game)

If enemies are watching for the forward S3+Flash: **aim S3 backward**, let them think you missed → **Flash into them at the last instant.** They drop their guard, then they're airborne. Higher-ELO mind game.

### 3. Stay Glued to Your Carry

Passive only works within 500 range. If you wander off to ward or chase, your ADC loses massive dual defenses. **Laning phase: stay attached to your marksman.** Your passive makes them deceptively tanky.

### 4. S1 Tag the Biggest Threat

S1 reduces enemy damage output by a significant amount for 3 seconds. Priority targets:
- Enemy Assassin diving your carry
- Enemy Mage about to burst
- Enemy ADC outputting freely
Don't waste S1 on the tank.

### 5. S3 Fissure: Zone Control

Even if S3 misses, the burning trail persists for several seconds, dealing damage + **heavy slow.** In jungle corridors, use S3 to block escape paths or separate the enemy frontline from their backline.

---

## Signature Combos

### Perfect Teamfight Engage: **S3 + Flash → S2 → S1**

1. S3 + Flash → AoE knockup on enemy backline
2. S2 charge → second knockup + slow (chain CC)
3. S1 sweep → weaken enemy damage output
4. Team cleans up

### Defensive Counter-Engage: **S2 → S1 → S3**

1. Enemy Assassin dives your ADC
2. S2 knock them away
3. S1 sweep → reduce their damage
4. S3 at your ADC's feet → zone + damage + slow

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S2 can cross thin walls.** Use to escape or rotate through jungle.
- **S3's fissure blocks paths.** In Dragon/Baron pit fights, S3 across the entrance to trap enemies inside.
- **Matchup:** Universal — fits any team comp. Struggles vs hyper-mobile teams that easily dodge S3 (even with Flash).

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

nuwa.overview:
# Nuwa（女媧） — Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Mage (Artillery / Zone Control)
- **Lane:** Mid Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 至高創世 (Supreme Creator)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 女娲)

> Nuwa is a long-range artillery Mage with **global map presence**. Her unique scaling: every level increases her vision range, ability range, and AA range. Late-game, she controls the entire battlefield from beyond the enemy's sight. Her S2 matrix blocks create chain explosions, her S3 teleports across the map, and her S4 is a global-range laser with no distance limit.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Vision Scaling

Every level grants +3% vision + ability range + AA range. Late-game Nuwa out-ranges everyone.

### S1: Radiate (Push + Burst)

Pushes enemies back, then explodes in a cross shape. The cross intersection deals maximum damage. Use to: peel divers, push enemies into S2 matrices.

### S2: Create (Matrix Block)

Creates a rectangular block that blocks movement. Lasts 4 seconds. **Other abilities hitting the matrix trigger an explosion.** The matrix flashes before expiring — explosions still trigger at that moment.

### S3: Teleport (Global Rotate)

Long-range teleport. Passive: taking damage grants a shield + AoE slow + MS boost. Landing stuns enemies. Use for: cross-map ganks, escape, flanking.

### S4: Annihilate (Global Laser)

Pure damage laser with **zero range limit**. Can snipe low-HP enemies across the map, steal objectives, or clear distant waves.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
nuwa.tips:
# Nuwa Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. S2 Matrix Timing (Maximum Burst)

S2 matrices flash before expiring. If S1 or S4 hits the matrix at that moment, it **still explodes**. Pre-place matrices from bushes, wait for enemies to walk past, then S1 → trigger explosion for double damage.

### 2. S4: Global Laser (No Range Limit)

S4 has **zero range limit**. Constantly watch the minimap. When you see low-HP enemies recalling or escaping, S4 them. Also use to: steal Dragons, clear distant minion waves, finish teamfights from Mid Lane.

### 3. S1 Cross Intersection = Max Damage

S1's cross-shape explosion deals **maximum damage at the intersection point**. Aim the cross center directly on enemies or minion waves.

### 4. S3 Teleport Safety

S3 grants Unstoppable during channel, but **Suppression (Donghuang, Zhang Liang)** and **Daqiao's elevator** can interrupt it. Use three-finger camera drag to check the landing spot — never teleport into a bush blind.

### 5. Vision Scaling Wins Games

Every level = more vision + range. Play safe early. After level 12, you outrange nearly everyone. Late-game Nuwa is a god.

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard Burst: **S2 → S1 → S4**

1. S2 matrix behind or at enemy's feet
2. S1 pushes enemy into matrix → triggers explosion
3. S4 laser through both enemy and matrix → chain explosion → instant deletion

### Global Snipe: **Minimap Scan → S4**

1. Watch minimap for low-HP enemies
2. Three-finger drag to aim
3. S4 laser across the map → kill secure

### Flank Engage: **S3 (teleport) → S2 → S1 → S4**

1. S3 to flank or bush near enemy backline
2. Landing stuns → S2 block escape path
3. S1 push into matrix → S4 laser → team-wipe setup

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Matrix chain explosions:** Stack multiple S2 matrices together. One S1 can trigger all of them simultaneously.
- **S3 passive shield:** When taking damage, S3 grants a shield + slow nearby enemies + MS boost. It's your built-in escape tool.
- **Matchup:** Dominates immobile comps. Struggles vs hyper-mobile Assassins who can dodge S1 and flank past S2.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
nuwa.build:
