pan-gu.overview:
# Pan Gu（盤古） — Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter (Utility Jungler / Anti-Carry)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 破曉之神 (God of Dawn)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 盘古)

> Pan Gu is a highly strategic utility Fighter/Jungler. His signature mechanic is the game's unique **Disarm** — preventing enemies from using basic attacks. He's the absolute hard-counter to auto-attack-dependent heroes (Baili Xuance, Sima Yi, Fuzi, Hou Yi, Han Xin).

---

## Core Mechanics

### Pan Gu Axe Form (Core)

Has 10 durability. Basic attacks on enemy Heroes consume durability and apply **Bleed** (deals %Max Health Physical Damage every 0.5s). This is why Pan Gu clears jungle fast and wins early duels.

### Disarm (Signature Anti-Carry Mechanic)

The following apply **Disarm** (enemy cannot basic attack, only move/use abilities):
- S1 second-phase slam
- S2 grab
- S3 ultimate fissures

Disarm completely shuts down auto-attack carries and Assassins.

### Energy Arm Form

When Axe durability runs out or is manually charged. Basic attacks stack marks — at 5 stacks: **stun + bonus damage**. Cannot Disarm in this form. Revert to Axe form ASAP.

### Ultimate: Fissure Scaling

S3 creates ground fissures. **Each nearby ally adds +1 fissure (max 5)**. Never use S3 solo — in teamfights with 5 allies, cover the entire enemy backline with AoE Disarm.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
pan-gu.tips:
# Pan Gu Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Disarm = Absolute Counter

Disarm prevents enemies from basic attacking. Pan Gu hard-counters:
- **Baili Xuance, Sima Yi, Fuzi, Hou Yi, Han Xin** — any hero reliant on auto-attacks
- Apply Disarm via S1 (second slam), S2 (grab), or S3 (fissures)
- A Disarmed ADC is completely useless for the duration

### 2. S2 Lifesteal: Absurd Sustain

S2 marks enemies for 3 seconds. **Basic attacking marked targets restores % of Pan Gu's Max Health**. When low HP:
- S2 a Jungle Monster, Minion, or enemy tank
- Auto-attack relentlessly
- HP bar refills dramatically

### 3. S3 Ulimate: Go With Your Team

S3 fissures scale with allies: **+1 fissure per nearby ally (max 5)**. NEVER solo-ult — wait for teamfights. A 5-fissure ultimate blankets the entire enemy backline with AoE Disarm.

### 4. Axe vs Energy Arm Management

- **Axe form:** Bleed + Disarm. Your primary combat form.
- **Energy Arm:** No Disarm. Only use to stack 5 marks → stun → immediately switch back.
- Revert to Axe when safe — don't fight extended battles in Energy Arm.

### 5. Skill Priority

**Max S2 first, then S1. Take ultimate whenever available.** S2 is Pan Gu's sustain, Disarm, and dueling core.

---

## Signature Combo

### Standard Gank / Long-Range Engage: **S1 → S1 → S2 → AA → S3 → AA**

1. S1 leap → mid-air S1 again (second-phase lock-on slam) — gap-close + first Disarm
2. S2 grab on landing — second Disarm + lifesteal mark
3. Auto-attack to trigger lifesteal
4. When Disarm expires and enemy tries to retaliate/flee, S3 ultimate — third AoE Disarm + slow
5. Auto-attack to finish

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Disarm timing is everything:** Don't chain all your Disarms at once. Space them out to maximize the enemy's downtime.
- **Pre-fight S2 stack:** Mark a Jungle Monster with S2 before ganking — you enter with lifesteal already active.
- **Teamfight positioning:** Stay near your team for maximum S3 fissures. Solo-ulting wastes Pan Gu's strongest teamfight tool.
- **Matchup:** Destroys auto-attackers. Struggles against ability-based mages who don't need basic attacks (Gan & Mo, Angela).

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
pan-gu.build:
# Pan Gu Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Pan Gu's passive Bleed scales with **Max Health**. He needs Attack Speed for smooth auto-attack weaving and S2 lifesteal triggers. CN server consensus: **semi-tank Attack Speed bruiser** or **tank-jungle heavy HP build**.

---

## Recommended Semi-Tank Attack Speed Build

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Giant's Grip (巨人之握)** | Massive Max Health. Bleed synergizes with burn aura. HP directly amplifies passive %HP damage. |
| 2 | **Resistance Boots (抵抗之靴)** | Tenacity is mandatory — Pan Gu needs to melee auto-attack for S2 lifesteal. Getting CC-locked = death. |
| 3 | **Shadow Axe (暗影战斧)** | Core Fighter item: CDR, Attack, flat Penetration. Strong early dueling power. |
| 4 | **Doomsday (末世)** | **Pan Gu's power-spike item!** Axe Bleed + Doomsday's 8% Current HP on-hit = double %HP damage stacking. Melts tanks and Fighters. Attack Speed bonus makes post-Disarm auto-attacks silky smooth. |
| 5 | **Berserker's Armor (暴烈之甲)** | Physical Defense + Max Health. Taking hits grants up to +10% damage output and +10% Movement Speed — perfect for Pan Gu's skirmishing style. |
| 6 | **Eternal Night (永夜守护)** or **Magic Cloak (魔女斗篷)** | Magic defense. **Eternal Night:** burst-heal on taking magic damage, synergizes with S2 lifesteal for insane survival. **Magic Cloak:** sustained magic poke shield. |

pei.overview:
# Pei（裴擒虎） — Assassin

## Overview

- **Role:** Assassin (Early-Game Jungle Dominator)
- **Lane:** Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 六合虎拳 (Six-Harmony Tiger Fist)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 裴擒虎; nickname: "Tiger")

> Pei is the ultimate early-game jungle dominator. He starts with dual forms at level 1 (Human form = ranged poke; Tiger form = melee burst + execute). No need to wait for level 4 — his entire game plan is **invading enemy jungle at level 1-2**, snowballing economy, and crushing the enemy team before they can scale.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Dual Forms at Level 1

- **Human Form:** Ranged. AA deals bonus Magic Damage (ramps up). S2 grants shield + Attack Speed. Use for: poking, kiting, tower pushing.
- **Tiger Form:** Melee. Enhanced burst. S2 can wall-jump with a second cast. S1 is an **execute** (more damage at lower HP). Use for: gap-close, burst, finishing kills.

### Tiger S2: Wall Jump Double-Bounce

Tiger S2 charges toward a wall. **Press S2 again or pull joystick on wall contact** for a second, longer jump with double damage. This is Pei's signature mobility tool — wall-hop ganks, jungle invades, and escapes.

### Tiger S1: Execute — Never Open With It

Tiger S1 deals bonus damage based on **target's missing HP**. NEVER use it at the start of a combo — it's your finishing move.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
pei.tips:
# Pei Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Level 1: Invade or Die Trying

Pei is one of the strongest level-1 Heroes. At match start:
- **If your Mid/Support are strong early:** immediately invade enemy Red/Blue
- **If your team is weak early:** farm your own jungle, but at level 2 (both forms ready) immediately contest river crab or gank side lane

Pei's win condition is **choking the enemy jungler before level 4**. Don't afk farm.

### 2. Tiger S2 Wall-Jump (Signature Mobility)

Tiger S2 charges toward a wall. **Press S2 again or pull joystick on contact** for a second, longer jump. This lets Pei:
- Wall-hop for creative gank angles
- Escape over walls after invading
- Chase fleeing enemies across terrain

Practice the timing — it's Pei's highest-skill mechanic.

### 3. Tiger S1 = Execute, NEVER Opener

Tiger S1 deals damage based on **target's missing HP**. Always use it LAST in your combo — it's an execute, not a poke tool. Opening with S1 wastes most of its damage.

### 4. Push Towers After Ganks

Pei is a Marksman in disguise. After a successful gank, **don't go farm your jungle — push the tower**. Human form S2 grants Attack Speed. Your tower damage is surprisingly high.

### 5. Skill Priority

**Max S2 first, then S1. Take ultimate whenever available.** Human S2 = shield + AS. Tiger S2 = mobility + burst. Level 2 gives more value than any other skill.

---

## Signature Combos

### Long-Range Ambush: **Human S2 → S3 (transform) → Tiger S2 (wall-jump) → AA → S1**

1. Human S2 shield + AS buff
2. Transform to Tiger (bonus MS + enhanced AA ready)
3. Tiger S2 wall-jump to close distance (double-bounce if possible)
4. Enhanced AA (bite) on landing
5. Tiger S1 execute to finish

### Melee Brawl: **Tiger S2 → AA → S1 → S3 (transform) → Human AA → S1**

1. Tiger S2 jump in → AA
2. S1 if they're low enough
3. Transform back to Human if they start kiting
4. Human AA + S1 ranged poke while walking backward

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Red Buff is mandatory on Pei.** The slow + true damage burn makes Human form kiting unescapable.
- **Tower pushing is your secondary job.** Human S2 + AS melts towers. Don't just jungle — siege.
- **Late game fall-off:** Pei is an early-mid game hero. If the game goes past 15 minutes, shift to Human form poke and tower pressure.
- **Matchup:** Destroys scaling junglers who need level 4. Struggles vs early-game duelists who can match his invade.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
pei.build:
# Pei Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Pei needs **Physical Penetration, Attack Speed, and the Siege Breaker execute threshold**. He's a hybrid Marksman-Assassin — builds reflect his dual-form playstyle. CN server consensus: **lightning burst + on-hit**.

---

## Recommended Jungle Build

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Greedy Bite (贪婪之噬)** | Standard Assassin jungle item: Attack, CDR, Penetration. |
| 2 | **Berserker's Boots (急速战靴)** | Attack Speed dramatically smooths Human form kiting and jungle clear. *Mid-late: swap to Resistance Boots (抵抗之靴) vs heavy CC.* |
| 3 | **Shadow Axe (暗影战斧)** | Core squishy-killer: CDR, Health, flat Physical Penetration. |
| 4 | **Doomsday (末世)** | **Pei's core item!** Human form's rapid AA and Tiger form's enhanced AA perfectly trigger Doomsday's 8% Current HP on-hit damage. Also provides essential Physical Lifesteal sustain. |
| 5 | **Master's Power (宗师之力)** | "Power Strike" passive procs on the first AA after transforming — this single hit chunks 50%+ of squishy HP. Bonus MS on proc for chase/escape. |
| 6 | **Siege Breaker (破军)** or **Pure Sky (纯净苍穹)** | **Siege Breaker:** snowballing — Tiger S1 execute threshold becomes lethal. **Pure Sky:** even games — active DR for survival. **Star Breaker (碎星锤):** vs armor stacking. |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

Core needs: **Attack Speed, Movement Speed, Physical Penetration.** All three are mandatory.

### Setup 1: "Hunt 100-Pen" (CN Standard)

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |
|------|------|-----|----------------|
| 🔴 Red | Mutation (异变) | ×10 | Physical Attack +2, Physical Pen +3.6 |
| 🟢 Green | Eagle Eye (鹰眼) | ×10 | Physical Attack +0.9, Physical Pen +6.4 |
| 🔵 Blue | Hunt (狩猎) | ×10 | Attack Speed +1%, Move Speed +1% |

**Total:** +29 Physical Attack, **+100 Physical Penetration**, +10% Attack Speed, **+10% Movement Speed**.

### Setup 2: "AS Threshold Mix" (Smoother AA Feel)

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |
|------|------|-----|----------------|
| 🔴 Red | Mutation (异变) | ×8 | Physical Attack +2, Physical Pen +3.6 |
| 🔴 Red | Red Moon (红月) | ×2 | Attack Speed +1.6%, Critical Rate +0.5% |
| 🟢 Green | Eagle Eye (鹰眼) | ×10 | Physical Attack +0.9, Physical Pen +6.4 |
| 🔵 Blue | Hunt (狩猎) | ×10 | Attack Speed +1%, Move Speed +1% |

**Total:** +100 Physical Penetration, **+13.2% Attack Speed**, +10% Movement Speed, +1% Critical Rate. Hits a smoother AA breakpoint for early-game invades.

### Setup 3: "Reave Sustain" (Solo Jungle)

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |
|------|------|-----|----------------|
| 🔴 Red | Mutation (异变) | ×10 | Physical Attack +2, Physical Pen +3.6 |
| 🟢 Green | Eagle Eye (鹰眼) | ×10 | Physical Attack +0.9, Physical Pen +6.4 |
| 🔵 Blue | Hunt (狩猎) | ×7 | Attack Speed +1%, Move Speed +1% |
| 🔵 Blue | Reave (夺萃) | ×3 | Physical Lifesteal +1.6% |

**Total:** +100 Physical Penetration, +7% Attack Speed, +7% Movement Speed, **+4.8% Physical Lifesteal**. Healthy jungle clears without needing Support.

---

## Power Curve

| Phase | Strength |
|-------|----------|
| Level 1-3 | **God tier** — strongest early invader |
| Level 4-12 | **Strong** — gank + push rhythm |
| Late game (15min+) | **Falls off** — shift to Human poke + tower pressure |

prince-of-lanling.overview:
# Prince of Lanling（蘭陵王） — Assassin

## Overview

- **Role:** Assassin (Stealth / Psychological Warfare)
- **Lane:** Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 暗影刀鋒 (Shadow Blade)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 兰陵王)

> The Prince of Lanling is a strategically terrifying Stealth Assassin. His core mechanic is near-permanent invisibility — he applies psychological pressure just by existing. Enemy carries see the "!" warning over their heads and must play defensively or risk instant deletion. He's an early-game monster who can snowball games out of control before the enemy team can scale.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Face-Toward-Enemy Speed Boost

Moving **toward an enemy Hero** grants **+20% Movement Speed** (trail effect behind him). This passive doubles as a **bush-check tool**: walk toward a suspicious bush — if you suddenly speed up, someone's inside.

### Stealth: The "!" Mind Game

Lanling's S3/ultimate grants long-duration stealth. Enemies within a certain radius see a **flashing "!" above their head**. If Lanling stays inside that radius for >3 seconds, stealth breaks. **Sometimes the threat of engagement is stronger than engaging.** Walk near enemies to zone them off CS, then leave without attacking. The psychological damage is real.

### S2: Delayed Execute

S2 marks enemies. Follow-up AA/ability **stuns for 1s and heals Lanling**. When the mark expires, it deals **24% of the target's missing HP as Physical Damage** — a built-in execute. After a full combo, walk away confidently even if they're at 5% HP. The mark will finish them.

### Post-Stealth AS Boost

Breaking stealth grants **+50% Attack Speed** briefly. When farming jungle: enter stealth → immediately break it → enjoy the AS boost for faster clears.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
prince-of-lanling.tips:
# Prince of Lanling Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Psychological Warfare: The "!" Is Your Weapon

When you're stealthed near enemies, they see "!" above their heads. Sometimes **don't attack.** Just walk near them. They'll: forfeit CS, burn Flashes, huddle under tower. You zone them without spending a single cooldown. This is Lanling's highest-level skill.

### 2. Passive = Free Bush-Check

Moving toward an enemy grants +20% MS. When approaching a suspicious bush at an angle, if you suddenly speed up → someone's inside. No ability needed.

### 3. S2 Execute: Walk Away Confidently

S2 mark deals **24% missing HP damage** on expiration. After a full combo, if the enemy is at ~5-10% HP, just walk away. The mark will kill them. Don't overstay for one extra AA and get collapsed on.

### 4. Fastest Guaranteed Kill Combo: **S2 → S1 → S3 → AA**

S2 mark (slow) → S1 immediately (guaranteed stun because S2 was already applied) → S3 dash through → AA. This combo has zero delay — enemies can't Flash or Stasis between hits. The most reliable deletion sequence.

### 5. Post-Stealth AS Boost for Farming

Breaking stealth grants +50% AS. When clearing jungle: stealth → immediately break stealth with an ability → enjoy the AS boost. Significantly faster clears.

### 6. Skill Priority

**Max S2 first, then S1. Take S3 whenever available.** S2 is core: more damage, lower CD, more healing.

---

## Signature Combos

### Guaranteed Delete: **S2 → S1 → S3 → AA**

1. Stealth → approach
2. S2 mark + slow
3. S1 — guaranteed stun (S2 mark already applied)
4. S3 dash through
5. AA — they're dead or the S2 mark will finish them

### Long-Range Chase: **S2 → S3 → S1 → AA**

1. S2 mark from range
2. S3 long dash (stuns + closes gap)
3. S1 + AA to finish
*Risk: if S3 misses, you're exposed with no escape.*

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Lanling is an early-game monster, late-game minion.** End games before 15 minutes or you fall off hard.
- **Don't engage tanks.** Your mission is the enemy ADC and Mage. Nothing else matters.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs immobile squishies. Struggles vs tanky comps late game.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
prince-of-lanling.build:

> **Build philosophy:** Pure burst. Skills have massive **Bonus AD scaling** — stack Physical Attack. Early-game monster, falls off late. Must guarantee one-shot on squishies.

## Recommended Jungle Burst Build

|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Greedy Bite (贪婪之噬)** | Standard Assassin jungle item: Attack, Penetration, CDR, MS. |
| 2 | **Resistance Boots (抵抗之靴)** | Mandatory. Lanling is paper — getting CC'd on engage = instant death. |
| 3 | **Shadow Axe (暗影战斧)** | Core first major item. 15% CDR, flat Penetration, Health. Early gank power spike. |
| 4 | **Siege Breaker (破军)** | **Lanling's soul item!** Massive AD amplifies all skills. +30% vs <50% HP **stacks multiplicatively with S2's 24% missing-HP execute** — absurd kill threshold. |
| 5 | **Master's Power (宗师之力)** or **Pure Sky (纯净苍穹)** | **Master's Power:** S2→AA one-shots. **Pure Sky:** active DR for teamfight dives. |
| 6 | **Star Breaker (碎星锤)** or **Fate's Edge (名刀·司命)** | **Star Breaker:** 40% Penetration vs armor. **Fate's Edge:** fatal-damage immunity. |

*(Red + Green unchanged)*

## Power Curve

| Phase | Strength |

princess-frost.overview:
# Princess Frost（王昭君） — Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Mage (Zone Control / Teamfight Engine)
- **Lane:** Mid Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 冰雪之華 (Frost Bloom)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 王昭君)

> Princess Frost is a dominant zone-control Mage with massive AoE CC and high burst. She's a "teamfight engine" — her S2 freeze and S3 blizzard can single-handedly win fights. More than raw damage, her strength is in **prediction, zoning, and battlefield control.**

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Frost Shield

After exiting combat, gains a shield. When broken, deals AoE damage + slow. This is your "trading tool" — walk forward with shield up, AA the enemy, the shield absorbs trade damage.

### S2: Freeze (Soul Skill)

S2 has a delay — **never cast directly at a moving enemy's feet.** Technique: S1 slow first → predict their escape path → S2 there. From bush or after S1, it's nearly undodgeable.

### S3: Blizzard (Zone Control)

Massive AoE with continuous damage. Don't just use for kills — use to: **zone enemies off objectives, protect your ADC, block choke points, or force enemies to walk around it.**

### S1: Bush Check + Slow

S1 has wide detection range + slow. Approaching a suspicious bush? S1 first. If the slow procs or your shield breaks, someone's inside.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
princess-frost.tips:
# Princess Frost Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. S2: Never Cast at Moving Feet

S2 has a delay. Enemies walking will dodge it. Technique: **S1 slow first → predict their escape path → S2 ahead of them.** Or cast from bush (they can't see the cast animation).

### 2. S3: Zone, Don't Just Kill

S3's massive AoE is a zoning tool as much as a damage tool. Use S3 to:
- Block enemy retreat paths in jungle corridors
- Protect your ADC (drop S3 on top of them when dived)
- Zone enemies off Dragon/Baron
- Force enemies to walk around — splitting their formation

### 3. Passive Shield: Trade Aggressively

Your shield absorbs damage and explodes when broken. Walk forward with shield up, AA the enemy laner — their trade damage hits your shield, you get free poke in return. Once shield breaks, play safe until it regenerates.

### 4. S1 Bush Check

S1 has wide detection. Throw S1 into suspicious bushes. If enemies are inside: the slow procs OR your passive shield breaks. Never face-check — always S1 first.

### 5. Anti-Dive S3 + S2

When an Assassin dives you: **S3 at your feet → S2 yourself.** The Assassin must stand in the blizzard to attack you. If S2 freezes them, they take amplified damage and die in the storm.

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard Lockdown: **S1 → S2 → S3**

1. S1 slow (makes S2 undodgeable)
2. S2 freeze (predict ahead)
3. S3 full damage on frozen target

### Bush Ambush: **S2 → S1 → S3**

1. S2 from bush (zero cast-animation warning)
2. S1 + S3 immediately
3. Frozen target takes amplified damage — squishies die before thawing

### Self-Defense: **S3 → S2 → S1**

1. Assassin dives you
2. S3 at your feet (they must stand in it)
3. S2 yourself (freeze them in the storm)
4. S1 finish

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Frozen targets take bonus S2 damage.** Always follow a successful freeze with S1+S3 for maximum burst.
- **S3's slow stacks with items (Frost Breath).** Enemies in your blizzard are practically rooted.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs immobile comps and objective fights. Struggles vs hyper-mobile Assassins who dash past S2.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

sakeer.overview:
# Sakeer（桑啟） — Support

## Overview

- **Role:** Support (Healer / Mobility Enchanter)
- **Lane:** Roaming
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 螢火之旅 (Firefly Journey)
- **Region:** CN server exclusive (桑启)

> Sakeer is a powerful hybrid healer Support. His core mechanics: **Fireflies** that auto-heal allies or damage enemies, and his S2 that lets him **fly to any bush** (up to 3 charges). He can create his own bush with S3, then fly to it — giving him on-demand mobility anywhere. His healing scales with **Max HP**, so he builds pure tank.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Hold AA to Heal

When no enemies are nearby, **hold the AA button** to continuously heal yourself or the lowest-HP nearby ally. Zero Mana cost. Walk while holding — heal your team between fights.

### S2: Fly to Any Bush (Up to 3 Charges)

S2 lets Sakeer fly to any bush in range. Stores up to 3 charges. During flight: **drops healing fireflies along the path.** In jungle fights, bounce between bushes like a pinball — enemies can't catch you, allies stay healed.

### S1: Ground Slam (Knockup + Burst Heal)

S1 slams the ground. **With Firefly charges:** deals AoE knockup + **massive burst heal to nearby allies.** Save for: peeling Assassins off carries, or combo with S3 for big team heal.

### S3: Create a Bush (15s Duration)

S3 creates a bush that lasts 15 seconds, spawning fireflies every second. **Sakeer can S2-fly to his own bush.** This gives him on-demand mobility anywhere — even in open lanes with no terrain bushes.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
sakeer.tips:
# Sakeer Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Hold AA to Heal (Walk While Healing)

When no enemies nearby: **hold the AA button** while walking. You'll continuously heal the lowest-HP ally (or yourself). Zero Mana cost. Use between fights, during rotations, while your ADC farms.

### 2. S2: Bounce Between Bushes (Never Get Caught)

S2 stores 3 charges. In jungle fights: S2 → bush A → S2 → bush B → S2 → bush C. You're untouchable while dropping healing fireflies the entire time.

### 3. S3 + S2: On-Demand Mobility Anywhere

S3 creates a bush. S2 can fly to it. In open lanes with no terrain bushes: **S3 → S2 to your own bush.** Free engage or escape tool anywhere on the map.

### 4. S1: Save for Peel or Big Heal

S1 is your only hard CC (knockup). Don't waste it for minor poke. Save for: knocking an Assassin off your ADC, or the massive burst heal when allies are low.

### 5. S3 → S2 → S1: The Signature Engage/Save

S3 a bush on the enemy backline (or at your ally's feet) → S2 fly to it → S1 slam immediately on landing. Knockup + massive heal + you're now in position.

---

## Signature Combos

### Long-Range Engage/Save: **S3 → S2 → S1**

1. S3 create a bush at target location
2. S2 fly to your bush (drops healing fireflies en route)
3. S1 slam on landing (knockup + burst heal)
4. Perfect for: engaging, saving a distant ally, or contesting objectives

### Jungle Kiting: **S2 → S2 → S2 → Hold AA**

1. S2 to bush A, S2 to bush B, S2 to bush C
2. Bounce between bushes — enemies chase shadows
3. Hold AA between flights to heal allies

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S1 heal scales with Firefly charges.** Wait for S3's fireflies to accumulate before S1 for maximum burst heal.
- **S2 can be interrupted by CC mid-flight.** Resistance Boots reduce this risk.
- **Matchup:** God-tier in jungle-heavy fights (many bushes). Struggles in open-lane fights without S3 available.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

shangguan.overview:
# Shangguan（上官婉兒） — Assassin / Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Assassin / Mage (Dive Burst)
- **Lane:** Mid Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★★★
- **Title:** 驚鴻之筆 (Startling Brushstroke)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 上官婉儿)

> Shangguan is an extremely high-skill-cap Magic Assassin. Her core mechanics are **Ink Collision** (S1 + S2 intersecting explosions) and her ultimate's **5-dash unlock → invincible aerial barrage**. Many beginners think she just needs to go airborne — but the real burst comes from ground-level ink collision explosions.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Ink Collision (True Burst Source)

When S1 and S2 intersect, or when Shangguan dashes (S3) over ink, they trigger an **explosion that restores HP**. Mastering ground-level collisions is what separates good Shangguans from button-mashers.

### Enhanced Auto-Attack (Early Laning)

Every third auto-attack becomes a penetrating line shot. Use this for efficient wave clear and lane poke before level 4.

### S3 "Brake" (Pause Mid-Dash)

During S3's dash sequence, **release the left joystick** — the dash timer **pauses (up to 3 seconds)**. Use this gap to: weave auto-attacks, wait for S1/S2 cooldowns, or reposition.

### S3 Collision Damage

The first 4 dashes deal massive damage if they **pass through enemy Heroes**. Don't just dash for distance — dash THROUGH targets.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
shangguan.tips:
# Shangguan Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Ground Collisions > Aerial Barrage

Many beginners just want to go airborne. But **S1+S2 ink collisions and S3 dash-through-enemy damage** are her REAL burst. The aerial phase is the finisher, not the main damage.

### 2. S3 Brake (The #1 Advanced Mechanic)

During S3 dashes, **release the left joystick** to pause the dash timer (max 3 seconds). Use this to:
- Weave enhanced auto-attacks between dashes
- Wait for S1/S2 cooldowns
- Reposition
- Bait enemy Flashes before continuing the dash

### 3. Don't Start S3 from Too Far

If you dash from long range, the 10 aerial bolts get **split among Minions, tanks, and the target**. Instead: close distance first, then initiate S3 for concentrated burst on the backline.

### 4. Dash Through Enemies

S3's first 4 dashes deal massive damage when they **pass through enemy Heroes**. Don't dash around them — dash THROUGH them.

### 5. Skill Priority

**Max S1 first, then S2. Take ultimate whenever available.** S1 has more reliable line burst and better wave clear.

---

## Signature Combos

### Basic Long-Range Takeoff: **S2 → S3 → S3 → S1 → S3 → S3 → S3**

1. S2 behind you
2. S3 → dash twice following S2's ink return path
3. S1 toward enemy
4. S3 → dash three times following S1's ink direction
5. Airborne → 10 bolts rain down

### Instant Close-Range: **S2 → S1 → S3 → dash forward ×5**

1. S2 + S1 at point-blank range
2. S3 → push joystick straight forward 5 times
3. Instant multiple collisions + airborne
4. No time for enemy to react

### CN Server "Brake & Chase": **S2 → S3 → S3 → Brake → AA → S1 → S3 → S3 → S3**

1. S2, dash twice
2. **Release joystick (brake)** — weave enhanced AA + S2 damage
3. Wait for enemy Flash/dash
4. S1 in their escape direction → dash 3 times → airborne → finish

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Splendor (Stasis) is mandatory:** You're vulnerable after landing. Stasis active → sell → buy resurrection/Fate's Edge in the shop during stasis.
- **Practice in Training Mode:** Drill "2331333" until muscle memory. Then add brakes.
- **Matchup:** Destroys immobile squishies. Struggles vs instant point-and-click CC (Zhang Liang, Daji) that cancels S3 mid-dash.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
shangguan.build:
# Shangguan Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Dive-backline burst Assassin. **Max Magic Penetration + high Magic Attack.** Latest meta: one defensive item to survive post-landing. CN server consensus: **penetration burst with Stasis survival**.

---

## Recommended Burst Build

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Calm Boots (冷静之靴)** | Early S3 cooldown reduction for frequent ganks and tower dives. *Late game: swap to Resistance Boots (抵抗之靴) to avoid getting CC-cancelled during ground dashes.* |
| 2 | **Echo Staff (回响之杖)** | Movement Speed for roaming + explosion on ability hit. Stacks perfectly with ink collision burst. |

| 5 | **Sunset Flow (日暮之流)** or **Devourer's Tome (噬神之书)** | **Sunset Flow:** S3 multi-hit fully stacks penetration instantly vs tanky teams. **Devourer's Tome:** Lifesteal for sustained map pressure and wave clear. |
| 6 | **Splendor (辉月)** | **Ultimate survival tool.** Stasis on landing = you're not a free kill. During Stasis: sell Splendor → buy Sage's Sanctuary or Fate's Edge in the shop. |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

Core needs: **Magic Penetration, Movement Speed (roaming), mild Attack Speed (smoother S3 brake auto-attacks).**

### Setup 1: CN Server "88-Pen Hunt Speed" (Standard)

| 🟢 Green | Mind's Eye (心眼) | ×10 | Attack Speed +0.6%, Magic Penetration +6.4 |
| 🔵 Blue | Hunt (狩猎) | ×10 | Attack Speed +1%, Move Speed +1% |

**Total:** +42 Magic Attack, **+88 Magic Penetration**, +16% Attack Speed, **+10% Movement Speed**.

### Setup 2: "Harmony Hybrid" (Safer Laning)

shen-mengxi.overview:
# Shen Mengxi（沈夢溪） — Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Mage (Artillery / Early-Game Tempo)
- **Lane:** Mid Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 爆彈怪貓 (Explosive Cat)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 沈梦溪; nickname: "Bomb Cat")

> Shen Mengxi is a dominant early-game tempo Mage. He has terrifying wave-clear speed, extreme cross-map rotation capability, and late-game backline HP pressure that makes enemy carries unplayable. His core mechanics are **Bomb Charges** and **Ignite passive** (abilities ignite enemies; auto-attacking ignited targets deals bonus Magic Damage + slow).

---

## Core Mechanics

### Ignite Passive (Don't Forget Auto-Attacks!)

S1 and S3 ignite enemies on hit, revealing them. **Always follow up with an auto-attack on ignited targets** — that AA deals massive bonus Magic Damage + slow. This is the secret to early first-blood kills.

### S2: Speed Boost + Manual Cancel

S2 grants explosive Movement Speed. After 5 seconds, it auto-ends with a roll + knockback. But you can **press S2 again to cancel early** — this refunds unused bomb charge time, letting you use S2 purely for a free speed boost.

### S2 + S1 = Guaranteed Hit

While S2 is active, S1 becomes a **lock-on bomb**. If an enemy is in range, S1 **always hits** and **always knocks back on the first hit**. vs diving Assassins (Lam, Jing): S2 → run away → S1 to knock them back.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
shen-mengxi.tips:
# Shen Mengxi Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Always AA Ignited Targets

S1 and S3 ignite enemies. Auto-attacking ignited targets deals **massive bonus Magic Damage + slow**. This is your early-game kill secret. In level 1-3 skirmishes, S1 → AA can secure first blood.

### 2. S2 Manual Cancel

S2 grants Movement Speed for 5 seconds, then auto-rolls. **Press S2 again to cancel early** — this refunds unused bomb charge time. Use S2 purely as a free speed boost between lanes.

### 3. S2 + S1 = Guaranteed Knockback

While S2 is active, S1 becomes lock-on and **always knocks back on first hit**. vs diving Assassins:
- S2 away from them
- S1 behind you (lock-on knockback)
- Perfectly cancels their engage

### 4. S2 + S3 Double Displacement

If you cast S3 (ultimate charge) while S2's timer is about to expire, Shen Mengxi **rolls forward at the same moment the bomb drops** — creating extreme-range bombardment while simultaneously creating distance from divers.

### 5. Skill Priority

**Max S1 first, then S2. Take ultimate whenever available.** S1 is core wave-clear and poke — max it first.

---

## Signature Combos

### Level 2 Gank: **S2 → S1 → AA → AA → S2 (roll/knockback)**

1. S2 speed into side lane
2. S1 lock-on knockback + ignite
3. AA ×2 for bonus ignite damage
4. S2 ends → roll directionally to knock fleeing enemy back toward your laner

### Late-Game Artillery: **S3 → S3 → S2 → S1**

1. Pre-fight: charge S3 from fog of war → bomb enemy backline
2. Second S3 when teamfight starts → enemy ADC/Mage now at 30% HP
3. S2 in → S1 lock-on finish remaining targets

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Vision control:** Ignited enemies are revealed. Use S1 to check bushes — if the bomb auto-targets, someone's there.
- **Never face-check:** Shen Mengxi is squishy. Always S1 bushes before walking past them.
- **Ultimate is global pressure:** Even if you can't kill, S3 from across the map forces enemies to recall.
- **Matchup:** Excels against immobile backlines. Struggles vs hyper-mobile Assassins who dodge S3.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
shen-mengxi.build:

shi.overview:
# Shi（西施） — Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Mage (Control / Utility)
- **Lane:** Mid Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 幻紗之靈 (Spirit of Illusory Silk)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 西施)

> Shi is a strategically dominant control Mage. Her core mechanic revolves around S1's **"Silk Bind"** — a forced movement command that controls enemy Hero positioning. She's the team's absolute engagement tool and a nightmare for squishy carries.

---

## Core Mechanics

### S1: Silk Bind (纱缚·抽丝)

Shi throws silk to a target area. If it hits an enemy Hero, within 5 seconds she can press S1 again to **force that Hero to walk in a chosen direction**. This is one of the most oppressive forced-movement abilities in the game.

### S2: Flowing Silk (流纱·聚束)

Throws an energy orb that deals continuous AoE damage (inner circle deals double). Explodes after 2 seconds.

### Ultimate: Undistracted Heart (心无旁骛)

On activation: grants decaying **+80% Movement Speed for 1 second**, **instantly resets S2 cooldown**, and **doubles S1's control to 2 pulls** instead of 1.

### Pull Direction Matters

- **Ganking/Engage:** Pull enemies toward your team or into your tower
- **Self-defense:** Pull diving Assassins (Lam, Jing, Fey) away from yourself, or into your S2 orb center for bonus damage

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
shi.tips:
# Shi Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. S1 Accuracy = Everything

Shi's entire kit revolves around landing S1. It has a noticeable cast delay — skilled opponents will dodge it easily. Always **cast S2 first** to slow the enemy, making S1 nearly undodgeable. Then S1 → pull.

### 2. Pull Direction Dictates Outcomes

- **Ganking:** Pull enemies toward your team or into your tower
- **Self-defense vs divers:** Pull Assassins (Lam, Jing, Fey) **away** from yourself
- **Damage maximization:** Pull enemies into your S2 orb center (inner circle = double damage + bonus S1 interaction damage)

### 3. Ultimate Maximizes Control

S3 grants **+80% decaying MS**, **resets S2**, and **doubles S1 pulls to 2**. Never use S1's second pull until you've positioned the enemy perfectly — the 5-second window gives you time to adjust.

### 4. Skill Priority

**Max S2 first, then S1. Take ultimate whenever available.** S2 is Shi's core wave-clear and poke tool — maxing it enables fast roaming.

---

## Signature Combos

### Core Gank Combo: **S2 → S1 → S3 → S1 (pull) → S1 (pull) → S2**

1. S2 slow → S1 bind
2. **Immediately S3** (refreshes S2, enhances S1 to 2 pulls)
3. First S1 pull — drag enemy toward team
4. Second S1 pull — drag them further into death
5. Refreshed S2 to finish

### Double Orb Burst: **S1 → S2 → S3 → S2 → S1 (pull)×2**

1. S1 bind
2. Drop first S2 orb
3. S3 — refresh S2, drop second orb (two orbs bombarding simultaneously)
4. Pull enemy back and forth between both orbs for maximum damage

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Don't hold S1.** The cooldown is short. Constantly fish for binds from bushes or on enemy movement paths — one hit = one kill window.
- **Bush camping:** Shi is terrifying from fog of war. Enemies can't dodge what they can't see coming.
- **Peel for your ADC:** S1 is just as powerful defensively. Pull divers off your backline.
- **Matchup:** Excels against immobile mages and marksmen. Struggles against long-range artillery (Gan & Mo) who outrange her S1.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
shi.build:
# Shi Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Two paths — **Semi-Tank Utility (mainstream)** and **Full Damage Burst**. Most high-ranked CN players prefer utility: Shi's job is landing S1 pulls; her team provides the damage. Semi-tank massively improves survival.

---

## Build 1: Semi-Tank Utility (Recommended)

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Calm Boots (冷静之靴)** | Early CDR for frequent S1 fishing and roaming. |
| 2 | **Mask of Agony (痛苦面具)** | Utility Mage's core item. S2's multi-hit damage perfectly triggers Mask's percentage HP burn repeatedly. |
| 3 | **Frost Breath (凝冰之息)** | Massive control amplification. S2 + Frost Breath makes enemies nearly immobile inside the orb — S1 becomes undodgeable. |
| 4 | **Rising Sun (旭日初光)** or **Ominous Premonition (不祥征兆)** | Defensive flex. Rising Sun: shields self + lowest ally on hit (perfect for protector role). Ominous Premonition: vs heavy physical dive. |
| 5 | **Magic Cloak (魔女斗篷)** | Magic defense + spell shield. Prevents getting one-shot by magic assassins (Mai Shiranui, Shangguan Wan'er). |
| 6 | **Sunset Flow (日暮之流)** or **Void Staff (虚无法杖)** | Penetration filler. Sunset Flow's multi-hit passive stacks instantly from S2 ticks. |

Best when your team lacks magic damage. A late-game double-orb combo with Savant's Wrath can solo-kill enemy carries.

shouyue.overview:
# Shouyue（百裡守約） — Assassin / Marksman

## Overview

- **Role:** Assassin / Marksman (Long-Range Sniper)
- **Lane:** Farm Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★★☆
- **Title:** 靜謐之眼 (Eye of Silence)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 百里守约)

> Shouyue is a uniquely polarizing Marksman with the longest straight-line snipe range in the game. His AAs cannot crit — instead, **Critical Rate converts directly to Physical Attack**. The latest rework dramatically improved his AA mechanics, splitting the playerbase into two styles: "Charged Snipe" and "AA Speed." The AA Speed build currently has the highest winrate.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Camouflage + Penetration Stacking

Moving along walls/towers/bushes grants **Camouflage + massive Movement Speed**. Standing still stacks **Physical Penetration** per second (max 5 stacks). Before sniping: stand still for max pen.

### S1: Vision Wins Games

Place 3 vision wards. Never drop all at your feet — place at: river bushes, Dragon/Baron pit, enemy jungle crossroads. These reveal invisible Heroes (Lanling Wang, Ake).

### S2: Reverse Flick Snipe

While aiming S2, the red laser is visible to enemies. Pro technique: **aim backward first**, then at the last millisecond **flick toward the enemy** — they have zero time to dodge.

### Point-Blank S2 = 100% Hit

If an Assassin dives you, don't aim. **Tap S2 instantly at point-blank** → guaranteed hit. Combo: S2 (instant) → AA → S3 (backward leap).

### Don't Be a "Peripheral Sniper"

Many Shouyue players spend entire fights scoped in, turning teamfights into 4v5. **The reworked Shouyue's AAs deal massive damage.** When enemies are in AA range, USE your AAs. Save S2 for pre-fight poke and post-fight cleanup.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
shouyue.tips:
# Shouyue Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Reverse Flick Snipe (Undodgeable S2)

While charging S2, the red laser telegraphs your aim. Pro technique:
1. Aim **away from the enemy** (toward a wall or behind you)
2. Wait for the aim line to fully narrow
3. **Flick toward the enemy at the last instant** and release
Zero reaction time for the enemy.

### 2. Point-Blank S2 = 100% Guaranteed Hit

When an Assassin (Han Xin, Li Bai) dives you, **don't aim — just tap S2**. At point-blank range it's guaranteed. Follow with: **S2 → AA → S3 (backward leap)** to instantly counter-kill most squishy divers.

### 3. AA More, Snipe Less

The reworked Shouyue has incredibly strong AAs. When enemies are in AA range, **use your AAs**. A full-AA Shouyue in a teamfight contributes 10× more damage than one scoped in missing shots. Use S2 for: pre-fight poke, post-fight cleanup.

### 4. Vision Ward Placement

Never drop all 3 wards at your feet. Place them at:
- River bushes (gank early warning)
- Dragon/Baron pit (objective vision)
- Enemy jungle crossroads (track jungler pathing)

Wards reveal invisible Heroes — Lanling Wang and Ake can't gank you.

### 5. Stand Still Before Sniping

Passive: standing still stacks Physical Penetration per second (max 5 stacks). Before a big snipe, stop moving for 5 seconds — your shot hits significantly harder.

---

## Signature Combos

### Anti-Dive Counter-Kill: **S2 (instant) → AA → S3**

1. Assassin jumps on you
2. Tap S2 instantly (don't aim) — 100% hit
3. AA once
4. S3 backward leap — deals damage + slow + creates distance
5. Most squishy Assassins die to this

### Long-Range Execute: **Stand Still 5s → Reverse Flick S2**

1. Stand still for max Penetration stacks
2. Aim backward (hide laser)
3. Flick toward low-HP fleeing enemy
4. Release at full charge

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Camouflage gives MS near walls.** Hug walls when rotating for faster map movement.
- **S3 can jump over thin walls.** Use to escape jungle ganks or reposition in fights.
- **Matchup:** Destroys immobile comps. Struggles vs multiple divers who can close distance past your wards.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
shouyue.build:
# Shouyue Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Shouyue's AAs can't crit. Instead, **Critical Rate converts directly to Physical Attack**. Two viable paths: **AA Speed** (highest winrate) and **Pure Snipe** (situational).

---

## Build A: AA Speed (Recommended — Highest Winrate)

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Berserker's Boots (急速战靴)** | Early AS for smooth AA laning. |
| 2 | **Shadow Axe (暗影战斧)** | CDR, Health, flat Physical Penetration. |
| 3 | **Doomsday (末世)** | Core AA item. AS + 8% Current HP on-hit. Shreds tanks. |
| 4 | **Dawn (破晓)** | Marksman core. AS, dual Penetration, AA damage amp. Massive power spike. |
| 5 | **Infinity Edge (无尽战刃)** | Shouyue doesn't benefit from the crit, but **Infinity Edge's high Physical Attack + passive converts crit rate to raw AD** — massive stat boost. |
| 6 | **Sun Bow (逐日之弓)** or **Fate's Edge (名刀·司命)** | **Sun Bow:** +Range active for safer AA. **Fate's Edge:** anti-burst survival. |

## Build B: Pure Snipe (Situational / Fun)

| 3 | Star Breaker (碎星锤) | 40% Penetration. |
| 4 | Infinity Edge (无尽战刃) | Raw AD conversion. |
| 5 | Infinity Edge (无尽战刃) | Stack raw AD (or Siege Breaker for execute). |
| 6 | Siege Breaker (破军) | Execute vs low-HP + massive AD. |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

Shouyue's unique mechanic: **Critical Rate runes convert to Physical Attack at level 1**. Calamity runes are more efficient than Mutation.

### Setup 1: "Calamity Conversion AA" (CN Standard)

---

## Quick Tip

Shouyue is a "team morale" hero — missing snipes tilts your teammates. If you're not confident in your aim, **use the AA Speed build and auto-attack more**. You'll contribute far more and climb faster.

sikong-zhen.overview:
# Sikong Zhen（司空震） — Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter (Magic Bruiser / Thunder Lord)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 雷霆之王 (Thunder King)
- **Region:** CN server exclusive (司空震)

> Sikong Zhen is a dominant melee Magic Fighter (also a strong Jungler). He builds Energy via AAs to refresh S1/S2, and every ability grants an enhanced AA. His S3 transforms him into the Thunder Lord: during the 1.5s ascension, he's **Unstoppable, terrain-ignoring, and at full Energy.** All damage is full Magic Damage.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Energy + Enhanced AA Cycle

Each ability grants an enhanced AA. Every 6 Energy = S1/S2 refreshed. The rhythm: **Ability → Enhanced AA → Ability → Enhanced AA.** Never dump two abilities without the AA between them.

### Melee vs Ranged AA

- **Melee AA (point-blank):** Faster attack speed = faster Energy. Use for: jungle, wave clear, 1v1 brawling.
- **Ranged AA (distance):** Slower but AoE chain lightning. Use for: poke, safe farming.
- **Melee Enhanced AA:** Grants a **shield.** Ranged Enhanced AA: **chain AoE damage.**

### S3: 1.5s Ascension (Unstoppable)

S3 ascends for 1.5s: **Unstoppable, ignores terrain, full Energy.** Use to dodge CC (Musashi S3, Lu Bu S3) or chase over walls. Post-landing: 10s of double Energy gain from AAs.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
sikong-zhen.tips:
# Sikong Zhen Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Ability → AA Rhythm (Never Skip the AA)

Every ability grants an enhanced AA. **Never cast two abilities without the AA between them.** Correct: S1 → AA → S2 → AA. Wrong: S1 → S2 (wasted enhanced AA). This is the #1 Sikong Zhen mistake.

### 2. Melee AA for Speed, Ranged for Safety

- **Melee (point-blank):** Faster AA = faster Energy = faster ability refreshes. Always melee when farming or trading up close.
- **Ranged (distance):** Slower but safer. Use for poke and when kiting.

### 3. Melee Enhanced AA = Shield

Melee enhanced AA grants a shield. When trading: S1 → dash in → melee enhanced AA → shield absorbs counter-damage → continue trading.

### 4. S3 Ascension: Dodge Everything

S3's 1.5s ascension is Unstoppable + terrain-ignoring. Use reactively: Musashi S3? S3. Lu Bu S3? S3. Collapsed on? S3 over a wall.

### 5. Pre-Stack Energy Before S3

Before teamfighting: AA minions/jungle to 4-5 Energy. S3 in → you're full Energy on landing → immediate enhanced AA spam. With post-S3 double Energy gain, you chain abilities indefinitely.

---

## Signature Combos

### Basic Trade: **S1 → AA → S2 → AA**

1. S1 dash + enhanced AA (melee = shield)
2. S2 push + enhanced AA
3. Energy builds → S1 refreshed → repeat

### Full Energy Burst: **S1 → AA → S1 → AA → S2 → AA**

1. Start at full Energy: S1 + AA
2. S1 refreshed (Energy spent) + AA
3. S2 + AA
4. Maximum DPS cycle

### S3 Teamfight Entry: **AA×4 (pre-stack) → S3 → S1 → AA → S2 → AA → S1...**

1. Pre-stack 4-5 Energy on minions
2. S3 ascend (dodge CC, reposition)
3. Land with full Energy + double Energy gain
4. S1+AA+S2+AA+S1+AA... infinite cycle

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3's double Energy gain lasts 10 seconds.** Maximize AA output during this window.
- **Ranged enhanced AA chains to nearby enemies.** Use when enemies are clustered.
- **Matchup:** God-tier in extended fights. Struggles vs burst that kills before enhanced AA shields stack.

---

sima-yi.overview:
# Sima Yi（司馬懿） — Assassin / Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Assassin / Mage (Magic Diver)
- **Lane:** Mid Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★★☆
- **Title:** 寂滅之心 (Heart of Silence)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 司马懿)

> Sima Yi is a terrifying Magic Assassin/Jungler. He has one of the best global-range engage tools (S3), and after using any ability his next basic attack **teleports behind the target** — turning him into a "melee reaper" that deletes squishies in two hits. No Mana bar; abilities consume Energy. Nearby enemy spell casts restore his Energy.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Behind-the-Target Auto-Attack

After any ability, Sima Yi's next basic attack **teleports him behind the target**. Use this to dodge directional skillshots (Mai Shiranui, Gan & Mo) by automatically repositioning.

### Energy Management

No Mana. Abilities cost Energy. Kills/assists permanently increase Energy cap. Early game: Energy runs out fast. S2's suppression field **refunds Energy after 2 seconds** — stay in it.

### S2: Silence + Magic Damage Absorption

S2 silences enemies AND **converts 30% of incoming Magic Damage into HP over 5 seconds**. Time S2 against Shangguan, Zhuge Liang, or Daji — you'll take zero net damage.

### S1: Clone Decoy

S1 sends a clone forward while the real body stays behind **CC-immune**. Use the clone to bait Donghuang/Zhang Fei ultimates or enemy Flashes. If things go wrong, simply don't auto-attack — the real body stays safe.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
sima-yi.tips:
# Sima Yi Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Behind-the-Target AA (Your Best Dodge)

After any ability, your next AA teleports behind the target. Don't fight the auto-target — use it to:
- Dodge Mai Shiranui's directional burst
- Sidestep Gan & Mo's skillshots
- Confuse enemy skillshot aim

### 2. S2: Silence + Magic Absorption

S2 applies Silence AND converts **30% of Magic Damage taken into HP over 5 seconds**. Time it against burst Mages (Shangguan S3, Zhuge Liang S3, Daji combo) — you'll heal through their entire rotation.

### 3. Energy Management

Energy runs out fast early game. S2's field **refunds Energy after 2 seconds** if you stay inside. Between fights, let S2 refill your bar. Kills/assists permanently increase Energy cap — scale up.

### 4. S1 Clone: Bait Everything

S1 sends a clone forward while your real body stays behind **immune to CC**. Use the clone to:
- Bait Donghuang/Zhang Fei ultimates
- Force enemy Flashes
- If the situation looks bad: just don't auto-attack — you never teleport

### 5. S3: Escape OR Execute

S3 has global range but a landing delay. Two uses:
- **Escape:** Blind-cast S3 to a jungle camp across the map when collapsed on
- **Execute:** Predict enemy backline position and S3 directly onto them

---

## Signature Combos

### Tower Dive One-Shot: **S1 (clone) → AA → S2 → AA**

1. S1 clone dives under tower (clone ignores tower aggro)
2. AA teleports behind target (first hit)
3. S2 immediately — Silence prevents Flash/escape
4. AA (second hit) — target dead
5. Walk out or S3 away

### Global Gank Execution: **S3 → AA → S2 → AA → S1 → AA**

1. S3 from across map onto enemy backline
2. AA teleport behind (first hit)
3. S2 Silence (second hit)
4. If target survives: S1 clone chase → AA (third hit)

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Enhanced AA doesn't crit.** Build Magic Attack + Attack Speed, not Critical.
- **S2 absorbs Magic Damage only.** Physical burst still hurts. Don't face-tank AD Assassins.
- **S3 can be cancelled by CC during the channel.** Cast from fog of war.
- **Matchup:** Destroys immobile Mages and Marksmen. Struggles vs tanky CC-heavy frontlines that survive his burst.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

su-lie.overview:
# Su Lie（蘇烈） — Tank / Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Tank / Fighter (CC Monster / Two Lives)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Roaming
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 不屈鐵壁 (Unyielding Iron Wall)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 苏烈)

> Su Lie is a comprehensive CC-heavy Tank/Fighter with a built-in resurrection passive and a devastating AoE ultimate. He can play aggressive Roaming Support or surprise Clash Lane carry. His signature: **"Nuclear Ultimate"** — damage scales with enemies hit, and can one-shot entire teams.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Two Lives (Beacon Resurrection)

When taking fatal damage, Su Lie enters a 4.5s "dying state." Three beacons spawn around him. **Allies stepping on a beacon restores 10% Max HP to both Su Lie and themselves.** All 3 beacons lit = Su Lie revives with 60% HP + AoE slow. **Tell your teammates about the beacons in draft!**

### S3 Ultimate: Nuclear Bomb

S3 channels a ground smash. **The more enemies (Minions, Monsters, Heroes) in range, the higher the AoE damage.** Full-charge S3 + Flash can delete entire teams. Always charge from bushes to hide the yellow circle indicator.

### S1: Hold the Knockup AA

S1 empowers the next 3 AAs; the 3rd knocks up. This empowered state lasts a long time. **Pre-cast S1 and hit air twice — hold the 3rd knockup AA** — then walk into a fight and open with a guaranteed knockup.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
su-lie.tips:
# Su Lie Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Teach Your Team About Beacons

Many players (especially in lower ranks) don't know Su Lie's passive. At the start of every match: **"When I die, step on the lights — we both heal and I revive!"** This single sentence doubles your winrate.

### 2. S3 Nuclear Ultimate

S3's damage scales with **number of enemies in range** (Minions, Monsters, Heroes). Full-charge S3 into a minion wave + enemy team = one-shot potential. Always charge from **bushes** — enemies can't see the yellow circle indicator from fog of war. **S3 + Flash** at full charge = undodgeable team-wipe.

### 3. S1: Pre-Stack the Knockup

S1 empowers 3 AAs (3rd = knockup). The empowered state lasts a long time. Before ganking: **S1 → AA air twice → hold the 3rd knockup AA** → walk into lane → guaranteed knockup opener.

### 4. S2: Push Enemies Into Your Team

S2 charges and pushes enemies. Always angle to push them **toward your tower or team**. Use Flash mid-charge to reposition behind them for a reverse push.

### 5. Clash Lane "Nuclear" Build (Off-Meta)

Shadow Boots → Shadow Axe → Frost Grip → Lightning Dagger → Siege Breaker → Fate's Edge. Full-charge S3 + Flash can one-shot squishies from 100% HP.

---

## Signature Combos

### Bush Nuclear Bomb: **S3 (full charge in bush) + Flash → AA → S1 → S2**

1. Charge S3 from bush (enemies can't see circle)
2. Flash at full charge → unleash into enemy cluster
3. AA → S1 knockup chain → S2 push survivors toward team

### Standard Engage: **S2 + Flash → S1 → AA×3 → S3**

1. S2 charge → Flash mid-charge for angle
2. Push enemy into team/tower
3. S1 → 3-hit knockup chain
4. S3 for cleanup or zone control

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Beacons also heal allies.** Even if you're going to die, allies can top themselves off by stepping on your lights.
- **S3 damage multiplier:** More targets = more damage. Fight near minion waves or jungle camps.
- **Matchup:** God-tier in clustered teamfights. Struggles vs spread-out poke comps.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

sun-bin.overview:
# Sun Bin（孫臏） — Mage / Support

## Overview

- **Role:** Mage / Support (Team Utility / Kiting Engine)
- **Lane:** Roaming
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 逆流之時 (Time's Flow)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 孙膑)

> Sun Bin is a strategic utility Support who doesn't tank — he **controls time and speed.** His S2 grants allies massive MS + CDR, and **40% of damage taken during S2 is refunded as HP** (NOT affected by Grievous Wounds!). His S3 is an AoE **1-second Silence** that interrupts channels. He's the undisputed "king of late-game kiting" in CN server.

---

## Core Mechanics

### S2: Time Rewind (The Soul Skill)

S2 grants allies: +30-60% MS, +20% CDR, and **40% of damage taken during S2 is refunded as HP.** The refund ignores Grievous Wounds! Timing is everything:
- **Too early:** the buff expires before damage lands = wasted
- **Too late:** ally dies before S2 activates
- **Perfect:** cast right before enemy burst lands

### S3: 1-Second Silence (Interrupt Everything)

S3 creates a field that **Silences enemies for 1 second** on deployment. After 5 seconds, explodes for massive damage. Use to interrupt: Lu Bu S3, Wang Zhaojun S3, Zhang Fei S3, Dun Shan S1, Mozi S3.

### S1: Bush Check + Slow

S1 can be thrown into bushes. If it hits a hidden enemy, it makes a distinct sound and reveals them. Also triggers Frost Breath slow for kiting.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
sun-bin.tips:
# Sun Bin Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. S2 Timing: Right Before Burst, Not After

S2 refunds 40% of damage taken as HP. The timing window is tight:
- **Defensive:** cast S2 when you see the enemy Assassin about to engage or a Mage charging ultimate
- **Offensive:** cast S2 as your frontline/Assassin dives in — the MS + CDR + HP refund lets them survive and keep fighting
- The refund **ignores Grievous Wounds** — it hard-counters anti-heal

### 2. S3 Silence: Interrupt Channeled Abilities

S3's 1-second Silence on deployment is Sun Bin's highest-impact CC. Use reactively:
- Lu Bu S3 (aerial strike) → S3 his landing zone
- Wang Zhaojun S3 (blizzard) → S3 to cancel
- Zhang Fei S3 (roar) → S3 to silence during wind-up
- Mozi S3 (channel) → S3 to interrupt

### 3. Kite Rhythm: S2 Retreat → S3 → S2 Re-engage

Sun Bin's macro pattern: **When enemies engage → S2 your team backward (they can't catch you, their abilities hit S2's buffer) → S3 Silence → S2 off cooldown → re-engage.** This cycle destroys short-range comps.

### 4. S1: Bush Check + Vision

S1 reveals enemies hit. Throw S1 into suspicious bushes. If you hear the hit sound or see damage numbers → enemies inside. Also great for checking Dragon/Baron pit.

### 5. S2 + Team Diving: Enabler, Not Initiator

Sun Bin doesn't initiate — he **enables.** S2 your frontline Fighter/Assassin as they go in. The MS + CDR + HP refund makes them unkillable. Without you, they die. With you, they 1v3.

---

## Signature Combo

### Teamfight Engine: **S2 (engage) → S3 (silence) → S1 (slow) → S2 (chase/retreat)**

1. S2 — team rushes in with +MS + CDR
2. S3 — Silence enemy backline (interrupts their response)
3. S1 — slow priority target
4. S2 (off cooldown from CDR) — chase or retreat as needed

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S2's HP refund is NOT healing.** It bypasses Grievous Wounds entirely. Tell your teammates this — they'll stop flaming you for "not healing enough."
- **Max CDR first.** 40% CDR = S2 every few seconds. Rush Compassion runes + Calm Boots + Shadow Aegis.
- **Matchup:** God-tier in extended kiting fights. Struggles if your team has no frontline to enable.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
sun-bin.build:

sun-ce.overview:
# Sun Ce（孫策） — Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter (Engage / Global Roamer)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 光明之海 (Sea of Light)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 孙策)

> Sun Ce is a strategically dominant engage Fighter with global-range support capability. His core tags: **high burst, strong CC, multiple Unstoppable frames**, and his unique **S3 ghost ship (carries allies)**. He can solo-kill squishies with one rotation or transport a teammate across the map for duo-gank mayhem.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Unyielding Armor

Every 6 seconds, Sun Ce's next AA is enhanced (bonus damage + HP restore). Taking Physical/True damage or hitting enemies with abilities grants **Unyielding stacks** (max 10), each granting bonus Physical Defense. He gets tankier as fights go on.

### S3: Ghost Ship (Global + Carry)

Sun Ce drives a ship across the map. On collision with terrain, enemy Hero, or recast, it explodes for AoE knockup. **Allies can press interact to board the ship** — enabling duo global ganks (bring Gao Jianli, Angela, Liu Shan).

### S2 Cancel + AA Weave

S2 has 3 casts. Each cast **perfectly cancels AA animation recovery**. Optimal rhythm: S2 → AA → S2 → AA → S2 → AA.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

Best ship passengers: Gao Jianli, Angela, Liu Shan.
*Waiting for community input…*
sun-ce.tips:
# Sun Ce Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. S3 Ghost Ship: Global + Carry Allies

S3 drives a ship across the map. Explodes on terrain/enemy/recast for **AoE knockup**. Allies can **press interact to board** — enabling duo global ganks.

- Best passengers: Gao Jianli, Angela, Liu Shan (AoE burst + CC)
- Ship can be recast early to jump off — the empty ship continues forward

### 2. S2 AA Cancel Weaving

S2 has 3 charges. **Each charge cancels AA animation.** Best rhythm: **S2 → AA → S2 → AA → S2 → AA** for maximum damage output in minimum time.

### 3. Jump Off Early ("Triangle Jump")

When your ship is about to collide, **recast S3 to jump off early**. The ghost ship continues forward and still knocks up enemies, while Sun Ce is already on the ground ready to chain S1 for a second knockup — perfect control chain.

### 4. Enhanced AA Sustain

Every 6 seconds, Sun Ce's next AA is enhanced (bonus damage + **HP restore**). In lane, weave these into trades for constant sustain. Don't waste the enhanced AA on full-HP minions — use it to poke the enemy laner.

### 5. Unyielding Armor Stacking

Taking Physical/True damage OR hitting enemies with abilities grants Physical Defense stacks (max 10). The longer you fight, the tankier you get. Don't be afraid of extended brawls vs Physical damage dealers.

---

## Signature Combos

### Global Engage: **S3 → Jump Off → S1 → AA → S2×3 (with AA cancels)**

1. S3 from across map toward enemy backline
2. Recast S3 to jump off early (ship still knocks up)
3. S1 immediately — second knockup
4. AA → S2×3 with AA cancels for full burst

### Bush Ambush: **S1 → AA → S2×3 → S3 (close range)**

1. S1 from bush — knockup
2. AA → S2×3 with cancels
3. If they survive or Flash: S3 point-blank → knockup → finish

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3's minimap icon is visible to enemies when you're near.** Stealth ganks require fog of war.
- **Pair with Stun summoner spell** — S1 + Stun guarantees the knockup lands.
- **Matchup:** Destroys immobile backliners. Struggles vs hyper-mobile heroes who dodge S1 knockup.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
sun-ce.build:

sun-quan.overview:
# Sun Quan（孫權） — Marksman

## Overview

- **Role:** Marksman (Magic Fighter / AP Bruiser)
- **Lane:** Farm Lane / Clash Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 定旌之謀 (Strategist of the Banner)
- **Region:** CN server exclusive (孙权)

> Sun Quan, leader of the Eastern Wu faction, is a dominant all-round Magic Fighter/Mage-Tank. His core mechanics revolve around **Sword Seals** — stacking marks via S1/S2, then detonating them with enhanced AAs for massive **%Max HP shield + heal.** His S3 creates a persistent water zone that slows, damages, and grants him bonus MS + DR. He excels at zone control and extended skirmishes.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Sword Seal Stacking: Skill → AA Rhythm

S1 and S2 apply Sword Seals. At 3 stacks: enhanced AA deals bonus damage + **%Max HP heal + shield.** Never dump all abilities — always: **Skill → AA → Skill → AA → Skill → AA.**

### S3: Water Zone (Your Arena)

S3 creates a persistent water zone that slows enemies, deals continuous Magic Damage, and grants Sun Quan **bonus MS + %DR while inside.** Also grants **Unstoppable** during the cast. Use to: create your own arena, block enemy retreat paths, isolate frontline from backline.

### River/Water Combat Advantage

Sun Quan gains bonus MS and DR near rivers or in his own S3 water zone. Always fight near Dragon/Baron pit or in river corridors.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
sun-quan.tips:
# Sun Quan Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Skill → AA Rhythm (Never Dump All Skills)

S1 and S2 apply Sword Seals. Each enhanced AA at 3 stacks grants **%Max HP heal + shield.** Always: S1 → AA → S2 → AA → S1 → AA. Dumping all skills at once means you miss 2 shields.

### 2. S3: Unstoppable Cast + Zone Control

S3 grants Unstoppable during cast and leaves a water zone. The zone: slows enemies, deals continuous Magic Damage, grants Sun Quan **bonus MS + %DR.** Use S3 to: create your arena, block enemy retreat, isolate enemy frontline from backline.

### 3. Fight Near Water

Sun Quan gains bonus MS + DR near rivers or inside S3's water. Always force fights at Dragon/Baron pit or river corridors. Never fight in dry jungle if you can avoid it.

### 4. S3: Anti-Dive Tool

When an Assassin (Lanling Wang, Jing) dives you: **S3 immediately.** The Unstoppable cast ignores their CC, and the water zone slows them while you gain DR. Then S2 away → S1 + enhanced AA for the counter-kill.

### 5. S2: Gap-Close + Wall Hop

S2 dashes forward (can cross thin walls) with a brief stun. Use to: engage from bush, escape over walls, or reposition for S1 angle.

---

## Signature Combos

### Mid-Range Engage: **S2 → S1 → AA → S3 → AA**

1. S2 dash + stun
2. S1 + AA (3 seals → shield + heal)
3. S3 water zone (enemy is slowed, you gain DR)
4. AA finish inside your zone

### Anti-Dive Counter: **S3 → S2 → S1 → AA**

1. Assassin dives → S3 (Unstoppable + water zone)
2. S2 dash away (create distance)
3. S1 + enhanced AA (shield + heal)
4. They're slowed in water, you're shielded — turn and kill

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3 water zone persists for several seconds.** Pre-cast it on objectives (Dragon/Baron) to zone enemies away.
- **Sword Seals have a generous stack window.** You can stack on one target, then switch to another with the enhanced AA.
- **Matchup:** God-tier in extended fights near water. Struggles in dry, open areas.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

taiyi-zhenren.overview:
# Taiyi Zhenren（太乙真人） — Support

## Overview

- **Role:** Support (Economy / Resurrection)
- **Lane:** Roaming
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 鍊金大師 (Alchemy Grandmaster)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 太乙真人)

> Taiyi Zhenren is a strategically invaluable "economy + resurrection" Support. His passive grants nearby allies **bonus Gold**, and his S3 is the game's only ally-resurrection ability — a portable "second life." A well-played Taiyi single-handedly shifts the economic balance of the game.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Gold Printer

When nearby non-Hero units die, Taiyi and nearby allies gain **+20% bonus Gold**. Stick to your ADC/Marksman. Even if they just farm normally, they'll be ~1,000 Gold ahead of the enemy carry by mid-game. This is Taiyi's entire identity — **win through economic advantage.**

### S1: Infinite Refresh

S1 charges up and explodes. **If the full-charge explosion hits an enemy Hero, S1's cooldown instantly refreshes.** Land your explosions and you can chain-control indefinitely.

### S2: Hook + S2-Flash

S2 shoots a tentacle that latches onto enemies, allies, or objects (Shouyue wards). **Can be combined with Flash** to extend range or change trajectory mid-flight.

### S3: Resurrection (Timing Is Everything)

S3 places a buff on nearby allies. If they die within ~3 seconds, they **resurrect with %Max HP.** The #1 skill check for Taiyi players:
- **Too early:** enemies see it and stop attacking; the buff expires wasted
- **Too late:** ally dies before cast completes
- **Perfect timing:** right before the fatal hit lands

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

Best duo: hyper-carry ADCs who benefit most from the Gold passive.
*Waiting for community input…*
taiyi-zhenren.tips:
# Taiyi Zhenren Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Gold Passive: Stick to Your Carry

Nearby minion/monster deaths grant **+20% Gold** to Taiyi and allies. Early through mid-game, glue yourself to your ADC. Even passive farming generates a ~1,000 Gold lead. This is Taiyi's win condition.

### 2. S1 Infinite Refresh

Full-charge S1 explosion that hits an enemy Hero = **instant S1 cooldown refresh**. Chain explosions = infinite CC. The combo: S1 (charge) → S2 (hook) → S1 auto-explodes → S1 again immediately.

### 3. S2-Flash Engage

S2's tentacle has limited range, but **Flash mid-flight extends range or changes trajectory**. Combined with a charging S1: **S1 (charging) → Flash into enemies → manual S1 detonate → S2 hook → S1 recharge**.

### 4. S3 Resurrection: The Golden Window

S3 lasts ~3 seconds. Timing is everything:
- **Too early (ally >50% HP):** enemies stop attacking, buff expires wasted
- **Too late:** ally dies before cast completes
- **Perfect:** right before the killing blow — Zhuge Liang S3 about to land, Wukong bonk incoming, Marco S3 spinning

### 5. S1 + Flash = Undodgeable Engage

S1 starts charging → **Flash directly onto enemy backline** → manually detonate S1. Instant AoE stun with zero warning. Follow with S2 to lock down survivors.

---

## Signature Combo

### Perfect Chain CC: **S1 (charge) → Flash → S1 (detonate) → S2 → S1 (recharge)**

1. Start S1 charging from bush or fog of war
2. Flash into enemy cluster
3. Manual S1 detonate — AoE stun
4. S2 hook to lock down priority target
5. S1 (instantly refreshed from first explosion) → second stun

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3's resurrection scales with AP.** More AP = more HP on revive. But full AP Taiyi is too squishy — hybrid or tank is safer.
- **Don't waste S3 on yourself if you're out of position.** Save it for the carry.
- **S1 charging makes noise.** Charge from bushes or behind walls to mask the audio cue.
- **Matchup:** God-tier with hyper-carry ADCs. Struggles vs teams that can instantly delete before S3 activates.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

ukyo-tachibana.overview:
# Ukyo Tachibana（橘右京） — Assassin

## Overview

- **Role:** Assassin (Spacing Burst / Manaless)
- **Lane:** Jungle / Clash Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 神夢一刀 (Divine Single Slash)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 橘右京)

> Ukyo Tachibana is a manaless Assassin/Fighter who blends burst and skirmishing. His entire kit revolves around **spacing** — hitting enemies with the **edge** of his abilities for bonus damage and CC. His passive enhanced AA and S2 both deal +50% damage and stun/slow enemies at maximum range.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Edge Spacing = Everything

Ukyo is NOT a face-tank. Always stay **~one Flash distance away** from enemies:
- **Passive AA:** +50% damage + slow at the blade's edge
- **S2:** Stuns only at the **tip** (edge). Mid-range = just damage, no CC.

### S1: Double Dash (Unlock Second Cast)

S1 jumps backward. **Hitting any enemy (Minion, Monster, Hero) unlocks a second cast.** Use S1 off minions as a springboard to engage, then S1 again to chase or escape.

### S3 Ultimate: Flashable + Lifesteal

S3 is a continuous slash with HP recovery (half vs non-Heroes). **You can Flash during S3** to redirect the slashes. The lifesteal lets you turn losing fights.

### Manaless: Give Blue to Your Mage

Ukyo has zero Mana. In Jungle, after the first Blue Buff, **give subsequent Blues to your Mid Mage** (Diaochan, Luna). This elevates your entire team.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
ukyo-tachibana.tips:
# Ukyo Tachibana Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Master Edge Spacing

Ukyo is NOT a face-tank. Always keep **~one Flash distance** from enemies. Passive AA and S2 only apply their full effects at the blade's EDGE. Learn this spacing — it's the difference between a god Ukyo and a dead one.

### 2. Bush Ambush = One-Shot

From bush:
1. **Passive AA** (edge slow)
2. **S2** (guaranteed tip stun because they're already slowed)
3. **S3** (full slash damage)
4. **S1 ×2** (finish or escape)
This deletes squishies from 100% HP.

### 3. S1: Use Minions as Springboards

S1 first cast on a nearby minion/monster (unlocks second cast) → S1 second cast into enemy. This gives you double dash distance with no cooldown penalty.

### 4. S3 Flash Redirect

S3 roots you in place, but **you can Flash during S3**. Use this to:
- Chase fleeing enemies
- Redirect slashes onto a priority target
- Escape while still dealing damage

### 5. Give Blue to Your Mage

Ukyo has zero Mana costs. After the first Blue for jungle clear, donate all subsequent Blues to your Mid. This team-level macro is a huge advantage.

### 6. Skill Priority

**Max S2 first, then S1. Take S3 whenever available.** S2 is core burst and CC — each rank reduces cooldown and increases damage.

---

## Signature Combos

### Mid-Range Perfect Control: **Passive AA → S2 → S3 → S1 → S1**

1. Passive AA at edge (slow)
2. S2 at tip (stun — guaranteed because of slow)
3. S3 full slash damage + lifesteal
4. S1 ×2 to chase or disengage

### Long-Range Gap-Close: **S1 (off minion) → AA → S2 → S3 → S1 (retreat)**

1. S1 backward off a minion
2. S1 second cast toward enemy (gap closed)
3. AA → S2 → S3 burst
4. Second S1 to retreat to safety

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Power window is early-mid game (pre-12 min).** Ukyo falls off late when tanks have full armor. End games fast.
- **S3 heals even on non-Heroes.** Use jungle camps as health packs between fights.
- **Matchup:** Destroys squishy comps in early skirmishes. Struggles vs late-game hyper-tanks.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

wu-zetian.overview:
# Wu Zetian（武則天） — Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Mage (Global Control / Vision)
- **Lane:** Mid Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 女帝 (Empress)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 武则天)

> Wu Zetian is the game's most exclusive Hero (CN server premium) and a uniquely powerful global-control Mage. Her S3 is a **global-range ultimate** that reveals ALL enemies AND deals damage + stuns them, regardless of distance. Properly timed, she can secure objectives, save allies across the map, and chain-CC entire teams.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Out-of-Combat Mana Regen + MS

When out of combat: **+50 MS + 1% Max Mana regen per second.** She almost never needs Mana items (no Holy Grail needed).

### Enhanced S1: Any 2 Abilities = Empowered Shot

Casting any 2 abilities **refreshes S1** and empowers the next S1: larger projectile, longer range, **double damage + knockup.** This is her core damage + CC tool.

### S2: Anti-Dive (Don't Waste It)

S2 knocks back nearby enemies + slows + grants MS. **This is your ONLY self-peel.** Never use S2 to farm or poke. Save it for when an Assassin dives you.

### S3: Global Vision + Stun

S3 reveals ALL enemies globally and damages + stuns them. Three strategic uses:
1. **Vision:** Enemies missing for 5+ seconds → S3 to check Dragon/Baron or reveal ambushes
2. **Cross-map support:** Cast during side-lane fights to contribute damage + stun
3. **Chain CC (best):** Wait for ally initiation (Guiguzi, Zhang Fei, Lian Po) → S3 follow-up = undodgeable team-wide stun

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
wu-zetian.tips:
# Wu Zetian Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Pre-Stack Enhanced S1

While rotating or bush-camping: cast S1 once (hold the stack). When enemies appear: cast S1 again → instant Enhanced knockup. Two casts of anything = Enhanced S1. Most common: S1 → walk → S1 → Enhanced S1.

### 2. S2: Save for Assassins, Never Farm

S2 is your ONLY self-peel. When Lanling Wang, Ake, Lam, or any Assassin dives you: S2 → they're knocked back + slowed → Enhanced S1 knockup → walk away. **Never S2 minions for wave clear.**

### 3. S3: Best as Follow-Up, Not Opener

S3 stuns globally. But alone, it's easily dodged (enemies see the circle). **Cast S3 as follow-up** when your team's initiator (Guiguzi, Zhang Fei, Lian Po) has already engaged. Enemies are CC-locked and can't dodge.

### 4. S3: Global Vision Check

Enemy team disappears for 5+ seconds from minimap → **S3 immediately.** You'll reveal if they're on Dragon, Baron, or ambushing. This alone can save games.

### 5. Enhanced S1 + S2 Cycle

Optimal rotation: **S1 → S1 (Enhanced) → S2 → S1 (Enhanced again).** S2 counts as the second ability. You can chain TWO Enhanced S1s in rapid succession.

---

## Signature Combos

### Lane Poke: **S1 → S1 (Enhanced) → AA → S2 → S1 (Enhanced)**

1. S1 (stack 1)
2. S1 again → Enhanced (knockup)
3. AA
4. S2 (counts as another ability)
5. S1 → Enhanced again

### Teamfight Chain: **S3 → S1 → S1 (Enhanced) → S2 → S1 (Enhanced)**

1. S3 (after ally engage — global stun)
2. S1 → S1 (Enhanced knockup on stunned targets)
3. S2 → S1 (Enhanced knockup again)
4. Three consecutive CCs

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Passive Mana regen means no Holy Grail needed.** Skip Mana items — go straight to Echo Staff + damage.
- **Enhanced S1 has longer range than normal S1.** Use this to snipe enemies who think they're safe.
- **Matchup:** God-tier in coordinated play. Struggles vs hyper-mobile Assassins if S2 is on cooldown.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
