wukong.overview:
# Wukong（孫悟空） — Assassin

## Overview

- **Role:** Assassin (Crit Burst Jungler)
- **Lane:** Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 齊天大聖 (Great Sage Equal to Heaven)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 孙悟空; nickname: "Monkey")

> Wukong is the quintessential crit-burst Assassin. He's born with **20% free Critical Rate** but only **150% base Critical Damage** (vs 200% for others). Infinity Edge is mandatory to fix this. Every ability empowers his next AA into a devastating "staff slam." His S2 can bounce off any unit (including corpses) for a double-jump — mastering this "body technique" separates gods from button-mashers.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Built-In 20% Crit / 150% Crit Damage

Wukong starts with 20% Crit Rate but reduced Crit Damage (150% vs 200%). **Infinity Edge is absolutely mandatory** — it fixes his crit damage and makes his kit functional.

### S2: Body Technique (Double Jump)

S2 dashes forward. **If it contacts ANY unit (Minion, Monster, Hero, corpse), Wukong bounces for a second, longer jump** with bonus MS. Use enemy frontline as springboards to reach the backline.

### S1: Invincibility Frame + Shield

S1 grants a brief window where **if an enemy ability hits you, it's negated + you gain a massive shield.** Time it against Daji's charm, Zhuge Liang S3, or tower shots.

### Pre-Stack Your Staff ("Hold the Bonk")

After using any ability, the enhanced AA lasts several seconds. Before ganking: **cast S2 into empty air, hold the enhanced AA**, wait for S2 cooldown to nearly reset, then engage. This lets you: AA (held bonk) → S2 → AA → S1 → AA → S3 → AA — one extra bonk per combo.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
wukong.tips:
# Wukong Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Pre-Stack Your Staff (Most Important Mechanic)

Enhanced AAs last several seconds. Before ganking: **S2 into empty air, hold the bonk.** Wait for S2 to nearly come off cooldown, then engage: **AA (held) → S2 → AA → S1 → AA → S3 → AA.** This gives you 4 bonks instead of 3 — the difference between a kill and the enemy escaping at 10% HP.

### 2. S2 Body Technique: Springboard to Backline

S2 bounces off anything it touches for a second, longer jump. In teamfights: **S2 off the enemy tank's face** to bypass them entirely and land directly on the ADC/Mage. Enemy frontline is your launchpad.

### 3. S1: Negate Key Abilities

S1's shield triggers when you're hit by an enemy ability. With good timing, negate: Daji charm, Zhuge Liang S3, tower shots. This is Wukong's only defensive tool — don't waste it for movement speed.

### 4. S3 Mark Stacking

S3 applies 3 marks. AAs on marked targets deal **bonus Physical Damage per mark consumed.** Always S3 → AA chain after. Don't S3 and then run away — you're wasting your biggest damage amp.

### 5. Enable Avatar Lock / Minion-Tower Button

Wukong's enhanced AA auto-targets the nearest enemy. Without avatar lock, you'll bonk the tank instead of the carry. **Settings → Avatar Lock ON.** Also use minion/tower button to avoid accidentally jumping to enemies.

---

## Signature Combos

### Bush Ambush: **AA (held) → S3 → AA → S1 → AA → S2 → AA**

1. Hold pre-stacked bonk
2. S3 mark + knockup → AA
3. S1 (negate counter-CC) → AA
4. S2 (chase or escape) → AA
5. 4 bonks, squishy deleted

### Springboard Backline Delete: **S2 (off tank) → AA → S3 → AA → S1 → AA**

1. S2 bounce off enemy frontline
2. AA on landing (on the backline)
3. S3 → AA
4. S1 → AA
5. ADC/Mage dead before they can react

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S2 can bounce off corpses.** In teamfights, dead minions or Heroes are valid springboards.
- **S2 can execute low-HP jungle monsters** (post-rework). Faster farming.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs squishy teams. Struggles vs tanky CC-heavy comps that survive his burst.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

wuyan.overview:
# Wuyan（鍾無豔） — Fighter / Tank

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter / Tank (Burst Bruiser)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 野蠻之錘 (Barbarian Hammer)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 钟无艳)

> Wuyan wears a tank's skin but has terrifying burst damage. All her abilities have a **50% chance to Petrify** (stun) enemies for 0.75s. Her S2 deals **double damage** at the center impact point. A Petrify → S2 center-hit → S3 spin can one-shot squishies from full HP. She's nicknamed the "One-Hammer Wonder."

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: 50% Petrify on ANY Damage

Every damage instance (AAs, abilities, S3 ticks) has a **50% chance to Petrify** for 0.75s. Same target can only be petrified once per 8 seconds.

### S2: Center = Double Damage

S2 is Wuyan's core burst. **Only the center impact deals double damage.** Petrify → S2 center-hit is the deletion combo. Without the center hit, damage is mediocre.

### S3: Outer Edge = +40% Damage

S3's spin deals **+40% damage at the outer edge.** When spinning, keep enemies at the edge, not directly on top of you. S3 also grants a constant shield.

### S3 + Flash (Big Flash)

You can **Flash during S3's spin.** Use to: reposition onto the enemy backline, chase fleeing enemies, or dodge skillshots while still dealing damage.

### S1: Hold the Enhanced AA

S1 dashes + the next AA becomes an enhanced heavy strike with slow. This AA can be **held for several seconds.** Pre-cast S1 before ganking → hold the heavy strike → AA when in range.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
wuyan.tips:
# Wuyan Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. S2 Center Hit = Double Damage (Mandatory)

S2's center deals **double damage.** The edge deals normal damage. Always Petrify → S2 center. Without the center hit, Wuyan hits like a wet noodle. With it, she one-shots.

### 2. Petrify → S2 Center → Delete

If the enemy gets Petrify'd (50% chance from any hit): **immediately S2 center.** They can't dodge. This combo deletes squishies from full HP.

### 3. S3: Edge Dealers, Not Huggers

S3's **outer edge deals +40% damage.** When spinning, keep enemies at the edge of your spin radius, not directly on top of you. The damage difference is significant.

### 4. S3 + Flash: Reposition Mid-Spin

You can Flash during S3. Uses: Flash into enemy backline to catch their ADC, Flash to follow their escape, Flash to dodge CC while still spinning.

### 5. Pre-Hold S1 Enhanced AA

S1's enhanced AA can be held for several seconds. Pre-cast S1 → walk into gank range → AA (heavy strike + slow) → if Petrify procs → S2 center → S3.

---

## Signature Combos

### Bush Ambush One-Shot: **S1 (hold) → AA → S2 → S3**

1. Pre-cast S1, hold enhanced AA
2. AA (heavy strike + slow, chance to Petrify)
3. If Petrify'd: **S2 center** (guaranteed double damage)
4. S3 spin (edge them) to finish

### Teamfight Backline Dive: **S1 → Flash → AA → S2 → S3 + Flash**

1. S1 dash → Flash to close remaining distance
2. AA heavy strike
3. S2 center
4. S3 spin → Flash to stay on the ADC if they Flash away

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Petrify has an 8-second per-target cooldown.** Track it mentally — after petrifying someone, switch targets.
- **Pure damage Wuyan is viable in Jungle.** One-hammer deletion snowballs hard.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs immobile squishies. Struggles vs long-range kiters who never let you S2.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
wuyan.build:

xiang-yu.overview:
# Xiang Yu（項羽） — Tank

## Overview

- **Role:** Tank (Hard Engage / Burst Bruiser)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Roaming
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 霸王 (Hegemon-King)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 项羽)

> Xiang Yu is a perennial Tank/Fighter with extreme durability, massive teamfight CC, and terrifying low-HP burst. His passive grants **40% DR for 6 seconds when HP drops below 30%** (90s CD). His ultimate deals **up to double damage at low HP.** With the right build, he can one-shot squishies while facetanking entire teams.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: 40% DR at Low HP

When HP <30%, gains **40% Damage Reduction for 6 seconds** (90s CD). Don't retreat when low — this is your strongest moment. Combine with S3's bonus damage for impossible turnaround kills.

### S1: Unstoppable Push

S1 charges forward, pushing enemies and **knocking up at the end.** During the charge: **Unstoppable.** Use to: disrupt enemy formations, push carries into your team, peel for your ADC, or S1+Flash for surprise engages.

### S3: More Damage at Lower HP

S3 deals massive frontal damage + stun. **The lower Xiang Yu's HP, the higher the damage (up to +100%).** Never cast S3 at full HP — save it for when you're low and the passive DR is active.

### S1 + Flash (Signature Engage)

Cast S1, then **Flash during the charge.** The push repositions to your Flash destination. Surprise-kidnap the enemy backline from off-screen.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
xiang-yu.tips:
# Xiang Yu Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Never Retreat at Low HP

Passive grants 40% DR for 6 seconds when HP <30%. **This is your power window.** The enemy commits everything thinking you're dead → passive kicks in → you take half damage → S3 deals double damage → you win. Never panic at low HP.

### 2. S3: Save for Low HP (Double Damage)

S3 deals up to **+100% damage** the lower your HP is. Never cast S3 at full HP — it hits like a wet noodle. Cast at <30% HP with passive DR active: it one-shots squishies.

### 3. S1 + Flash: The Signature Engage

S1 charges forward pushing enemies. **Flash during the charge** to reposition the push anywhere. Surprise-kidnap enemy carries from off-screen into your team. The most feared Xiang Yu mechanic.

### 4. Clash Lane (Burst) vs Roaming (Tank)

Xiang Yu flexes two playstyles:
- **Clash Lane Burst:** Max S2 first. S2 grants two enhanced AAs (first heals, second guaranteed crit). Build semi-damage.
- **Roaming Tank:** Max S1 first for lower CD. Pure tank build. More pushes, more peels.

### 5. S1: Peel for Your ADC

S1 is as powerful defensively as offensively. When an Assassin dives your ADC: S1 them away. The push + Unstoppable means you can't be stopped from saving your carry.

---

## Signature Combos

### Clash Lane Burst: **S2 → AA → S1 → AA → S3**

1. S2 (grants two enhanced AAs)
2. AA (first enhanced — heals you)
3. S1 push + knockup
4. AA (second enhanced — guaranteed crit)
5. S3 at low HP → double damage execute

### Roaming Engage: **S1 + Flash → S3 → S2**

1. S1 charge → Flash mid-charge onto backline
2. S3 immediately (AoE stun + damage)
3. S2 to reduce enemy damage output
4. Team cleans up

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Passive has a 90s cooldown.** Track it. Don't play aggressive when it's down.
- **S3's stun is AoE.** Aim to hit multiple enemies — the stun + damage swings teamfights.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs immobile backlines. Struggles vs hyper-mobile Heroes who dodge S1.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
xiang-yu.build:
# Xiang Yu Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Two viable paths. **Clash Lane Burst** (semi-damage, insane low-HP S3 one-shots) and **Roaming Tank** (pure defense, CC machine).

---

## Build A: Clash Lane Burst (Recommended — Highest Winrate)

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Shadow Boots (影忍之足)** | 15% AA DR + passive DR = absurd Physical tankiness in lane. |
| 2 | **Shadow Axe (暗影战斧)** or **Frost Grip (冰痕之握)** | **Shadow Axe:** Penetration + CDR for burst. **Frost Grip:** S2 enhanced AAs perfectly trigger AoE slow. |
| 3 | **Berserker's Armor (暴烈之甲)** | Taking hits (which Xiang Yu does) grants stacking MS + damage — perfect for low-HP counter-engages. |
| 4 | **Siege Breaker (破军)** | **Burst build's soul!** Massive AD amplifies S3's double-damage at low HP. Half-HP squishies get deleted. |
| 5 | **Eternal Night (永夜守护)** or **Pure Sky (纯净苍穹)** | **Eternal Night:** burst-heal vs magic. **Pure Sky:** active DR — stacks with passive for ~70-80% total DR. |
| 6 | Flex defensive item | Magic Cloak (魔女斗篷) vs heavy magic, or Ominous Premonition (不祥征兆) vs ADCs. |

---

## Build B: Roaming Tank (Support)

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|

xiao-qiao.overview:
# Xiao Qiao（小喬） — Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Mage (Burst / Artillery)
- **Lane:** Mid Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 戀之微風 (Breeze of Love)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 小乔)

> Xiao Qiao is a classic high-burst, long-range traditional Mage. She has strong lane poke and late-game "Flash in, delete everyone" potential. Her passive grants **+25% MS for 2 seconds** whenever any ability hits ANY target — Minions, Monsters, Heroes, even hidden enemies. This makes her deceptively mobile and hard to catch.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Hit Anything = Speed Boost

Any ability hitting ANY target grants **+25% MS for 2 seconds.** Use S1 on jungle camps or minions while rotating for free speed. During S3, this MS boost is constantly active.

### S1: Boomerang Fan (Double Hit)

S1's fan deals damage going out AND coming back. Damage decays per target hit (min 60%). For max damage: position so the fan's **endpoint** lands directly on the target (both outbound and return hit at full damage).

### S1 Bush Check: Watch Your Feet

Throw S1 into a suspicious bush. If you suddenly **glow and move faster** — someone's inside. The passive procs on hidden enemies too.

### S2: Predict, Don't React

S2 has a cast delay. Don't aim where they ARE — aim where they'll BE. Best used: from bush (invisible), after S1 slow, or chained with ally CC.

### S3: Flash Ult Engage

S3 has no cast animation and doesn't interrupt movement. **S3 → Flash** into the enemy backline → S2 → S1. Late-game, this deletes squishies before they can react.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
xiao-qiao.tips:
# Xiao Qiao Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Passive MS: Free Speed Everywhere

Any ability hit on ANY target = +25% MS for 2s. While rotating: S1 a jungle camp. While escaping: S1 behind you at chasing enemies. While pushing: S1 the minion wave. You're constantly fast.

### 2. S1 Bush Check: Watch Your Feet Glow

S1 into a bush. If you suddenly speed up → enemies inside. The passive triggers on hidden enemies. Never face-check a bush again.

### 3. S2: Predictive, Not Reactive

S2 has a cast delay. Don't aim at moving feet — aim ahead of their path. Best combo: **S1 slow → they walk predictably → S2 where they'll be.** From bush, it's undodgeable.

### 4. S3 → Flash: The Signature Teamfight Play

S3 has no cast animation. **S3 → Flash** into 3+ enemies → S2 → S1. S3 continues hitting during Flash. This deletes entire backlines late-game.

### 5. S3 Defensive: Anti-Assassin Tool

When an Assassin dives you: **S3 immediately → run.** S3's constant MS + damage hits them while you kite. Don't stop to cast S2/S1 — just run and let S3 + passive MS save you.

---

## Signature Combos

### Bush Ambush Delete: **S2 → S1 → S3**

1. S2 from bush (invisible, undodgeable)
2. S1 point-blank (both hits at max damage)
3. S3 to finish — they die before landing

### Teamfight Engage: **S3 → Flash → S2 → S1**

1. S3 (MS boost active)
2. Flash into enemy backline
3. S2 underneath the squishies
4. S1 through the cluster

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S1's return hit is guaranteed if enemies are running toward you.** Kite backward after throwing.
- **S3 has a max of 4 hits per target.** Don't expect it to kill tanks — it's for squishy deletion.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs immobile squishies. Struggles vs long-range artillery (Gan & Mo) and stealth Assassins.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

xuance.overview:
# Xuance（百裡玄策） — Assassin

## Overview

- **Role:** Assassin (Hook / Snowball Jungler)
- **Lane:** Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★★☆
- **Title:** 囂狂之鐮 (Frenzied Sickle)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 百里玄策)

> Xuance is a high-tempo, snowball-heavy cleanup Assassin/Jungler. His core mechanic is his S2 **"Nightmare Hook"** — land the hook and you're a god; miss it and you're a minion. On kill or assist, his passive grants **+75% Movement Speed and +150% Attack Speed**, turning him into an unstoppable "berserker mode" team-wiper.

---

## Core Mechanics

### S2 Hook: Near vs Far Target

S2's hook only binds the **farthest target on its return path**. If a minion and enemy Hero overlap, reposition so the hook's farthest edge catches the Hero.

### S2 Second Cast: Don't Throw Immediately

After hooking, DON'T immediately throw. S1 pull → S3 dash → AA for damage → **only throw (S2 recast) when the enemy Flashes or tries to escape.**

### Passive: Berserker Mode

On kill: +75% MS, +150% AS (half on assist). This is Xuance's team-wipe engine. **Always target low-HP enemies first** — one assist triggers the rampage, then chain-kill everyone.

### Hooked Target Debuff

Xuance deals bonus damage to hooked targets, and they deal reduced damage to him. When dived, hook the Assassin — the DR lets you out-trade them.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
xuance.tips:
# Xuance Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Hook Accuracy = Everything

Xuance IS his hook. If you miss S2, you're useless for the next ~8 seconds. Practice in Training Mode. Aim for the edge of the hook's return path — it catches the farthest target.

### 2. Don't Throw Immediately After Hooking

New players always S2 → throw instantly. Big mistake. The correct flow:
1. S2 hook
2. S1 pull (reposition)
3. S3 dash behind (damage)
4. AA until they Flash/dash
5. **Now S2 recast — throw them back**

### 3. Berserker Mode: Kill One → Kill All

Passive triggers on kill/assist: **+75% MS, +150% AS**. In teamfights, don't dive the full-HP tank. **Target the lowest-HP enemy first.** One assist = berserker mode = chain-kill their entire team.

### 4. Hook the Biggest Threat for DR

Hooked enemies deal reduced damage to Xuance. When an enemy Assassin dives you, hook them — the DR lets you out-trade and potentially turn the fight.

### 5. Skill Priority

**Max S1 first, then S2. Take ultimate whenever available.** S1 provides Physical Attack scaling — your main damage steroid.

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard Gank: **S2 → S1 → S3 → AA → S2 (throw)**

1. S2 hook from bush
2. S1 pull toward you
3. S3 dash behind enemy
4. AA for damage
5. S2 recast to throw them back when they Flash

### Tower Reverse Throw: **S2 → S1 → S2 (throw) → S3**

1. S2 hook
2. S1 pull toward your tower
3. **S2 throw** — launches enemy deep into your tower
4. S3 to follow up and finish under tower

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3 dash is unstoppable during travel.** Use it to dodge CC at point-blank range.
- **Attack Speed thresholds matter.** Xuance's S1 and passive change his AS breakpoints. Copy pro player builds for optimized thresholds.
- **Matchup:** Destroys immobile squishies he can hook. Struggles vs tanks who don't care about being hooked.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

yang-jian.overview:
# Yang Jian（楊戩） — Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter (Execute / Tenacity Brawler)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 根源之目 (Eye of Origin)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 杨戬)

> Yang Jian is a well-rounded Clash Lane/Jungle Fighter with **execute, Tenacity, sustain, True Damage, and mobility**. His ceiling-to-floor gap is enormous — everything depends on S1 (dog) accuracy and his ability to outplay through S3 lifesteal and passive Tenacity in teamfights.

---

## Core Mechanics

### S1: Divine Dog (Soul Skill)

S1 marks an enemy. Second cast: dash to them. **If the dash KILLS the target (Minion, Monster, or Hero), S1's cooldown fully resets.** Use minions as springboards to gap-close and surprise enemies.

### S2: True Damage Trigger

S2 sweeps forward. **Stuns if enemy HP% ≤ your HP%** (otherwise slows). After hitting, Yang Jian's AAs deal **bonus True Damage for 5 seconds.** Always S2 → AA.

### Passive: Tenacity

Each nearby enemy Hero grants Tenacity (max 30%). With Resistance Boots (35%), Yang Jian reaches the **~60% Tenacity cap** — CC barely affects him in teamfights.

### S3: Triple Laser Lifesteal

Three laser waves. Each wave hitting enemies restores HP. Third wave fires 3 beams simultaneously. **Fight near minion waves or jungle camps** — more targets = more healing. One S3 in a minion wave can go from 10% to 100% HP.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
yang-jian.tips:
# Yang Jian Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. S1: Minion Springboard

Don't always try to dog the enemy directly. Dog a low-HP minion → S1 dash to kill it (S1 resets!) → you're now in the enemy's face with S1 ready again. This is Yang Jian's most fundamental engage trick.

### 2. S2 → AA: True Damage Window

S2 grants **5 seconds of True Damage on AAs**. Always S2 first → then AA. Never AA before S2. The True Damage is what makes Yang Jian win extended trades.

### 3. S3 Lifesteal: Fight Near Targets

S3's lasers heal per target hit. Never S3 in empty space. Always fight near:
- Minion waves (massive healing)
- Jungle camps
- Multiple enemy Heroes

One S3 through a full minion wave takes you from near-dead to full HP.

### 4. Near-CC Immunity

Passive Tenacity (max 30%) + Resistance Boots (35%) = **~60% Tenacity**. In teamfights with 3+ enemies nearby, CC lasts mere fractions of a second. You can practically ignore most crowd control.

### 5. S2 Stun Condition

S2 stuns ONLY if enemy HP% ≤ your HP%. If you're lower HP, it ALWAYS stuns (counter-play). If you're full HP, it only slows unless the enemy is also full. In close-range counter-engages when you're low, S2 guarantees a stun.

### 6. Skill Priority

Clash Lane: **Max S2, then S1.** Jungle: **Max S1, then S2.** Take S3 whenever available.

---

## Signature Combos

### Backline Delete: **S1 → S1 (dash) → S2 → AA → S3×3 → AA**

1. S1 dog enemy carry
2. S1 dash in
3. S2 stun/slow + True Damage
4. AA weave
5. S3 three waves (lifesteal through fight)
6. AA finish

### Low-HP Counter-Kill: **S2 → AA → S3 → S1 → S1 (execute)**

1. Enemy chases you at low HP
2. S2 — guaranteed stun (their HP% > yours)
3. AA with True Damage
4. S3 lasers — heal back up
5. S1 dog → S1 dash execute

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S1 resets on ANY kill with the dash.** Minions, monsters, Heroes — all work.
- **Third S3 wave fires 3 beams.** Angle yourself so all 3 hit different targets for maximum healing.
- **Matchup:** Destroys squishy backlines and sustained fighters. Struggles vs burst that kills before S3 lifesteal kicks in.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
yang-jian.build:

yao.overview:
# Yao（曜） — Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter (Skirmisher / Outplay)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★★☆
- **Title:** 星辰之子 (Child of the Stars)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 曜)

> Yao is a flashy, high-mobility skirmisher Fighter/Assassin. His core mechanic is **Star Power** (max 3 stacks; each ability grants 1 stack; at 3 stacks, his next ability is **enhanced** and his next basic attack becomes a **charging dash**). His other signature mechanic is **Star Bleed** — 40% of damage taken becomes a 2-second bleed; casting ultimate **erases the bleed entirely** and rewinds his position.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Star Power (Energy Bar)

Each ability grants 1 stack of Star Power (max 3). At 3 stacks:
- Next ability becomes **Enhanced** (stronger version)
- Next basic attack becomes a **charging dash** (gap-close through thin walls)

### Ultimate: Star Bleed Erasure (Core Tankiness)

When Yao takes damage, **40% becomes a grey "Star Bleed" on his HP bar** over 2 seconds. Casting S3 **rewinds Yao to his position 2 seconds ago** and **completely erases the Star Bleed damage**. This is why semi-tank Yao can dive in and out of teamfights seemingly immortal.

### Golden Arrow Indicator

A **golden arrow** at Yao's feet always points to where S3 will rewind him. Constantly check this during fights to avoid rewinding into the enemy team.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
yao.tips:
# Yao Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Star Bleed Erasure (Immortality Mechanic)

Yao converts **40% of damage taken into a 2-second grey bleed (Star Bleed)** on his HP bar. Casting S3 **rewinds to his position 2 seconds ago** and **completely erases the bleed**. Master this timing — it's why semi-tank Yao survives fights other Fighters can't.

### 2. Golden Arrow Awareness

A **golden arrow indicator** at Yao's feet always shows where S3 will rewind to. Check it constantly during fights. Rewinding into the enemy team = death; rewinding to safety = immortality.

### 3. Pre-Stack Star Power

Yao can stack Star Power by casting abilities into empty air. **Always keep 2 stacks** before ganking or teamfighting. 2-stack Yao has his strongest burst — one more ability triggers Enhanced immediately.

### 4. Enhanced Auto-Attack Wall Hop

The enhanced basic attack after using an Enhanced ability is a **charging dash that crosses thin walls**. Use it for creative gank angles and escapes.

### 5. Skill Priority

**Max S1 first, then S2. Take ultimate whenever available.** S1 is Yao's primary damage source — maxing it significantly boosts burst.

---

## Signature Combos (from 2 Stacks)

### Long-Range Backline Delete: **S2 → S2 → AA → S1 → S3 → S3 → AA**

1. Start at 2 stacks. Double S2 (two curved dashes) close distance to enemy backline
2. Enhanced AA to stick
3. S1 for full Physical burst
4. Double S3 to rewind back to safety, erasing bleed
5. Enhanced AA to finish

### Bush Ambush Burst: **S1 → S1 → AA → S2 → S3 → AA**

1. 2 stacks, waiting in bush
2. Enemy enters → double S1 (two whirlwind slashes) + Enhanced AA
3. Instant deletion of squishy targets
4. S2 to chase, S3 to rewind out

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3 is both offensive and defensive:** Don't always save it for escape. S3 also deals damage at the rewind destination — use it to re-engage when enemies chase your rewind path.
- **Watch the clock:** S3 rewinds exactly 2 seconds. Time your engagements so the rewind point is safe.
- **CDR is mandatory:** Without max CDR, Star Bleed expires before S3 comes back up — and you die.
- **Matchup:** Excels against burst-heavy teams (Star Bleed negates their damage). Struggles against sustained DPS that outlasts his S3 window.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
yao.build:
# Yao Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Needs high **CDR** for frequent S3 Star Bleed erasure, **Physical Penetration** for burst, and **semi-tank durability** to survive long enough to rewind. CN server consensus: **semi-tank jungle bruiser**.

---

## Recommended Jungle Build

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Greedy Bite (贪婪之噬)** | Physical Attack, CDR, Physical Penetration. Core Assassin jungle item. |
| 2 | **Calm Boots (冷静之靴)** | Early CDR to cap. *Late game: swap to Resistance Boots (抵抗之靴) once CDR overflows.* |
| 3 | **Shadow Axe (暗影战斧)** | Core squishy-killer: 15% CDR, Health, flat Penetration. |
| 4 | **Frost Grip (冰痕之握)** or **Berserker's Armor (暴烈之甲)** | **Frost Grip:** Enhanced AA dash perfectly triggers AoE slow + on-hit damage. **Berserker's Armor:** stacking MS and damage for extended kiting. |
| 5 | **Siege Breaker (破军)** | Yao has multiple burst abilities. Siege Breaker massively amplifies late-game cleanup — Enhanced S1 + Enhanced AA one-shots squishies. |
| 6 | **Eternal Night (永夜守护)** or **Magic Cloak (魔女斗篷)** | **Eternal Night:** Synergizes perfectly with Yao's Star Bleed — taking burst → heal back → S3 erases bleed → "more HP than before." |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

No extreme Attack Speed or Critical needed. **High initial Physical Penetration (100-Pen), Movement Speed, and a touch of Lifesteal** are standard.

### Setup 1: CN Server "Stealth 100-Pen" (Classic Burst)

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |
|------|------|-----|----------------|
| 🔴 Red | Mutation (异变) | ×10 | Physical Attack +2, Physical Pen +3.6 |
| 🟢 Green | Eagle Eye (鹰眼) | ×10 | Physical Attack +0.9, Physical Pen +6.4 |
| 🔵 Blue | Stealth (隐匿) | ×10 | Physical Attack +1.6, Move Speed +1% |

**Total:** +29 Physical Attack, **+100 Physical Penetration**, +10% Movement Speed.

### Setup 2: "Dream Crit + Sustain" (Newcomer Friendly)

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |
|------|------|-----|----------------|
| 🔴 Red | Mutation (异变) | ×9 | Physical Attack +2, Physical Pen +3.6 |
| 🔴 Red | Calamity (祸源) | ×1 | Critical Rate +1.6% ("dream crit" on enhanced AA) |
| 🟢 Green | Eagle Eye (鹰眼) | ×10 | Physical Attack +0.9, Physical Pen +6.4 |
| 🔵 Blue | Stealth (隐匿) | ×7 | Physical Attack +1.6, Move Speed +1% |
| 🔵 Blue | Reave (夺萃) | ×3 | Physical Lifesteal +1.6% |

**Total:** ~96 Physical Penetration, +4.8% Physical Lifesteal, +1.6% Critical Rate, high Movement Speed. The Lifesteal solves early jungle sustain issues.

---

## Quick In-Game Setup

Yao's ability → auto-attack weaving rhythm takes practice. The easiest setup:

1. Open **Preparation (备战)** → **Change Build (更换)**
2. Select **Recommended / Pro Player (推荐/大神配置)**
3. Copy the **CN #1** or current-season pro Yao setup

---

> 💡 **Player-discovered builds.** [Contribute your setup!](#)

yaria.overview:
# Yaria（瑤） — Support

## Overview

- **Role:** Support (Enchanter / Bodyguard)
- **Lane:** Roaming
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 鹿靈守心 (Deer Spirit Guardian)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 瑶)

> Yaria is one of the most popular and controversial soft Supports. Her core strengths lie in her **true-damage-ignoring ultimate shield**, frequent CC, and her unique ability to **body-block hard CC** for her team. The gap between a good Yaria and a passive "attach-and-afk" Yaria is enormous — mastering her passive and shield management is everything.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Deer Spirit (CC Immunity)

When hit by **stun, airborne, or knockback** hard CC, Yaria **dispels the CC and transforms into an invulnerable Deer Spirit**. Enemies near the deer are slowed. Use this to **intentionally body-block hooks and CC** for your jungler/carry, then escape unscathed.

### Deer → Human Reset

In Deer form, press S1 to instantly transform back — **refreshing all human-form skill cooldowns**. Advanced: dump all abilities → eat a hard CC → deer → S1 transform back → immediately cast a second rotation.

### Ultimate: True Shield + Attach

Yaria attaches to an ally, granting a **true shield** (ignores all damage types). The shield scales with **Max Health + Magic Attack**. If the shield breaks, S3 enters a long cooldown (~12s+). But if you **manually detach before it breaks, the cooldown is reduced by 50%** (just a few seconds).

### Proactive Detach (Core Shield Management)

**Watch the yellow shield bar on your ally.** When it's about to break, manually press S3 to jump off. Your S3 will be back up in seconds instead of 12+ seconds. This separates good Yarias from passive ones.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
yaria.tips:
# Yaria Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Body-Block CC with Passive (Game-Changing)

Yaria's passive triggers on **stun, airborne, or knockback** — she becomes an invulnerable Deer Spirit that slows nearby enemies. **Intentionally eat enemy CC** before level 4:
- Walk into Zhong Kui's hook
- Face-tank Daji's charm
- Absorb Mozi's cannon
Then transform to deer and escape — you just wasted a critical enemy cooldown for free.

### 2. Deer → Human Reset Trick

In Deer form, **press S1 to instantly return to human form** — this **refreshes ALL human-form cooldowns**. Advanced rotation: dump S1+S2 → eat CC → deer form → S1 (transform back) → immediately dump S1+S2 again. Two full rotations in 2 seconds.

### 3. Proactive Detach (The #1 Skill Gap)

Yaria's S3 shield has a long cooldown (~12s+) if it breaks. But **manually detaching before break = only ~50% cooldown** (~5-6s). **Constantly watch the yellow shield bar on your ally** — jump off before it pops.

### 4. S1 Bush-Check

S1 has two-stage CC (first stage: knockback; second stage: auto-tracking projectile that detects invisibility and stuns at endpoint). When approaching any suspicious bush, throw S1 first — if enemies are inside, the orb will **curve toward them automatically**.

### 5. Skill Priority

**Max S1 first, then S2. Take ultimate whenever available.** S1 is Yaria's only hard CC and bush-check tool — max it first.

---

## Signature Combo

### Protect & Counter-Engage: **S1 → S3 (attach) → S2 → Watch Shield → S3 (detach) → S1**

1. S1 knockup enemies near your carry
2. S3 attach (shield applied)
3. S2 auto-attack enemies nearby
4. **Watch shield bar** — detach before it breaks
5. S1 comes off cooldown — knockup again for double peel

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Tower shots and true damage ignore Yaria's shield** — detach before tower diving.
- **Don't attach permanently.** Detach to body-block, bush-check, and reposition.
- **Know when NOT to attach:** If your ally is about to take fatal burst, attaching shares the death. Sometimes staying separate is safer.
- **Matchup:** Excels protecting immobile hyper-carries. Struggles against instant-burst Assassins who kill faster than you can detach.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
yaria.build:
# Yaria Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Yaria's S3 true shield scales with **Max Health + Magic Attack**. Since she's attached most of the time, conventional resistances (armor, magic resist) don't apply to the shield. CN server consensus: **pure Max Health stacking**.

---

## Recommended Support Build

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Shadow Aegis (极影)** or **Guard (近卫)** | **Shadow Aegis:** if allies need Attack Speed + CDR (Marco, Gongsun Li, Zhuge Liang). **Guard:** if allies need tankiness. Keep at tier 2 until core items are done. |
| 2 | **Calm Boots (冷静之靴)** | Frequent shield refreshes and S1 CC. *Late game: swap to Resistance Boots to avoid getting CC-locked when detached.* |
| 3 | **Frost Breath (凝冰之息)** | **Yaria's soul damage item.** S2 auto-attacks nearby enemies while attached — paired with Frost Breath, this creates **continuous AoE slow** around your ally, creating devastating kiting and chase potential. |
| 4 | **Overlord's Platemail (霸者重装)** | Highest pure Max Health item in the game. Directly scales S3 shield into a massive HP wall. Out-of-combat %HP regen lets Yaria heal to full without recalling after detaching. |
| 5 | **Ominous Premonition (不祥征兆)** or **Magic Cloak (魔女斗篷)** | Personal survival when not in Deer form. Prevents getting one-shot by Assassins before passive triggers. |
| 6 | **Wings of Redemption (救赎之翼)** or **Rising Sun (旭日初光)** | Second support item. **Redemption:** group shield after detaching — double insurance. **Rising Sun:** shields lowest ally on ability hit. |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

Yaria needs **zero Penetration**. Core stats: **Max Health (1000+ HP), CDR, Movement Speed.**

### Setup 1: "Thousand-HP Harmony Tank" (95% of Players)

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |
|------|------|-----|----------------|
| 🔴 Red | Destiny (宿命) | ×10 | Max Health +33.7, Physical Defense +2.3, Attack Speed +1% |
| 🟢 Green | Void (虚空) | ×10 | Max Health +37.5, Cooldown Reduction +0.6% |
| 🔵 Blue | Harmony (调和) | ×10 | Max Health +45, Move Speed +0.4%, HP/5s +5.2 |

**Total:** **+1,162 Max Health**, +23 Physical Defense, +4% Movement Speed, +6% CDR, +10% Attack Speed.

### Setup 2: "Max CDR Aggressive" (Frequent Gank Support)

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |
|------|------|-----|----------------|
| 🔴 Red | Destiny (宿命) | ×10 | Max Health +33.7, Physical Defense +2.3, Attack Speed +1% |
| 🟢 Green | Compassion (怜悯) | ×10 | Cooldown Reduction +1% |
| 🔵 Blue | Harmony (调和) | ×10 | Max Health +45, Move Speed +0.4%, HP/5s +5.2 |

**Total:** +712 Max Health, +23 Physical Defense, **+10% CDR**, +4% Movement Speed, +10% Attack Speed. Combined with Calm Boots, easily hits the 40% CDR cap for near-constant S1 CC.

---

## Quick In-Game Setup

Yaria's shield is thin if her build lacks Health. The safest setup:

1. Open **Preparation (备战)** → **Change Build (更换)**
2. Select **Recommended / Pro Player (推荐/大神配置)**
3. Copy the current season's **CN #1 or #2 Yaria** or pro league Support setup
4. The game auto-syncs the optimal loadout

---

> 💡 **Player-discovered builds.** [Contribute your setup!](#)

ying.overview:
# Ying（雲纓） — Assassin / Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Assassin / Fighter
- **Lane:** Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★★☆
- **Title:** 燎原之心 (Heart of the Prairie Fire)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 云缨)

> Ying is a high-skill-cap skirmisher whose core mechanic revolves around **Spear Intent (枪意)** — each ability cast stacks one layer (max 3), and her enhanced basic attack consumes all layers to unleash a unique effect while reducing Ability 1 & 2 cooldowns by 1.5s.

---

## Skills & Spear Intent Mechanics

### Passive: Spear Intent (枪意)

Casting any ability grants 1 stack of Spear Intent (max 3). Her next basic attack consumes all stacks:

| Layer | Name | Effect | Use Case |
|-------|------|--------|----------|
| **1 Stack** | Firm Intent · Truce (坚意·止戈) | Rapid flurry of strikes, gains **Shield + 30% Damage Reduction** | Jungle clear, wave clear, turret pushing, close-range duels |
| **2 Stacks** | Keen Intent · Citybreaker (锐意·摧城) | Forward thrusting combo, **restores HP** (more healing at lower HP) | Mid-range poke, sustain, attrition trades |
| **3 Stacks** | True Intent · Prairie Fire (真意·燎原) | Leaps into the air (+200% move speed), channels then slams down a flame path. **Execute damage** (bonus when target HP < 50%) | Long-range finisher, teamfight edge harassment, securing kills |

> **Tip:** During the 3-stack enhanced attack, pull the left joystick in the **opposite direction** to change the slam direction.

### Abilities

- **Ability 1 (S1):** AoE slash + knockup. Main crowd control tool.
- **Ability 2 (S2):** Charge forward with slow. Can be cancelled. **Max this first** for lower CD and higher move speed.
- **Ability 3 / Ultimate (S3):** Two-part charge + sweep. **Grants crowd-control immunity (Unstoppable) and high damage reduction** during both phases. Use reactively against enemy CC.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
ying.tips:
# Ying Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Understand the Three Spear Intent Layers

Ying's entire kit orbits around **Spear Intent (枪意)** — each ability cast adds 1 stack (max 3). Your enhanced basic attack consumes all stacks and reduces S1 & S2 cooldowns by 1.5s.

- **1 Stack (Firm Intent · Truce):** Rapid strikes + **Shield & 30% DR**. Use for **jungle clear, wave clear, turret push**, and close-range brawls when outnumbered.
- **2 Stacks (Keen Intent · Citybreaker):** Thrust combo + **HP restore** (higher heal when lower HP). Use for **mid-range poke, attrition trades, and sustain**.
- **3 Stacks (True Intent · Prairie Fire):** Airborne leap (+200% MS) → charged flame slam with **execute damage** (bonus when enemy HP < 50%). Use for **long-range finishers and teamfight edge harassment**.

> During 3-stack enhanced attack, pull the **left joystick opposite** to redirect the slam.

### 2. Pre-Stack Spear Intent

- Ying's abilities **stack Spear Intent even when cast into empty air**.
- S2 still grants a stack even if you **cancel the charge**.
- Before ganking or teamfighting, hide in a bush and **pre-stack 1–2 layers** by whiffing abilities.

### 3. Skill Priority

**Max S2 first, then S1. Take ultimate whenever available.**

- Leveling S1 only adds negligible base damage.
- Leveling S2 **significantly reduces cooldown** and **increases movespeed cap** — far more value for Ying's skirmish-heavy playstyle.

### 4. Ultimate = Unstoppable + Damage Reduction

Ying's S3 (both the charge and sweep phases) grants **Unstoppable (霸体) and high damage reduction**. Use it reactively to:

- **Ignore enemy CC** — tank through Daji, Mai Shiranui, Zhang Fei, etc.
- **Turn fights** — absorb burst while dealing damage.
- **Escape** — use the two dashes to disengage over walls.

---

## Signature Combos (CN Server / High-Rank)

### Burst Gank / Delete Backline: **2 → 3 → 3 → 1 → A**

1. **S2 charge** — gap-close with slow
2. **S3 first cast** — dash + push
3. **S3 second cast** — sweep + push again
4. **S1** — knockup to lock them down
5. **Enhanced AA (3 stacks)** — airborne execute slam to finish

> Classic one-shot combo. Deleting squishies from full HP.

### Skirmish / Sustain Duel: **2 → A → 1 → A** (repeat)

- Weave 1-stack and 2-stack enhanced attacks while cycling S2 → S1.
- Constant shields, healing, and CD refunds wear down opponents in extended fights.
- Ideal against tanks and bruisers.

### Max CDR Double True Intent: **2 → 1 → 3 → A → 1 → 3 → 2 → A**

- At **40% CDR** (late game), you can fit **two 3-stack flame slams** in one combo cycle.
- Requires specific itemization (see [build.md](build.md)).
- Devastating in late-game teamfights.

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Turret pressure:** 1-stack enhanced AA provides a shield — use it to tank 1–2 turret shots while sieging.
- **Vision deny:** S2 charge can go through thin walls for unexpected gank angles.
- **Flame path zoning:** 3-stack slam leaves a burning trail — use it to block escape routes, not just for damage.
- **Cooldown management:** Every enhanced AA reduces S1 & S2 cooldowns by 1.5s. Aggressively weave autos between abilities — never just dump all skills.
- **Teamfight positioning:** Stay at the edge with 3-stack intent charged. Leap in only when an enemy drops below 50% HP for the execute.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
ying.build:
# Ying Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Ying is a **CDR-dependent, semi-tank skirmisher**. Full damage builds will get deleted. CN server consensus: **bruiser-assassin hybrid**.

---

## Recommended Jungle Build (Most Common)

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Greedy Bite (贪婪之噬)** | Physical Attack + Physical Penetration. Core jungle item. |
| 2 | **Calm Boots (冷静之靴)** | Early CDR to cap. *Swap to Resistance Boots (抵抗之靴) or defensive items late game when CDR overflows.* |
| 3 | **Shadow Axe (暗影战斧)** | HP + Attack + Penetration. Essential for deleting squishies. |
| 4 | **Frost Grip (冰痕之握)** | **Ying's perfect item!** Her enhanced AAs (Spear Intent) **fully trigger Frost Grip's slow + on-hit effects**. Massive stickiness and durability spike. |
| 5 | **Siege Breaker (破军)** | Extreme Physical Attack. **Stacks with Ying's 3-stack execute passive** (< 50% HP bonus damage). One slam, one kill. |
| 6 | **Flex Defensive Slot** | **Magic Cloak (魔女斗篷)** vs heavy magic burst; **Pure Sky (纯净苍穹)** for active DR vs physical burst; or **Berserker's Armor (暴烈之甲)** for balanced durability. |

### Late-Game Swaps

- Once **Greedy Bite** is fully stacked and CDR overflows, sell **Calm Boots** for:
  - **Resistance Boots (抵抗之靴)** — Tenacity vs heavy CC
  - **Sage's Sanctuary (贤者的庇护)** — Resurrection
  - **Fate's Edge (名刀·司命)** — Fatal damage immunity

---

## Alternative: Lane / Flex Build

| Order | Item | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| 1 | **Shadow Axe (暗影战斧)** | Rush first for early power spike |
| 2 | **Resistance Boots (抵抗之靴)** | Tenacity for laning safety |
| 3 | **Frost Grip (冰痕之握)** | Core skirmish item |
| 4 | **Siege Breaker (破军)** | Execute damage amp |
| 5 | **Pure Sky (纯净苍穹)** | Active: 30% DR for 3s. Pairs with Ying's innate DR from ultimate. |
| 6 | **Eternal Night (永夜守护)** or **Magic Cloak (魔女斗篷)** | Magic defense |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

Ying does **NOT need critical chance** as a core stat. **Physical Penetration, Movement Speed, and a touch of Attack Speed / Lifesteal** are the unanimous choices among top CN players.

### Setup 1: CN Server "100-Pen Hybrid" (High Burst)

The most popular setup. Early-game damage is oppressive.

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats |
|------|------|-----|-------|
| 🔴 Red | Mutation (异变) | ×7 | Physical Attack +2, Physical Pen +3.6 each |
| 🔴 Red | Legacy (传承) | ×3 | Physical Attack +3.2 each *(or just 10× Mutation)* |
| 🟢 Green | Eagle Eye (鹰眼) | ×10 | Physical Attack +0.9, Physical Pen +6.4 each |
| 🔵 Blue | Stealth (隐匿) | ×7 | Physical Attack +1.6, Move Speed +1% each |
| 🔵 Blue | Hunt (狩猎) | ×3 | Attack Speed +1%, Move Speed +1% each |

**Total:** ~100 Physical Penetration, high base Physical Attack, +10% Movement Speed, +3% Attack Speed.

### Setup 2: Global / Balanced "Micro-Crit" (Solo Queue Safe)

Used by some Global "Ying" players. Small crit chance for lucky burst during extended AA chains.

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats |
|------|------|-----|-------|
| 🔴 Red | Calamity (祸源) | ×6 | Critical Rate +1.6% each |
| 🔴 Red | Mutation (异变) | ×4 | Physical Attack +2, Physical Pen +3.6 each |
| 🟢 Green | Eagle Eye (鹰眼) | ×10 | Physical Attack +0.9, Physical Pen +6.4 each |
| 🔵 Blue | Stealth (隐匿) | ×10 | Physical Attack +1.6, Move Speed +1% each *(or mix in Hunt)* |

**Total:** ~9.6% Critical Rate, solid Penetration, +10% Movement Speed. The crit chance occasionally spikes during Ying's multi-hit 1-stack and 2-stack enhanced AAs.

---

## Quick In-Game Setup

The fastest way: open **Preparation (备战)** → **Change Build (更换)** → **Recommended / Pro Player (推荐/大神配置)** → copy the #1 CN server or Pro Player setup. The game auto-syncs high-level Arcana for you.

---

> 💡 **Player-discovered builds.** [Contribute your setup!](#)

ying-shadow.overview:
# Ying (Shadow)（影） — Assassin

## Overview

- **Role:** Assassin (Berserker / Immortal Duelist)
- **Lane:** Jungle / Clash Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★★☆
- **Title:** 黯羽東君 (Dark Feather Lord)
- **Region:** CN server exclusive (影)

> Ying (Shadow) is a uniquely designed melee Berserker/Assassin. Her core: **ranged/melee AA mode switching**, a **Fury stacking** system that grants AS + Penetration the more she fights, and her S3 — **Death Immunity (Unyielding).** While S3 is active, she CANNOT die. And if she scores a kill/assist during S3, the duration refreshes. She revives with HP even if S3 expires while taking fatal damage.

---

## Core Mechanics

### AA Mode Switching: Ranged Poke ↔ Melee Flurry

- **S1 active:** AAs become **ranged feather throws** with +MS. Use to poke, kite, and stack Fury from safety.
- **S2/Melee:** AAs become **high-speed dual-blade flurries.** Maximum DPS for all-in fights.

### Fury Stacking: Hit and Get Hit

Taking damage or hitting enemies builds Fury. Higher Fury = **more Attack Speed + Physical Penetration.** Ying gets stronger as fights go on — never retreat at high Fury.

### S3: Death Immunity (The Berserker's Soul)

S3 grants: HP restore, +MS, and **CANNOT DIE** for the duration. If you score a kill/assist during S3: **duration refreshes.** If S3 expires while you're taking fatal damage: you **revive with a portion of HP.** Don't save S3 for 10% HP — cast it at ~30% or when you predict burst incoming.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
ying-shadow.tips:
# Ying (Shadow) Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. S1 Ranged First: Stack Fury from Safety

Before committing: S1 → ranged AA poke from the edge. Build Fury stacks (+AS + Penetration) safely. Once Fury is high AND enemy is softened: S2 in for melee flurry.

### 2. S3: Cast at ~30% HP, Not 5%

Don't save S3 for near-death — burst can one-shot you before you press it. Cast S3 at **~30% HP** or when you **predict** the enemy is about to unload burst/CC. The HP restore + DR + Death Immunity will outlast their cooldowns.

### 3. S3 Kill/Assist = Refresh

Scoring a kill or assist during S3 **refreshes the duration.** In teamfights: S3 → kill one target → duration refreshed → kill the next → refreshed → clean up the entire team. Chain-reset immortality.

### 4. AA Minions/Jungle to Reduce Cooldowns

AAs reduce ability cooldowns. Between fights: AA jungle camps or minion waves to bring S3 back faster. Never stand idle.

### 5. S2 Engage Only When Fury Is High

S2 switches to melee flurry (max DPS). But at 0 Fury, melee is risky. Always pre-stack Fury with S1 ranged AAs before S2 diving in.

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard: **S1 → AA×4 → S2 → AA → S3 → AA**

1. S1 (ranged mode + MS)
2. AA ×4 from range (stack Fury + slow enemy)
3. S2 dash in (switch to melee flurry)
4. AA melee burst
5. S3 when focused (Death Immunity + chain kills)

### Bush Ambush: **S2 → AA → S1 → AA → S3**

1. S2 from bush (instant melee flurry)
2. AA burst
3. S1 (switch to ranged if they Flash — slow + chase)
4. AA ranged
5. S3 if needed

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3's revive works even if you take fatal damage at the last frame.** Trust the mechanic — keep fighting.
- **Fury stacks give BOTH AS and Penetration.** Late-game high-Fury Ying shreds tanks like paper.
- **Matchup:** God-tier in extended fights. Struggles vs burst that one-shots before S3 can activate.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
ying-shadow.build:
# Ying (Shadow) Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Semi-tank bruiser. Fury gives built-in Penetration + AS — she doesn't need full damage. **The longer she survives, the more damage she deals.** CN server consensus: **semi-tank sustain.**

---

## Recommended Jungle / Clash Lane Build

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Giant's Grip (巨人之握)** or **Shadow Axe (暗影战斧)** | Jungle: HP stacking + burn. Clash: straight to Shadow Axe. |
| 2 | **Resistance Boots (抵抗之靴)** | Tenacity. S3 prevents death, but CC stops AAs — no AAs = no Fury = no damage. |
| 3 | **Shadow Axe (暗影战斧)** | Core damage item. CDR + flat Penetration + Health. |
| 4 | **Frost Grip (冰痕之握)** | S1/S2 → AA perfectly triggers AoE slow. CDR + Defense. Maximum stickiness. |
| 5 | **Berserker's Armor (暴烈之甲)** | **Ying's signature item!** Taking hits grants MS + damage output. Stacks with Fury — she gets faster AND stronger as fights progress. |
| 6 | **Siege Breaker (破军)** or **Pure Sky (纯净苍穹)** | **Siege Breaker:** execute burst during S3 chain-kills. **Pure Sky:** active DR — stacks with S3 for near-immortality. |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

Core: **Physical Penetration, Movement Speed, mild Lifesteal.**

### Setup 1: "Stealth 100-Pen" (CN Standard)

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |
|------|------|-----|----------------|
| 🔴 Red | Mutation (异变) | ×10 | Physical Attack +2, Physical Pen +3.6 |

ying-zheng.overview:
# Ying Zheng（嬴政） — Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Mage (Artillery / Wave Clear King)
- **Lane:** Mid Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 王者獨尊 (Imperial Sovereign)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 嬴政)

> Ying Zheng is a uniquely high-output, long-range Magic artillery. He has some of the best wave clear and high-ground defense in the game. His AAs are penetrating line attacks that deal mixed Physical/Magic damage — making him the hardest-hitting AA Mage in mid lane. His S3 fires **50 flying swords over 5 seconds** with +20% MS, letting him reposition while outputting.

---

## Core Mechanics

### AA: Penetrating Line Attack

Ying Zheng's AAs pierce through all enemies in a line, dealing mixed damage. **Always weave AAs between abilities** — his early-game AA DPS rivals Marksmen.

### S2: Shield + Anti-Assassin

S2 grants a shield that provides **bonus Magic Attack + MS while active.** On activation: **clears enemy Physical Attack equipment bonus** for 2 seconds. When an Assassin dives you: S2 → their damage plummets → walk away.

### Keep S2 Active Always

S2's buffs (AP + MS) persist while the shield holds. If the shield breaks: recast immediately. Always rotate with S2 active.

### S3: 50 Swords + 20% MS

S3 fires 50 swords over 5 seconds. You can **move freely during S3.** Uses: siege towers (force defenders off), check bushes (hit sound effect), steal objectives (high tick rate), zone enemies (nobody walks into 50 swords).

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
ying-zheng.tips:
# Ying Zheng Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Always Keep S2 Shield Active

S2's AP + MS buffs persist while shielded. If the shield breaks: recast immediately. Rotate with S2 on for constant MS + damage boost.

### 2. S2 Anti-Assassin: Strip Their AD

S2 activation **removes enemy Physical Attack equipment bonuses** for 2 seconds. When Lanling Wang, Jing, or any AD Assassin dives you: S2 → their damage drops ~40% → walk away or S3 counter-kill.

### 3. AA Constantly (You Hit Like a Marksman)

Ying Zheng's AAs pierce and deal mixed damage. In lane and skirmishes: **AA between every ability.** Early-game AA DPS is higher than most Mages' entire kits.

### 4. S3: Move While Firing (ABSOLUTELY Critical)

S3 lets you **move freely while shooting 50 swords.** Use this to: chase enemies (run forward during S3), kite enemies (run backward), dodge skillshots (strafe). Never stand still during S3.

### 5. S3 Zone Control: Force Enemies Off Turrets

When your team sieges: S3 directly at the enemy tower. Enemies must either eat 50 swords or abandon the tower. Either way, your team wins.

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard: **S2 (active) → S1 → S3 → AA weave**

1. Ensure S2 is active
2. S1 slow at enemy's feet
3. S3 — 50 swords while walking toward them
4. AA between swords to finish

### Anti-Dive: **S2 → S1 (at feet) → S3 (backward) → AA**

1. Assassin dives → S2 (strip their AD)
2. S1 at your feet (slow them)
3. S3 while walking AWAY (they eat swords chasing you)
4. AA as they retreat

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3 has 50 ticks.** Mask of Agony and Sunset Flow proc dozens of times during one S3.
- **S3 hit sound = bush check.** Fire S3 into suspicious bushes. If you hear hits → enemies inside.
- **Matchup:** God-tier at wave clear and sieging. Struggles vs long-range engage that catches him before S2 activates.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

yixing.overview:
# Yi Xing（弈星） — Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Mage (Zone Control / Strategic)
- **Lane:** Mid Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 天元之弈 (Grandmaster of Go)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 弈星)

> Yi Xing is a strategically dominant zone-control Mage. He has one of the best area-lockdown ultimates in the game ("draw a prison"), strong map control, and a built-in death-immunity passive that makes him deceptively tanky. His chess-piece collision mechanic rewards precise ability sequencing.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Built-In Death Immunity

When Yi Xing takes fatal damage, he becomes **invulnerable (ethereal)** and gains a shield. 120s cooldown. This lets him bait enemy Assassin ultimates, face-check bushes, and position aggressively — he's far tankier than he looks.

### Chess Collision + Enhanced AA

S1 places a piece. S2 places a formation that **pulls S1 pieces toward it**, triggering an explosion. After collision, Yi Xing's next AA becomes a **super-long-range enhanced auto-attack** — always weave this between spells.

### S2 Second Cast: Pull + Knockup

Enemies touching S2's edge OR recasting S2 **pulls enemies toward the center with a brief knockup**. Core CC — interrupts channeled abilities (Mozi S3, Zhong Kui S3).

### S3 Ultimate: Draw a Prison (Resizable)

S3 can be **dragged to any rectangular shape** before casting. Long strip = block jungle paths. Square = trap enemies in Dragon pit.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
yixing.tips:
# Yi Xing Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Built-In Death Immunity = Bait Everything

Yi Xing's passive grants invulnerability + shield on fatal damage (120s CD). Use this aggressively:
- Face-check suspicious bushes (if enemies jump you, passive triggers → walk away)
- Bait Assassin ultimates (Lanling Wang, Jing, Sima Yi)
- Position forward in teamfights to absorb key cooldowns

### 2. S2 Second Cast: Pull + Interrupt

S2's second cast pulls enemies toward the center with a brief knockup. This interrupts channeled abilities:
- Mozi S3 (ultimate)
- Zhong Kui S3
- Zhang Liang S3
Also use to yank enemies back when they try to escape your ultimate.

### 3. Always Weave Enhanced AA

After any S1+S2 collision, your next AA becomes a **super-long-range enhanced attack**. Always: S1 → S2 → AA. Don't leave the enhanced AA unused — it's a significant portion of your damage.

### 4. S1 Bush-Check

S1 pieces provide vision. Store multiple charges and constantly toss them into suspicious bushes. If a piece lands and reveals enemies, you've just saved your team from a face-check.

### 5. S3 Resizable — Not Just Square

S3 can be dragged to any shape:
- **Long strip:** block jungle corridors, cut off escape paths
- **Square:** trap enemies in Dragon/Baron pit
- **Wide rectangle:** zone control in open teamfights

---

## Signature Combos

### Lane Poke: **S2 → S1 → S2 (recast) → AA**

1. S2 formation under enemy
2. S1 piece inside → collision explosion
3. S2 recast → pull enemy toward center + knockup
4. Enhanced AA from max range to finish

### Perfect Teamfight Engage: **S2 → S2 (recast) → S3 → S1 → S1 → AA**

1. S2 → recast pull for initial CC
2. S3 immediately — trap pulled enemies inside
3. S1 spam inside the cage for multiple collision explosions
4. Enhanced AA to clean up

---

## Advanced Tips

- **Passive stacks permanent AP:** Each collision hit grants permanent Magic Attack. Poke constantly in lane to scale.
- **S3 blocks dashes:** The cage walls can't be dashed through (similar to terrain). Enemies with Flash can still escape.
- **Matchup:** Excels vs immobile teamfight comps. Struggles vs hyper-mobile Assassins who can dash out of S3.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
yixing.build:

yuan-ge.overview:
# Yuan Ge（元歌） — Assassin

## Overview

- **Role:** Assassin (Puppet Master / Complex)
- **Lane:** Jungle / Mid Lane / Clash Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★★☆
- **Title:** 無間傀儡 (Endless Puppet)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 元歌)

> Yuan Ge is widely considered the highest skill-cap Assassin in the game. He has a unique **Body + Puppet dual-form** with 8 active abilities (4 body + 4 puppet). Mastering him requires extreme hand speed, spatial awareness, and split-second reaction time.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Puppet (S1)

S1 deploys a puppet that can **disguise as a random enemy Hero**. The puppet inherits Yuan Ge's items (except resurrection and certain actives). If the puppet is destroyed, Yuan Ge is **revealed, stunned, and S1 is disabled for ~15 seconds** — catastrophic in teamfights. Always recall the puppet before it dies.

### S4 Body: Invincibility Frame

Yuan Ge's body S4 is a dash with a **brief invincibility + CC-cleanse frame** on cast. With perfect timing, this dodges Zhuge Liang S3, Musashi S3, or tower shots.

### Stealth Mechanic

While controlling the puppet, if Yuan Ge's real body is in a bush, his body remains **invisible on the minimap**. This makes him the best "safe scouting" and "long-range engagement" hero.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
yuan-ge.tips:
# Yuan Ge Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Protect the Puppet at All Costs

If the puppet is destroyed: you're **revealed, stunned, and S1 is disabled for ~15s**. This is usually fatal. When puppet HP is low:
- Press **S4 (body)** to pull the puppet back
- Or press **S1** to recall it immediately
Never let the enemy kill your puppet.

### 2. S4 Invincibility Frame

Yuan Ge's body S4 dash has a **brief invincibility + CC-cleanse** on cast. With frame-perfect timing you can dodge:
- Zhuge Liang S3 (ultimate lock-on)
- Musashi S3 (aerial strike)
- Tower shots
Practice this timing — it's the hallmark of a truly skilled Yuan Ge.

### 3. Disguise Mind Games

When first deployed, the puppet disguises as a random enemy Hero. Walk the puppet casually toward enemy squishies — in lower ranks and Global server, players often don't realize it's a puppet until they're already combo-locked.

### 4. Bush Stealth

While controlling the puppet, if your real body is in a bush, it's completely invisible on the minimap. This lets you:
- Scout the entire enemy jungle safely
- Engage from extreme range while your body stays hidden

### 5. Skill Priority

**Max S2 first, then S3. Take ultimate whenever available.** Body S2 (dark projectile barrage) is your main wave-clear and burst tool.

---

## Signature Combos

All classic Yuan Ge combos derive from one fundamental sequence:

### Core One-Shot Combo: **1 → 4 → 3 → 3 → 2 → 2 → 3**

1. **1** — Deploy puppet
2. **4** — Puppet invincible dash to close distance
3. **3** — Puppet slow (first hit)
4. **3** — Puppet continuous stun (locks enemy in place)
5. **2** — Body swaps position with puppet
6. **2** — Body point-blank fires all 4 projectiles (massive damage)
7. **3** — Body cross-slash execute (finisher)

### Long-Range Turret Dive: **1 → 3 → 3 → 4 → 2 → 3**

1. **1** deploy puppet → **3** slow → **3** stun (locks enemy under tower)
2. **4** — Body teleports in, replacing puppet
3. **2** → **3** — Point-blank burst + execute to finish
4. Walk out or S4 to escape

### Escape / Counter-Engage: **1 → 4 → 2 → 1**

When jumped on:
1. **1** deploy puppet + **4** — puppet pushes forward + knocks enemy back
2. **2** — Swap positions with puppet (create distance)
3. **1** — Recall puppet

---

## Advanced Tips

- **The classic **1433223** is the foundation.** Drill it in Training Mode until it's muscle memory before taking Yuan Ge into real matches.
- **Puppet applies on-hit effects.** Items like Frost Grip trigger from puppet auto-attacks.
- **Matchup:** Destroys immobile squishies. Struggles vs instant CC that can kill the puppet before you react.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
yuan-ge.build:
# Yuan Ge Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** All of Yuan Ge's abilities scale with **Bonus Physical Attack (Bonus AD)**. He desperately needs **CDR** to minimize puppet downtime. Pure damage burst is the only viable build. Zero Attack Speed or Critical needed.

---

## Recommended Pure Burst Build

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Calm Boots (冷静之靴)** | Early CDR rush. More CDR = less puppet downtime = more kill windows. *Late game: swap to Resistance Boots when CDR overflows.* |
| 2 | **Shadow Axe (暗影战斧)** | Core first major item: Attack, Health, CDR, flat Penetration. Amplifies both puppet and body burst. |
| 3 | **Siege Breaker (破军)** | **Yuan Ge's soul item.** Massive AD scaling on all skills. Execute threshold for 2-3 combo skyrockets. This is the "delete squishies" power spike. |
| 4 | **Master's Power (宗师之力)** or **Frost Grip (冰痕之握)** | **Master's Power:** Enhanced AA after abilities for max burst. **Frost Grip:** Slow + CDR. Puppet auto-attacks also trigger Frost Grip's on-hit slow — strong kiting tool for Clash Lane. |
| 5 | **Star Breaker (碎星锤)** | 40% Physical Penetration. Mandatory vs late-game armor stacking (Ominous Premonition, Thornmail). |
| 6 | **Pure Sky (纯净苍穹)** or **Fate's Edge (名刀·司命)** | Survival flex. **Pure Sky:** active DR for surviving initial burst when caught out. **Fate's Edge:** fatal-damage immunity for clutch outplays. |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

Zero Attack Speed or Critical needed. **Pure Physical Penetration + base Attack + Movement Speed** is the only correct setup.

### Setup 1: "Stealth 100-Pen" (95% of Top Players)

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |
|------|------|-----|----------------|
| 🔴 Red | Mutation (异变) | ×10 | Physical Attack +2, Physical Pen +3.6 |
| 🟢 Green | Eagle Eye (鹰眼) | ×10 | Physical Attack +0.9, Physical Pen +6.4 |
| 🔵 Blue | Stealth (隐匿) | ×10 | Physical Attack +1.6, Move Speed +1% |

**Total:** +29 Physical Attack, **+100 Physical Penetration**, **+10% Movement Speed**. The MS dramatically improves body bush-rotation and kiting efficiency.

### Setup 2: "Clash Lane Sustain"

| Slot | Rune | Qty | Stats per Rune |
|------|------|-----|----------------|
| 🔴 Red | Mutation (异变) | ×10 | Physical Attack +2, Physical Pen +3.6 |
| 🟢 Green | Eagle Eye (鹰眼) | ×10 | Physical Attack +0.9, Physical Pen +6.4 |
| 🔵 Blue | Stealth (隐匿) | ×7 | Physical Attack +1.6, Move Speed +1% |
| 🔵 Blue | Reave (夺萃) | ×3 | Physical Lifesteal +1.6% |

**Total:** +100 Physical Penetration, **+4.8% Physical Lifesteal**. The lifesteal lets Yuan Ge sustain in lane without recalling, preventing missed minion waves.

---

## Quick Tip for Beginners

Yuan Ge's skill layout is extremely complex. Before taking him into ranked:
1. Copy the **CN #1 Yuan Ge** setup via **Preparation → Recommended**
2. Go to **Training Mode** and drill the classic **1433223** combo until it's muscle memory
3. Only then try real matches

---

yuhuan.overview:
# Yang Yuhuan（楊玉環） — Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Mage (Utility / Skirmisher)
- **Lane:** Mid Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 霓裳風華 (Radiant Beauty)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 杨玉环)

> Yang Yuhuan is an extremely high-ceiling, versatile Mage. Her unique mechanic is dual Stance: **Green (healing)** and **Blue (damage)**. Her ultimate grants **invulnerability** (untargetable). Thanks to her exceptional kiting, she's not only a stable Mid Laner — she's also become a **high-rank and pro-play Jungler** in the current meta.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Stance Toggle (Passive)

- **Blue Stance (惊鸿):** Abilities deal bonus AoE Magic Damage. **Use this 95% of the time** — farming, rotating, poking, teamfighting.
- **Green Stance (清平):** Abilities heal nearby allies + self. **Only switch when your team needs healing** after fights, or you're critically low and need sustain from Minions/Monsters.

### S1 + Enhanced AA

After S1, the next AA deals bonus damage + **reduces all cooldowns by 1 second**. Always weave S1→AA between spells.

### S2: Edge Timing

S2's stun ONLY triggers on the **outer ring edge**. Enemies too close or too far are not stunned. Constantly adjust positioning to keep enemies on the ring.

### S3: Invulnerability

S3 makes Yang Yuhuan **untargetable**. Use to: dodge Zhuge Liang S3, Musashi S3, tower shots; dive towers for kills; or give teammates massive healing during engages.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
yuhuan.tips:
# Yang Yuhuan Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Blue Stance 95% of the Time

Blue (damage) is your default. Only switch to Green (healing) when:
- Your team is low HP after a fight
- You're critically low and need to heal off Minions/Monsters
Never fight in Green stance — you lose all your damage.

### 2. S1 → AA Is Mandatory

After every S1, the next AA deals bonus damage + **reduces all cooldowns by 1 second**. Always S1 → AA between spells. This is where 40%+ of your damage comes from. Never skip the AA.

### 3. S2 Edge = Stun, Not the Middle

S2's stun ONLY triggers on the **outer ring**. Enemies inside the ring (close to you) are NOT stunned. Constantly reposition to keep enemies on the outer edge.

### 4. S3 Invulnerability: Offensive AND Defensive

S3 makes you untargetable. Use it:
- **Defensively:** Dodge Zhuge Liang S3, Musashi S3, tower shots
- **Offensively:** Dive towers, follow your divers (Jing, Lam) with massive healing + damage

### 5. Follow Your Frontline

Yang Yuhuan is NOT a solo-carry. Stay behind your tank/engager. Use S2 to chain CC after their initiation. Use S1→AA to pressure from behind them.

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard Poke: **S1 → AA → S2 → AA → S1 → AA**

1. S1 → AA (first cooldown reduction)
2. S2 edge stun → AA
3. S1 (refreshed from AA reductions) → AA
Two S1 casts + two CD reductions in one rotation.

### Tower Dive / Aggressive: **S2 → S1 → AA → S3 → AA**

1. S2 edge stun under tower
2. S1 → AA burst
3. S3 untargetable — soak tower shots + deal damage
4. AA after landing to finish

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3 heals allies too.** When your diver goes in, S3 on top of them for massive burst healing.
- **Green stance S1 heals from Minions/Monsters.** If you're low and no ally is nearby, switch Green and S1 a minion wave.
- **CDR is everything.** More CDR = more S1→AA rotations = more damage + healing.
- **Matchup:** Excels in coordinated team play. Struggles when your team has no frontline.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
yuhuan.build:
# Yang Yuhuan Build & Items

> **Build philosophy:** Needs **CDR, Magic Attack (scales both damage AND healing), and Movement Speed**. Two viable paths: Mid Lane burst-kiting and Jungle semi-tank.

---

## Build A: Mid Lane Burst-Kite

| Order | Item | Why |
|-------|------|-----|
| 1 | **Calm Boots (冷静之靴)** | CDR rush. More S1→AA rotations. |
| 2 | **Mask of Agony (痛苦面具)** or **Echo Staff (回响之杖)** | **Mask:** S1 spam perfectly triggers percentage HP burn. **Echo:** instant burst + Movement Speed. |
| 3 | **Spellblade Staff (巫术法杖)** | **Mid Yang Yuhuan's soul item!** "Power Strike" stacks with S1's enhanced AA — one auto-attack chunks 50% of squishy HP. |
| 4 | **Savant's Wrath (博学者之怒)** | Percentage AP boost. Damage AND healing spike simultaneously. |
| 5 | **Void Staff (虚无法杖)** | Penetration vs late-game magic resist. |
| 6 | **Sunset Flow (日暮之流)** or **Splendor (辉月)** | **Sunset Flow:** S1 multi-hit stacks penetration instantly. **Splendor:** double invulnerability with S3 — nearly unkillable. |

---

## Build B: High-Rank Jungle Semi-Tank

| Order | Item | Why |

| 1 | **Rune Greatsword (符文大剑)** | Blue jungle knife for AP stacking. |
| 2 | **Resistance Boots (抵抗之靴)** | Tenacity vs jungle invades. |
| 3 | **Mask of Agony (痛苦面具)** | Core damage source. Tankiness + sustained burn. |
| 4 | **Frost Grip (冰痕之握)** | Replaces Spellblade Staff. CDR + Health + Physical Defense. Enhanced AA slow for stickiness. |
| 5 | **Berserker's Armor (暴烈之甲)** or **Ominous Premonition (不祥征兆)** | Tank stats. Berserker's for stacking damage; Ominous Premonition for anti-Marksman. |
| 6 | **Magic Cloak (魔女斗篷)** or **Savant's Wrath (博学者之怒)** | Magic defense or late-game AP for bigger heals. |

---

## Arcana / Runes (铭文)

**Total:** +42 Magic Attack, +88 Magic Penetration, +6% Attack Speed, +4% Movement Speed, **+450 Max Health**, +52 HP/5s. More forgiving vs burst laners.

## Quick In-Game Setup

Yang Yuhuan is team-reliant. Stay with your frontline. For the easiest setup, copy the **CN #1** or pro player build via **Preparation → Recommended**.

zhang-fei.overview:
# Zhang Fei（張飛） — Tank / Support

## Overview

- **Role:** Tank / Support (Shield / Anti-Dive)
- **Lane:** Roaming
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 禁血狂獸 (Forbidden Blood Beast)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 张飞)

> Zhang Fei is the most versatile, consistent T0 Tank/Support across all metas. He has massive ally shields, hard CC engage, and a game-changing S3 transformation that grants him **40% Max HP as a shield** while becoming a massive disruption tank. He's the gold standard of protective Supports.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Fury (Rage Bar)

Build Fury through: AAs, S1/S2 hits, and shielding allies with S2. S3 (ultimate) can only be cast at full Fury. **Never enter a teamfight without full Fury.** Farm Fury on jungle camps or minions between fights.

### S2: Shield All Nearby Allies

S2 dashes and grants a massive shield to all allies in range. This is your primary Fury-building tool AND your core protection ability. Spam it on cooldown during rotations.

### S1: Knockback (Human Form) / Slam (Beast Form)

Human: knocks back enemies (interrupts Guan Yu charge, Marco S3, Li Xin). Beast: AoE slam + slow.

### S3: Transform + 40% Max HP Shield

Roar forward. **Knocks back enemies to the sides, stuns enemies at the end.** Zhang Fei gains a **40% Max HP shield** and transforms into Beast Form with enhanced abilities. Use to: counter-engage dives, split enemy formations, or push enemies into walls/your team.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
zhang-fei.tips:
# Zhang Fei Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Never Fight Without Full Fury

S3 requires full Fury. Between fights: **S2 shield allies, S1 jungle camps, AA anything.** Entering a fight without S3 means you're half a Hero. Farm Fury proactively.

### 2. S2 Shield: Spam Constantly

S2 shields all nearby allies AND builds Fury. During rotations, S2 onto teammates on cooldown. Before fights, make sure your carries have shields pre-applied.

### 3. S3: Counter-Engage > Engage

Zhang Fei's S3 is stronger as a **reactive tool**:
- Enemy Assassin dives your ADC? **S3 them away.**
- Enemy team engages? **S3 to split their frontline from backline.**
- Enemy clustered in a narrow jungle path? **S3 to stun multiple.**

S3 → Flash can redirect the roar direction mid-cast for surprise angles.

### 4. S1: Interrupt Everything

Human-form S1 knocks enemies back. Use to interrupt:
- Guan Yu's charge
- Marco Polo's S3
- Li Xin's S1 charge
- Zhong Kui's S3

### 5. Beast Form: Stay in Their Face

After transforming, you're a massive tank with 40% Max HP shield. Don't stand behind your carries — **jump onto the enemy backline** with S2 and harass their ADC/Mage. Soak damage, disrupt positioning.

---

## Signature Play: S3 Counter-Engage

1. Enemy Assassin (Lanling Wang, Jing) dives your ADC
2. **S3 directly at them** — knockback + stun
3. Beast Form: **S2 jump onto the Assassin** (slow)
4. **S1 slam** to continue the CC chain
5. Your ADC kills them for free

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3 + Flash mid-cast changes the roar direction.** Surprise enemies with off-angle stuns.
- **S2 can cross terrain.** Use to escape or reposition over walls.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs dive comps. Universal pick — fits any team.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

zhao-huaizhen.overview:
# Zhao Huaizhen（趙懷真） — Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Fighter (Tai Chi Counter / Tank Bruiser)
- **Lane:** Clash Lane / Jungle
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 自在之心 (Heart of Ease)
- **Region:** CN server exclusive (赵怀真)

> Zhao Huaizhen is a uniquely designed Tai Chi-style Fighter/Tank with a four-stage AA combo and the ability to **absorb and redirect enemy projectiles** via his S3. His S1 can **forcefully change enemy facing direction** — redirecting channeled abilities. He excels at counter-engage, peel, and sustained brawling.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Four-Stage AA Combo (Energy System)

Zhao Huaizhen's AAs follow a 4-hit cycle. **Don't blindly spam AA** — use each stage intentionally:
- **1st Hit (Palm):** Bonus damage to minions/monsters. **Pause briefly after the 1st hit to reset the cycle** — fastest jungle/wave clear.
- **2nd Hit (Fist):** Rapid strikes. Best for stacking on-hit effects.
- **3rd Hit (Elbow):** **Restores HP** (more healing at lower HP). Sustain tool.
- **4th Hit (Shoulder):** Dash + high damage. **Pre-stack 3 AAs on air, hold the 4th as a gap-close.**

### S1: Redirect Enemy Facing

S1 pulls AND **changes the enemy's facing direction.** Mulan charging Heavy S1? Ying Zheng ult channel? Jiang Ziya S3? **S1 them → their ability fires backward.**

### S2: Counter-Shield

S2 is a charged shield. During charge: **immune to Physical CC.** If hit by hard CC (stun, knockup): **automatically triggers a counter-knockback + heal.** Pre-cast S2 when expecting Daji/Fuzi ambushes.

### S3: Projectile Absorption

S3 creates a vortex that **absorbs ALL incoming projectiles** (Hou Yi bird, Zhuge Liang S3, Marco S1, tower shots). The more damage absorbed, the stronger S3's second-cast pushback burst. **Unstoppable during channel.**

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
zhao-huaizhen.tips:
# Zhao Huaizhen Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. AA Cycle: Pause After 1st Hit for Fastest Clear

The 1st AA (palm) deals bonus damage to minions/monsters. **AA once → brief pause → AA again = repeat the 1st hit.** This doubles jungle/wave clear speed. Don't mindlessly spam AA.

### 2. Hold 4th AA as Gap-Close

The 4th AA is a dash. Pre-stack: AA air 3 times → walk into gank range → 4th AA dashes onto the enemy. Free engage tool.

### 3. S1: Redirect Enemy Ultimates

S1 changes enemy facing direction. When Mulan charges Heavy S1, Ying Zheng S3, or Jiang Ziya S3: **S1 them.** Their ultimate fires in the wrong direction. Game-changing counterplay.

### 4. S2: Pre-Cast When Ambush Is Likely

S2's counter triggers on hard CC. Walking past a bush Daji might be in? S2 first. Daji's charm triggers your auto-counter → she's knocked back + you're healed. You just turned her ambush into your kill.

### 5. S3: Absorb Everything, Return Harder

S3 absorbs all projectiles. The more damage absorbed, the bigger the return burst. Use when: enemy ADC is firing, Zhuge Liang S3 is incoming, or tower shots are flying. **S3 second cast = massive AoE burst.**

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard Engage: **S1 → S2 → AA×4 → S3 → S3 (return)**

1. S1 pull + redirect
2. S2 gap-close + counter ready
3. AA 4-hit combo (3rd hit heals)
4. S3 absorb return fire
5. S3 second cast — burst

### Backline Protection: **S2 → S1 → S3**

1. Assassin dives your ADC
2. S2 at ADC's feet (counter-knockback)
3. S1 push them away
4. S3 absorb their follow-up projectiles

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3 absorbs even tower shots.** Tower dive → S3 the tower bullet → S3 return kills the defender.
- **1st-hit AA reset works on all non-Hero targets.** Use on turrets too.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs projectile-reliant Heroes. Struggles vs melee auto-attackers who don't use projectiles.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
