zhou-yu.overview:
# Zhou Yu（周瑜） — Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Mage (Zone Control / Siege)
- **Lane:** Mid Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 鐵血都督 (Iron-Blooded Commander)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 周瑜)

> Zhou Yu is a zone-control Mage who excels at **area denial, tower destruction, and sustained teamfight control.** His S2 fire zones + S1 wind can blanket the entire battlefield in flames. His passive ignite and S2 fire zones **deal damage to turrets** — he's a "ruthless tower-pushing machine."

---

## Core Mechanics

### S2 + S1: Fire Spreading (Core Combo)

S2 drops a fire zone. S1 (wind) **blows the fire outward, creating 4-5 additional fire zones** in the wind's direction. This is how Zhou Yu covers entire screens in flames.

### S1: Self-Peel Knockback

S1 knocks back nearby enemies. When an Assassin dives you: S1 in their direction to push them away. Combos with S2+S3 for a point-blank stun counter-kill.

### S3: AoE Stun (on Fire)

S3 deals frontal cone damage. **If it overlaps any S2 fire zone, it triggers "Fire Wind" — 1-second AoE stun.** Always combo: S2 → S1 (spread) → S3 (stun).

### Passive: Ignite (Works on Towers!)

Abilities and AAs stack 4 ignites. At 4 stacks: target takes continuous Magic Damage + slow. **This works on turrets!** Drop S2 under a tower and watch its HP melt — even without minions.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
zhou-yu.tips:
# Zhou Yu Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Tower Melting: Your Hidden Superpower

Zhou Yu's S2 fire zones AND passive ignite **deal damage to turrets.** When minions crash into a tower: S2 under the tower → S1 to spread more fire. The tower loses 30-50% HP while you stand safely out of range. Even without minions, fire zone edges can chip towers. Zhou Yu can end games through pure siege pressure.

### 2. S2 + S1 + S3: The Perfect Teamfight Combo

1. **S2** drop fire zone
2. **S1** wind → spread 4-5 fire zones across the battlefield
3. **S3** over the flames → triggers **AoE 1-second stun** on everyone standing in fire
4. Team cleans up

### 3. S1 Self-Peel → Counter-Kill

When an Assassin (Han Xin, Lam) dives you: **S2 at your feet → S1 toward them** (knocks them back) → **S3 immediately** — the fire at your feet triggers the stun. The Assassin is now stunned, standing in fire, and you walk away or finish them.

### 4. Fire Spreading Through Bushes

S1's wind spreads fire into bushes. Use this to:
- Check bushes (fire reveals enemies)
- Block enemy jungle paths from fog of war
- Zone enemies off buffs without revealing yourself

### 5. Skill Priority

**Max S2 first, then S1. Take S3 whenever available.** S2 increases damage + max fire zone charges.

---

## Signature Combos

### Zone Control + AoE Stun: **S2 → S1 → S3**

1. S2 fire zone at your feet/front
2. S1 wind forward → 4-5 fire zones blanket the area
3. S3 over the flames → AoE 1s stun
4. Enemies are stunned inside a sea of fire

### Siege Pressure: **S2 (under tower) → S1 (spread)**

1. Minions crash tower
2. S2 under tower + S1 to spread fire
3. Tower burns. Repeat.

### Self-Defense Counter: **S2 (at feet) → S1 (toward enemy) → S3**

1. Assassin jumps on you
2. S2 at your feet
3. S1 knocks them back
4. S3 stuns them using the fire at your feet

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S2 charges stack.** You can store multiple fire zones. Drop two S2s before S1 for double the fire spread.
- **Fire zones persist.** Enemies must walk around them or take damage. Use this to block jungle chokepoints.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs immobile comps and siege scenarios. Struggles vs hyper-mobile Assassins who bypass fire zones.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

zhuangzi.overview:
# Zhuangzi（莊周） — Support

## Overview

- **Role:** Support / Tank (Anti-CC Specialist)
- **Lane:** Roaming
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 逍遙幻夢 (Dreaming Wanderer)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 庄周; nickname: "Fish")

> Zhuangzi is the game's premier **CC-cleansing** Support. Every 6 seconds, he auto-cleanses himself and gains DR + MS. His S3 is an **AoE team cleanse + shield.** He's the ultimate counter to CC-heavy team comps — when enemies lock in Wang Zhaojun, Zhang Fei, Bai Qi, Dharma, or Sun Ce, Zhuangzi single-handedly negates their entire engage.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Auto-Cleanse Every 6 Seconds

Every 6s, Zhuangzi enters a dream state: cleanses all CC, gains 15% DR + 15% MS for 2 seconds. Watch for the "translucent" visual cue — during this window, you can face-tank CC abilities for free.

### S2: Stacking Damage (Up to 5 Layers)

S2's damage stacks per hit (max 5 layers). Both the active cast AND the automatic 6s passive cast stack layers. Stick to enemies and S2 on cooldown — a 5-stack S2 melts squishies.

### S3: Reactive, NOT Predictive

S3 is an AoE team cleanse + shield. **Never cast it preemptively.** The correct timing: enemy CC lands on your team → S3 immediately. Lu Bu S3 knocks up your ADC? S3. Bai Qi taunts your team? S3. Zhang Fei roars? S3.

### S1: Self-Cleanse + Slow

S1 is a ranged slow AND **grants a self-cleanse on cast.** When your passive is on cooldown and a CC is incoming: S1 to break free.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

Hard-counters: Wang Zhaojun, Bai Qi, Zhang Fei, Dharma, Sun Ce, Guiguzi, Xi Shi — any CC-reliant engage.
*Waiting for community input…*
zhuangzi.tips:
# Zhuangzi Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. NEVER Build Resistance Boots

Zhuangzi has built-in CC immunity every 6 seconds + S1 self-cleanse + S3 team cleanse. **Resistance Boots are completely wasted on him.** Always build Shadow Boots (影忍之足) for Physical AA damage reduction.

### 2. S3: Reactive Only — Never Predict

S3 cleanses CC for the entire team. The #1 mistake: casting S3 before CC lands. Correct: enemy CC connects → S3 immediately. Lu Bu knocks up your ADC? S3. Bai Qi taunts your team? S3.

### 3. S2: Level 1 Double-Stack Trick

At level 1 in the fountain: learn S2. It auto-casts once. When you reach lane, S2's auto-cast timer and your active cast will sync — you can instantly apply 2 stacks of S2 damage on first contact.

### 4. Passive Window: Free Face-Tank

Every 6 seconds, Zhuangzi enters a translucent dream state (15% DR + 15% MS + CC immunity for 2s). Watch for this visual cue. During this window: walk into enemy CC abilities intentionally — you're immune, and you've wasted their cooldowns.

### 5. S1: Emergency Self-Cleanse

When your 6s passive is on cooldown and a CC is flying at you: S1. It grants a self-cleanse on cast. This gives Zhuangzi effectively two personal CC-immune windows.

### 6. Pick Zhuangzi Into CC-Heavy Drafts

Zhuangzi is a counter-pick Hero. Pick him when enemies have: Bai Qi, Wang Zhaojun, Zhang Fei, Dharma, Sun Ce, Guiguzi, Xi Shi, Mozi. If the enemy has zero hard CC, Zhuangzi is half a Hero.

---

## Teamfight Flow

**S1 (slow) → Walk into enemy CC (passive immune) → S2 spam (stack damage) → Watch your carries → S3 (team cleanse when enemy CC lands)**

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S2's damage stacks infinitely if you keep casting.** Stick to enemies and never stop pressing S2.
- **Zhuangzi can split-push surprisingly well.** With passive DR + S2 damage, he wins extended 1v1s against most non-ADC Heroes.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs CC-heavy comps. Struggles when enemy has zero CC (no cleanse value).

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

zilong.overview:
# Zilong（趙雲） — Assassin / Fighter

## Overview

- **Role:** Assassin / Fighter (Dive Bruiser / Juggernaut)
- **Lane:** Jungle / Clash Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★☆☆☆
- **Title:** 蒼天翔龍 (Heavenly Dragon)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 赵云)

> Zilong (Zhao Yun in CN) is a high-burst, high-mobility Assassin/Fighter with a unique passive: **the lower his HP, the more Damage Reduction he gains** (up to ~30%+ at critical HP). This makes him deceptively tanky and a master of low-HP comeback kills. His S3 is a long-range leap with a center knockup — land the center hit and enemies are dead before they land.

---

## Core Mechanics

### Passive: Low HP = High DR

Every 3% HP lost = +1% DR. At critical HP, Zilong has **~30%+ Damage Reduction.** Never flee at low HP — you're tankier than you look. This is the "low HP god mode" that enables impossible comeback kills.

### S3: Center = Knockup (Edge = Nothing)

S3's **inner circle knocks up.** The outer ring only deals damage with no CC. Always aim so the **center hits the target.** Pre-cast from bushes or use S1 to reposition before S3.

### S1: Enhanced AA Slows

After S1, the next AA becomes a sweeping strike with bonus damage + **25% slow.** Use S1 → AA to stick to enemies.

### S2: Sustain

S2's multi-hit deals damage and **restores HP** per hit (works on minions/monsters). This is Zilong's jungle sustain and comeback tool.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

*Waiting for community input…*
zilong.tips:
# Zilong Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Never Flee at Low HP

Passive grants up to ~30%+ DR at critical HP. **You're deceptively tanky when low.** Enemies overcommit thinking you're dead → passive kicks in → S2 heals + S3 knockup → reverse kill. Don't panic at low HP — it's your power window.

### 2. S3: Center Knockup or Nothing

S3 only knocks up at the **inner circle center.** The outer ring deals damage with zero CC. Always aim the center on your target. From bushes or with S1 repositioning first.

### 3. S1 → AA Slow: Guaranteed S3 Setup

S1 → AA slows by 25%. The slow makes S3's center-hit nearly undodgeable. Always: **S1 → AA (slow) → S3 (guaranteed center knockup).**

### 4. S2: Heal Off Anything

S2 heals per hit — works on minions, monsters, Heroes. When low between fights: S2 a jungle camp. Full HP without recalling.

### 5. Pure Sky + Passive = Near Immunity

Pure Sky's active DR (35%) stacks with passive DR (up to 30%+) = **~65%+ total DR at low HP.** You're nearly unkillable for those few seconds.

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard Burst: **S3 → AA → S2 → S1 → AA**

1. S3 center knockup
2. AA (S3's bonus magic damage mark procs)
3. S2 full damage (triggers S3 mark)
4. S1 chase → AA (slow)

### Long-Range Engage: **S1 → AA → S3 → S2 → AA**

1. S1 gap-close → AA slow
2. S3 center knockup (guaranteed because slowed)
3. S2 + AA finish

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3 from bushes is undodgeable.** Enemies can't react to what they can't see coming.
- **Track your HP percentage.** The lower you are, the tankier. But don't get one-shot — know when to use S2 heal.
- **Matchup:** God-tier vs immobile squishies. Struggles vs True Damage (Lu Bu) that ignores DR.

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!

ziya.overview:
# Ziya（姜子牙） — Mage

## Overview

- **Role:** Mage (XP Accelerator / Siege)
- **Lane:** Mid Lane
- **Difficulty:** ★★★☆☆
- **Title:** 封神者 (God-Conferrer)
- **Region:** Global (CN server name: 姜子牙)

> Ziya's rework transformed him from a "utility pick" into the "God-Conferring Mage." Enemies he kills/assists drop **Experience Orbs** — collect them to level faster. At level 15, he can **"Confer Godhood"** on one ally, allowing both Ziya and that ally to **break the level 15 cap and reach level 25.** His S3 can also **damage turrets.**

---

## Core Mechanics

### Experience Orbs: Race to Level 15

Enemies killed near Ziya drop XP Orbs. Collect them to level faster than anyone else. Prioritize farming and skirmishing — hitting level 15 first is your win condition.

### Confer Godhood (Level 15): Who to Bless?

At level 15, bless one ally. They AND Ziya can now level to 25. Priority:
- **#1: Late-game hyper-carry ADC** (Hou Yi, Luban No.7, Garo) — 10 extra levels of stats + skill scaling
- **#2: Jungle hyper-carry** (Luna, Wukong, Han Xin)
- **#3: Scaling Fighter** (Mi Yue, Sikong Zhen) — base-stat-reliant Heroes

Never bless the Support or a behind-early-game Hero.

### S3: Damages Turrets

Ziya's S3 deals damage to structures. Siege and defend towers with S3 from safe range.

### S3 + Flash: Redirect Mid-Channel

S3 fires 3 shockwaves. **Flash before the final wave** to redirect it onto enemies who thought they dodged. Surprise kills from off-screen.

---

## Recommended Build

See [`build.md`](build.md) for full item builds and Arcana loadouts.

## Counters & Synergies

Best to bless: Hou Yi, Luban No.7, Garo, Luna, Wukong.
*Waiting for community input…*
ziya.tips:
# Ziya Tips & Tricks

---

## Core Gameplay Tips

### 1. Race to Level 15 — Collect ALL XP Orbs

Enemies you kill/assist drop XP Orbs. Walk over them. Prioritize wave clear + skirmish participation. Hitting level 15 before the enemy Mage is your #1 objective.

### 2. Confer Godhood: Bless the Right Ally

At level 15: bless ONE ally. They AND you can now level to 25. Always bless:
- **Your hyper-carry ADC** (Hou Yi, Luban No.7, Garo) — 10 extra levels of stats and skill scaling
- **Your fed Jungler** (Luna, Wukong)
- Never bless: the Support, a behind laner, or yourself (auto-self is fine but prioritize carries)

### 3. S1: Defense Shred + Multi-Tick

S1 slows AND **shreds enemy dual defenses.** It also deals multi-tick damage — perfect for stacking Mask of Agony + Sunset Flow. Always S1 before your team follows up.

### 4. S2 → S1: Guaranteed Hit

S2 has a delay. Technique: **S2 first (where they'll be) → S1 immediately.** S1's strong slow makes S2 nearly undodgeable. Reverse the order and S2 misses.

### 5. S3 + Flash: Final Wave Redirect

S3 fires 3 waves. Enemies dodge the first two and think they're safe. **Flash before the 3rd wave** to redirect it onto them. Also: S3 damages turrets — use to siege and defend.

---

## Signature Combos

### Standard Poke: **S2 → S1 → S3**

1. S2 knockup (predict)
2. S1 slow + defense shred
3. S3 charged through them

### Bush Ambush: **S1 → S2 → S3 + Flash**

1. S1 from bush (slow + shred)
2. S2 knockup (guaranteed because slowed)
3. S3 charge → Flash final wave

---

## Advanced Tips

- **S3 can clear waves AND damage turrets simultaneously.** Aim through both.
- **XP Orbs persist briefly.** You don't need to collect them mid-fight — grab them after.
- **Matchup:** God-tier in coordinated play with a hyper-carry to bless. Struggles when team has no clear "blessing target."

---

> ⚠ **Player-discovered tips.** Contribute your own at the [community repo](#)!
